Signup\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/embedded-signup\\\/version-4-public-preview\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Phone Number First flow\"]},\" to a subset of business customers in the default Embedded Signup flow. This flow has been available in the v2, v3, and v4 public preview versions for the past month; it is now beginning to roll out in the default flow. In this variant, business customers enter and verify their phone number near the start of signup, before they create or select business assets, surfacing phone number eligibility and verification issues earlier.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! This flow has been available in the v2, v3, and v4 public preview versions for the past month; it is now beginning to roll out in the default flow. In this variant, business customers enter and verify their phone number near the start of signup, before they create or select business assets, surfacing phone number eligibility and verification issues earlier.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27194297760271983","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1783062000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"In-App Signup\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Updated the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/in-app-signup\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"In-App Signup\"]},\" guide with geographic availability. name=\"change_date\" value=\"2026-06-29\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Username reservation and adoption go live June 29, 2026; BSUID message-send support and the contact-request button move to July 2026.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/june_29_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Updated the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/business-scoped-user-ids\">Business-scoped user IDs\u003C\/a> page:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Businesses can reserve and adopt a \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/business-scoped-user-ids#adopt-or-change-a-business-username\">business username\u003C\/a> starting June 29, 2026 (previously \u201clater in 2026\u201d).\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Sending messages to a BSUID is supported starting July 2026 (previously listed as May 2026).\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>The \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/business-scoped-user-ids#requesting-phone-numbers-from-users\">\u003Ccode>REQUEST_CONTACT_INFO\u003C\/code> button\u003C\/a> is available starting early July 2026 (previously listed as early May 2026).\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Clarified that the text field on a \u003Ccode>REQUEST_CONTACT_INFO\u003C\/code> button is optional and the button label cannot be customized, and removed the hardcoded text field from the template creation example.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27732841279685538","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1782457200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud call webhooks\"]},\" support for SIP-enabled business phone numbers. When SIP is enabled, you can now optionally enable webhook delivery to receive call lifecycle events (\",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"call_created\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"terminate\"]},\") for SIP calls. This includes a new \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"webhook_delivery\"]},\" field in the SIP settings configuration. Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"June 26, 2026\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2026-06-26\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Added SIP call webhooks support with call_created and terminate events for SIP-enabled numbers.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/june_26_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>, \u003Cem>Calling Webhooks\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Added \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/calling\/sip#sip-call-webhooks\">SIP call webhooks\u003C\/a> support for SIP-enabled business phone numbers. When SIP is enabled, you can now optionally enable webhook delivery to receive call lifecycle events (\u003Ccode>call_created\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>terminate\u003C\/code>) for SIP calls. This includes a new \u003Ccode>webhook_delivery\u003C\/code> field in the SIP settings configuration. The call_created webhook includes WhatsApp Call ID (WACID) which can be correlated with SIP Call-ID headers.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26837235505955105","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1782370800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]},\", \",{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Webhooks\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/calling\\\/call-settings#voicemail\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Voicemail\"]},\" for WhatsApp Cloud API Calling is now generally available. Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"June 25, 2026\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Calls\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2026-06-25\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"WhatsApp Cloud API Calling voicemail is now generally available.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/june_25_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>, \u003Cem>Webhooks\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/calling\/call-settings#voicemail\">Voicemail\u003C\/a> for WhatsApp Cloud API Calling is now generally available. You can configure announcement media, \u003Ccode>REJECT\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>TIMEOUT\u003C\/code> triggers, and receive recorded voicemails through the existing \u003Ccode>messages\u003C\/code> webhook field as inbound audio messages.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27605975582329305","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1463799081753523","display_name_fbt":"Calls","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1781593200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"messaging_account_id\"]},\" as the preferred request parameter for specifying the Messaging Account on WhatsApp Business Cloud API messaging and calling endpoints. The previous \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"paid_messaging_account_id\"]},\" parameter is now a deprecated, backward-compatible alias; migrate to \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"messaging_account_id\"]},\" by December 31, 2026, after which \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"paid_messaging_account_id\"]},\" is planned for removal in a future Graph API version. If you supply both parameters, \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"messaging_account_id\"]},\" takes precedence and \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"paid_messaging_account_id\"]},\" is ignored. See \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/account-model-evolution\\\/messaging\\\/\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Managing messaging accounts\"]},\" for details.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"June 16, 2026\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2026-06-16\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Added messaging_account_id as the preferred Cloud API parameter, with paid_messaging_account_id kept as a deprecated backward-compatible alias.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/june_16_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Added \u003Ccode>messaging_account_id\u003C\/code> as the preferred request parameter for specifying the Messaging Account on WhatsApp Business Cloud API messaging and calling endpoints. The previous \u003Ccode>paid_messaging_account_id\u003C\/code> parameter is now a deprecated, backward-compatible alias; migrate to \u003Ccode>messaging_account_id\u003C\/code> by December 31, 2026, after which \u003Ccode>paid_messaging_account_id\u003C\/code> is planned for removal in a future Graph API version. If you supply both parameters, \u003Ccode>messaging_account_id\u003C\/code> takes precedence and \u003Ccode>paid_messaging_account_id\u003C\/code> is ignored. See \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/account-model-evolution\/messaging\/\">Managing messaging accounts\u003C\/a> for details.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27595726440057329","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1781506800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/direct-send\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Direct Send API\"]},\" documentation for the open beta. href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/analytics#template-analytics\">template analytics\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/analytics#template-group-analytics\">template group analytics\u003C\/a> limitations to remove the United Kingdom from the unsupported Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"June 2, 2026\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2026-06-02\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Published account model evolution docs; added Meta Business Agent section; updated About the WhatsApp Business Platform; updated the Message Templates API archive and unarchive response format.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/june_2_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Added \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/meta-business-agent\/get-started\">Meta Business Agent\u003C\/a> section to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/about-the-platform\">About the WhatsApp Business Platform\u003C\/a> page. Meta Business Agent lets you configure and operate AI-powered agents on WhatsApp, including agent configuration, knowledge management, custom connectors, thread control, and evaluation tools.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Published \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/account-model-evolution\/\">Updates to WhatsApp Business accounts\u003C\/a>, \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/account-model-evolution\/onboarding\/\">Onboarding changes\u003C\/a>, and \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/account-model-evolution\/messaging\/\">Managing messaging accounts\u003C\/a> \u2014 three new guides describing the evolving WhatsApp Business account model, including the new WhatsApp Business Account (WAAC) and Messaging Account structure, phased rollout timeline, and the \u003Ccode>paid_messaging_account_id\u003C\/code> parameter for multi-Messaging Account scenarios.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Updated \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/about-the-platform\/\">About the WhatsApp Business Platform\u003C\/a> to reflect new account model terminology, including updated WhatsApp Business Account description and API heading changes.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>, \u003Cem>Message Templates\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Updated the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/templates\/template-archival\">Message Templates API\u003C\/a> to return detailed response objects when archiving or unarchiving templates, instead of \u003Ccode>{\"success\": true}\u003C\/code>. Archiving now returns \u003Ccode>archived_templates\u003C\/code> (successfully archived IDs) and \u003Ccode>failed_templates\u003C\/code> (per-template error messages). Unarchiving returns \u003Ccode>unarchived_templates\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>failed_templates\u003C\/code> in the same format. This enables callers to handle partial failures when archiving or unarchiving templates in bulk.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26999010966429905","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1780038000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]},\", \",{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Webhooks\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/calling\\\/call-settings#voicemail\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"voicemail configuration and webhooks\"]},\" to the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/calling\\\/call-settings\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Configure Call Settings\"]},\" page. Voicemail is in alpha \\u2014 early integration partners can configure announcement media, \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"REJECT\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"TIMEOUT\"]},\" triggers, and receive recorded voicemails through the existing \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"messages\"]},\" webhook field as inbound audio messages.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"May 29, 2026\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2026-05-29\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Added documentation for voicemail collection and webhook delivery in the WhatsApp Cloud API Calling configuration (alpha).\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/may_29_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>, \u003Cem>Webhooks\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Added \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/calling\/call-settings#voicemail\">voicemail configuration and webhooks\u003C\/a> to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/calling\/call-settings\">Configure Call Settings\u003C\/a> page. Voicemail is in alpha \u2014 early integration partners can configure announcement media, \u003Ccode>REJECT\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>TIMEOUT\u003C\/code> triggers, and receive recorded voicemails through the existing \u003Ccode>messages\u003C\/code> webhook field as inbound audio messages.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26997557399910045","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1779951600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Updated the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/business-scoped-user-ids\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Business Scoped User IDs\"]},\" page. Renamed the contact request interactive message type from \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"contact_request\"]},\" to \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"request_contact_info\"]},\". Fixed the parent BSUID endpoint URL to use \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"api.facebook.com\"]},\" instead of \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"graph.facebook.com\"]},\".\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]},\", \",{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Webhooks\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Updated the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/calling\\\/reference#calling-api-webhooks\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Calling API reference\"]},\" page. Added BSUID and username fields to calling webhooks: \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"to_user_id\"]},\", \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"to_parent_user_id\"]},\", and \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"contacts\"]},\" with \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"username\"]},\", \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"user_id\"]},\", \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"parent_user_id\"]},\" for Call Connect and Call Terminate webhooks, and \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"recipient_user_id\"]},\" for Call Status webhooks.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"May 28, 2026\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2026-05-28\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Renamed contact request interactive message type, fixed parent BSUID endpoint URL, and added BSUID fields to calling API webhooks.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/may_28_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Updated the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/business-scoped-user-ids\">Business Scoped User IDs\u003C\/a> page. Renamed the contact request interactive message type from \u003Ccode>contact_request\u003C\/code> to \u003Ccode>request_contact_info\u003C\/code>. Fixed the parent BSUID endpoint URL to use \u003Ccode>api.facebook.com\u003C\/code> instead of \u003Ccode>graph.facebook.com\u003C\/code>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>, \u003Cem>Webhooks\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Updated the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/calling\/reference#calling-api-webhooks\">Calling API reference\u003C\/a> page. Added BSUID and username fields to calling webhooks: \u003Ccode>to_user_id\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>to_parent_user_id\u003C\/code>, and \u003Ccode>contacts\u003C\/code> with \u003Ccode>username\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>user_id\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>parent_user_id\u003C\/code> for Call Connect and Call Terminate webhooks, and \u003Ccode>recipient_user_id\u003C\/code> for Call Status webhooks.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"28226498216940342","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1779865200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]},\", \",{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Pricing\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added an ISO Country Code column to the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/pricing#country-calling-codes\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"country calling codes\"]},\" table on the pricing page. Updated billing localization sections for Brazil and India with migration deadlines and links to the new Currency Migration API.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Added a new \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/pricing\/change-billing-currency\">Change billing currency via API\u003C\/a> page documenting the WABA Currency Migration API, which allows href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/pricing\/ai-providers\">AI Providers pricing policy\u003C\/a> page with upcoming rates effective July 1, 2026.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Updated the When a coexistence client re-registers their WhatsApp Business app (device switch, reinstall, or re-registration), they see a pre-checked opt-in to reconnect all previously connected Cloud API products. Each group message must be marked individually.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/may_14_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>, \u003Cem>Groups API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Updated \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/messages\/mark-message-as-read\">mark messages as read\u003C\/a> documentation. Businesses can now mark group messages as read using the same \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/message-api\">Messages API\u003C\/a> endpoint. Unlike individual messages, each group message must be marked as read individually \u2014 marking one message does not mark earlier messages in the group as read.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26613269531701563","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1778655600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Effective June 15, 2026, \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/templates\\\/authentication-templates\\\/keyboard-suggestions\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Keyboard suggestions\"]},\" will be enabled by default for all authentication templates. On iOS 26 and later, WhatsApp users will see a native one-tap autofill prompt in the keyboard when they receive an authentication code. No integration changes are required. To opt out before this date, use the \u003Cstrong>Allow autofill on iOS\u003C\/strong> toggle in WhatsApp Manager.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26735161186133946","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1778569200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]},\", \",{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Pricing\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Updated the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/pricing\\\/ai-providers\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"AI Providers pricing policy\"]},\" page. Brazil remains in effect.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/may_12_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>, \u003Cem>Pricing\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Updated the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/pricing\/ai-providers\">AI Providers pricing policy\u003C\/a> page. Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"April 21, 2026\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Marketing Messages\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2026-04-21\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Offsite conversion metrics V2, automatic creative optimizations default behavior change and documentation refresh.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/april_21_2026.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003Cgk project=\"mm_oc_3pd_read_v2\">\n  \u003Cp>\u003Cem>Marketing Messages API for WhatsApp\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n  \u003Cp>Additional offsite conversion metrics are now available in WhatsApp Manager and in the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/analytics#template-analytics\">Template Analytics API\u003C\/a>. New metrics include: registrations completed, adds to wishlist, adds of payment info, levels achieved, ratings submitted, tutorials completed, searches, leads, content views, other, and custom events. See \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/view-metrics\">Viewing metrics\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/measure-conversion\">Setting up conversion measurement\u003C\/a> for details.\u003C\/p>\n\u003C\/gk>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Marketing Messages API for WhatsApp\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/send-marketing-messages#automatic-creative-optimizations\">Automatic creative optimizations\u003C\/a> are now disabled by default at the WhatsApp Business Account level. You can opt in via the API or directly in WhatsApp Manager. Updated ACO documentation with refreshed content: added Dynamic CTA and Hyperlink formatting to Coming soon, and updated text formatting description.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"35176454498666653","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1251763483575878","display_name_fbt":"Marketing These values are part of a gradual rollout and may not be available to you immediately.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26885406871054259","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1776409200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added new error code \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/support\\\/error-codes#131064\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"131064\"]}]},\". This applies to both template messages and direct send messages. This applies to both template messages and direct send messages. The object contains a \u003Ccode>reason\u003C\/code> field (\u003Ccode>BUSINESS_DOWNGRADE\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>PRIMARY_INACTIVITY\u003C\/code>, or \u003Ccode>COMPANION_INACTIVITY\u003C\/code>) and an \u003Ccode>initiated_by\u003C\/code> field (\u003Ccode>USER\u003C\/code> or \u003Ccode>SYSTEM\u003C\/code>). Previously, the system relied on flow tokens as identifiers. While effective, we have added some  improvements to the verification process.\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nWe have introduced a robust two-signature authentication mechanism:\\n\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\n1. \",{\"type\":\"GalaxySharedB\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Platform-side Signature Verification\"]},\": Our platform now verifies the authorization of requests for specific flow messages. This process is handled entirely by our system and does not require any changes or action from your business.\\n\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\n2. \",{\"type\":\"GalaxySharedB\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Flow Token Signature\"]},\": Businesses now have the option to use an extra layer of authentication. This signature  is generated by our system and added to the data channel request payload.  This signature can be optionally used by businesses to verify that requests originate from users who received the corresponding flow message, helping ensure authenticity and security of data channel endpoints.\\n\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHtmlBr\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false}]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"What Does This Mean for Businesses?\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nNo action required for the platform-side verification; it is managed by us.\\n\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nOptional enhancement: Businesses can choose to use the flow token signature authentication for added security (\",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/flows\\\/guides\\\/implementingyourflowendpoint#data_exchange_request\",\"isMuted\":false,\"target\":\"_blank\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"More details\"]},\").\\n\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nTo enable the improvements, set the \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"data_api_version\"]},\" to \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"4.0\"]},\" in the Flow JSON.\\n\\n\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCuiNote.react"},"name":"DMCuiNote"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxySharedB.react"},"name":"GalaxySharedB"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHtmlBr.react"},"name":"GalaxyHtmlBr"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"November 11, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"gk\" value=\"wa_flows_oct_25_release\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-11-11\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Launched Data API version 4.0 with enhanced endpoint security and announced WhatsApp Flows support on WhatsApp Web.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/november_11_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\u003Coc-devui-note>\n  \u003Cp>Beginning in early \u003Cstrong>December 2025\u003C\/strong>, we will begin supporting Flows on WhatsApp Web. Users will be able to open, complete, and view Flow responses on WhatsApp Web companions. No action is required, this feature will be enabled automatically.\u003C\/p>\n\u003C\/oc-devui-note>\n\n\u003Cp>We are launching Data API version 4.0, which features improvements to the security of the Flows endpoints.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"whatsapp-flows-endpoints-security-enhancements-data-api-version-40\">WhatsApp Flows Endpoints Security Enhancements (Data API Version 4.0)\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nTo further protect user interactions and ensure requests are genuinely from the intended recipients, we have strengthened the security of WA Flows endpoints. Previously, the system relied on flow tokens as identifiers. While effective, we have added some  improvements to the verification process.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nWe have introduced a robust two-signature authentication mechanism:\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;text-indent:60px\">\n1. \u003Cb>Platform-side Signature Verification\u003C\/b>: Our platform now verifies the authorization of requests for specific flow messages. This process is handled entirely by our system and does not require any changes or action from your business.\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;text-indent:60px\">\n2. \u003Cb>Flow Token Signature\u003C\/b>: Businesses now have the option to use an extra layer of authentication. This signature  is generated by our system and added to the data channel request payload.  This signature can be optionally used by businesses to verify that requests originate from users who received the corresponding flow message, helping ensure authenticity and security of data channel endpoints.\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">What Does This Mean for Businesses?\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:36px;text-indent:60px\">\nNo action required for the platform-side verification; it is managed by us.\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:36px;text-indent:60px\">\nOptional enhancement: Businesses can choose to use the flow token signature authentication for added security (\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/implementingyourflowendpoint#data_exchange_request\" target=\"_blank\">More details\u003C\/a>).\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:36px;text-indent:60px\">\nTo enable the improvements, set the \u003Ccode>data_api_version\u003C\/code> to \u003Ccode>4.0\u003C\/code> in the Flow JSON.\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26821990784133977","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1762156800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Updated the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/webhooks\\\/reference\\\/messages\\\/unsupported\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"unsupported messages webhook\"]},\" by adding details about the actual message type.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added new You can get a link to Hosted ES in the App Dashboard and add it to your website or customer portal. Business customers who click the link will be presented with a webpage with a \u201cGet started\u201d button that launches the Embedded Signup flow:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cdiv style=\"display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center;\">\n\u003Cimg width=\"800\" Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 16, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Messages, Webhook Subscriptions\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-10-16\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Media message webhooks now include media URL, and audio messages can now be designated as voice messages.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/october_16_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API, Business Management API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Incoming media messages webhooks (\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/webhooks\/reference\/messages\/image\">image messages\u003C\/a>, \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/webhooks\/reference\/messages\/video\">video messages\u003C\/a>, etc.) now include the incoming media asset\u2019s media URL, which is assigned to the \u003Ccode>url\u003C\/code> property.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>You can now designate an \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/messages\/audio-messages\">audio message\u003C\/a> as a \u003Cstrong>voice message\u003C\/strong>. Delivered voice messages appear in the WhatsApp client with a play icon, waveform graphic, profile image, and a microphone icon. If the recipient has enabled \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/faq.whatsapp.com\/241617298315321\/\">voice message transcripts\u003C\/a>, a text transcription of the message can also appear:\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cdiv style=\"display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center;\">\n\u003Cimg handle=\"GMo5hSHRg2tvgf0HANMe-cqZiLVPbj0JAAAD\" Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 8, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"WhatsApp Business Account, Webhook Subscriptions\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-10-08\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Messaging limits now portfolio-based with 2,000 initial scaling, added new fields and error codes in v24.0, and launched Embedded Signup v4.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/october_8_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API, Business Management API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/messaging-limits\">Messaging limits\u003C\/a> are now business portfolio-based instead of business phone number-based, and the initial increase via scaling path is now 2,000 instead of 1,000. To support this change, for version 24.0 and newer requests, a new \u003Ccode>whatsapp_business_manager_messaging_limit\u003C\/code> field has been added, which returns the owning business portfolio\u2019s messaging limit. This field is available on the following endpoints:\n    \u003Cul>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/ads-commerce\/marketing-api\/reference\/business#Reading\">GET \/&lt;BUSINESS_PORTFOLIO_ID&gt;\u003C\/a>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account\/whatsapp-business-account-api#Reading\">GET \/&lt;WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID&gt;\u003C\/a>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/whatsapp-business-account-phone-number-api#Reading\">GET \/&lt;BUSINESS_PHONE_NUMBER_ID&gt;\u003C\/a>\u003C\/li>\n    \u003C\/ul>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>For version 24.0 and newer requests, the \u003Ccode>messaging_limit_tier\u003C\/code> on the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/whatsapp-business-account-phone-number-api#Reading\">GET \/&lt;BUSINESS_PHONE_NUMBER_ID&gt;\u003C\/a> endpoint now returns the owning business portfolio\u2019s messaging limit.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>For version 24.0 and newer requests, added error code \u003Ccode>131059\u003C\/code> which is returned when querying the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account\/template-api#Reading\">GET \/&lt;WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID&gt;\/message_templates\u003C\/a> endpoint with an invalid \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/graph-api\/results#cursors\">pagination cursor\u003C\/a>. If you get this error, retry your request without \u003Ccode>before\u003C\/code> or \u003Ccode>after\u003C\/code> cursors. This will generate and return new cursors for paginated responses.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>For version 24.0 and newer requests, the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/webhooks\/reference\/messages\/status\">status messages\u003C\/a> webhook no longer includes the \u003Ccode>conversation\u003C\/code> object, unless the webhook is for a message sent during an open \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/pricing#free-entry-point-windows\">Free Entry Point window\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Embedded Signup\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/embedded-signup\/version-4\">Embedded Signup version 4\u003C\/a> is now available. Version 4 provides a simplified onboarding experience and allows you to onboard business customers to multiple products (WhatsApp Cloud API, Marketing Messages Lite API, \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/business.whatsapp.com\/products\/ads-that-click-to-whatsapp\">Ads that click-to-WhatsApp\u003C\/a> and the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/ads-commerce\/conversions-api\">Conversions API\u003C\/a>).\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"25701229606144277","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1846180586099481","display_name_fbt":"Webhook Subscriptions","is_active":true},{"id":"927571612996900","display_name_fbt":"WhatsApp Business Account","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1759906800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Embedded Signup\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Embedded Signup version 4 is now available. Version 4 provides a simplified onboarding experience and allows you to onboard business customers to multiple products (WhatsApp Cloud API, Marketing Messages Lite API, Ads that click-to-WhatsApp and the Conversions API). Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 1, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-10-01\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Updated WhatsApp Business Platform messaging rates for multiple regions including UAE, Colombia, Mexico, and others.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/october_1_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API, Marketing Messages Lite API, Pricing\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Changed \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/pricing#rates\">WhatsApp Business Platform rates\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Increased marketing message rates for United Arab Emirates.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Increased utility and authentication message rates for Colombia.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Decreased marketing message rates for Mexico.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Decreased utility and authentication message rates for Saudi Arabia, Argentina, and Egypt.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Zimbabwe is now mapped to our \u201cRest of Africa\u201d region vs. \u201cOther.\u201d Messages delivered to WhatsApp users with a +263 country calling code (Zimbabwe) will now be charged \u201cRest of Africa\u201d rates.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"25933007519632505","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1759302000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"MM Please upgrade Flows on this version to the recommended version, to avoid any disruption.\u003C\/p>\n\u003C\/oc-devui-note>\n\u003Cp>We are releasing the latest Flow JSON version, 7.3, which includes improved Flow JSON validations.\u003C\/p>\n\u003Ch4 id=\"flow-json-validation-updates\">Flow JSON Validation Updates\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Validation for routing model and data model in Flow JSON\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nThe Flow\u2019s routing model's improved validation makes sure only valid routes are used for navigation. We\u2019ve also improved the validation for the screen\u2019s data model. These updates don't change how things work, but they make it easier to spot \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/reference\/error-codes#action-errors\" target=\"_blank\">errors\u003C\/a> in the Flow JSON.\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26720154424303626","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1757314800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"September 3, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Marketing Messages, Webhook Subscriptions\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-09-03\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Launching new MM Lite ToS signed webhook, conversion metrics in WhatsApp Manager, and unified marketing_messages endpoint for both APIs.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/september_3_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>MM Lite API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>On September 8th, 2025, we\u2019re launching a new \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/onboarding#receive-mm-lite-terms-of-service-signed-webhook--preferred-\">\u201cMM Lite ToS signed\u201d webhook\u003C\/a>, which will be sent whenever a business signs the MM Lite ToS via any method (e.g. Embedded Signup, or in WhatsApp Manager). The webhook will have a more descriptive name than the existing \u003Ccode>AD_ACCOUNT_LINKED\u003C\/code> webhook. The older webhook will be deprecated by Jan 1, 2026.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/viewing-metrics\">Conversion metrics\u003C\/a> will now also be available in WhatsApp Manager UI and via the WhatsApp Business Management API. This means that we\u2019re removing the ability to view MM Lite metrics for read-only Ad Accounts in Ads Manager.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>The \u003Ccode>\/marketing_messages\u003C\/code> endpoint will \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/sending-messages#send-marketing-template-messages\">accept marketing messages for both MM Lite API and Cloud API\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"25048359864798991","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1846180586099481","display_name_fbt":"Webhook Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"July 15, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Marketing Messages\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-07-15\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Added marketing_messages_onboarding_status field for granular eligibility status, and fixed bugs in related status fields.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/july_15_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>MM Lite API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Added \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/onboarding#checking-eligibility-status\">\u003Ccode>marketing_messages_onboarding_status\u003C\/code> field\u003C\/a> which provides more granular eligibility status data. The field will be a replacement for \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/onboarding#checking-eligibility-status--alternative-\">\u003Ccode>marketing_messages_api_status\u003C\/code> field\u003C\/a> which will be deprecated in version 24.0.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Fixed the \u003Ccode>marketing_messages_lite_api_status\u003C\/code> field to correct a bug which was erroneously returning \u003Ccode>ELIGIBLE\u003C\/code> when it should have returned \u003Ccode>ONBOARDED\u003C\/code>. This field will be deprecated in version 24.0, so we recommend using the new \u003Ccode>marketing_onboarding_status\u003C\/code> field instead.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Changed the \u003Ccode>marketing_messages_api_status\u003C\/code> field to no longer require one or more registered phone numbers, or one or more MM Lite API-ready templates, in order for Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"June 24, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Marketing Messages\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-06-24\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Made ads_read permission optional for partners, and added text overlays and image animation Automatic Creative Optimizations.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/june_24_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>MM Lite API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Permissions\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>The \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/permissions#a\">ads_read\u003C\/a> permission is now optional for partners. This change impacts the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/for-solution-providers#-recommended--onboard-a-business-to-mm-lite-api-using-the-intent-api\">Intent API\u003C\/a> and the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/for-solution-providers#onboard-a-business-to-mm-lite-api-using-embedded-signup\">Embedded Signup\u003C\/a> onboarding flows. Prior to this change, partners had to apply for App Review to get advanced access for this new permission, regardless of whether or not their app intended to call the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/ads-commerce\/marketing-api\/insights\">Insights API\u003C\/a> for conversion metrics. Now, partners only need to request advanced access for this permission via App Review if their app intends to use the Insights API.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Automatic Creative Optimizations\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Added \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/sending-messages#text-overlays\">text overlays\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/sending-messages#image-animation\">image animation\u003C\/a> Automatic Creative Optimizations. Like other optimizations, these are enabled by default on all templates, but can be disabled upon template creation, or when editing a template.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"24989028507359255","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1251763483575878","display_name_fbt":"Marketing Messages","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1750402800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"MM Lite API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Businesses in Russia who were previously unable to send messages via MM Lite API can now do so. Please upgrade Flows on this version to the recommended version, to avoid any disruption.\u003C\/p>\n\u003C\/oc-devui-note>\n\u003Cp>We are releasing the latest Flow JSON version, 7.1, with a new component and several enhancements.\u003C\/p>\n\u003Ch4 id=\"component-updates\">Component Updates\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Update to the ChipsSelector component\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nWe are updating the ChipsSelector component to align its behaviour with other list selection components (i.e. CheckboxGroup, RadioButtonsGroup and Dropdown). The ChipsSelector component can now:\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:60px\">\nBe used inside If\/Switch components\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:60px\">\nHave \u201con-select-action\u201d and \u201con-unselect-action\u201d properties defined at its root.\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003Ch4  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"May 29, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-05-29\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Added error code 132018 for template message diagnostics and released Embedded Signup Version 3 with new features and versioning alignment.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/may_29_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Added \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/support\/error-codes\">error code\u003C\/a>\u00a0\u003Ccode>132018\u003C\/code> for help diagnosing invalid parameters when attempting to send a template message. Applies to version 23.0 and newer versions.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Embedded Signup\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/embedded-signup\/version-3\">Version 3\u003C\/a> is now available. As part of this release, we have introduced versioning that will align with Graph API\u2019s release cadence. The following changes apply to version 3:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>only_waba_sharing\u003C\/code> is no longer a valid \u003Ccode>extras.featureType\u003C\/code> value, since \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/embedded-signup\/bypass-phone-addition\">bypassing the phone number screen\u003C\/a> is obsolete now that business customers are able to complete the flow with a verified business phone number, unverified number, or no number at all.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Added \u003Ccode>extras.version\u003C\/code> which must be set to \u003Ccode>3\u003C\/code> to enable version 3.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Added \u003Ccode>extras.features\u003C\/code> for enabling \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\">Marketing Messages Lite API\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/embedded-signup\/app-only-install\">App-Only Install\u003C\/a> onboarding.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Added \u003Ccode>extras.features.api_access_only\u003C\/code> for enabling App-Only Install onboarding.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Enabling Marketing Messages Lite API onboarding must now be done through the \u003Ccode>extras.features\u003C\/code> instead of \u003Ccode>extras.featureType\u003C\/code>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/embedded-signup\/implementation#session-logging-message-event-listener\">Session info\u003C\/a> will be automatically enabled for all users. Partners will still have to add an event listener on the same window to process incoming information.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>coexistence\u003C\/code> is no longer a valid \u003Ccode>extras.featureType\u003C\/code> value, you must use \u003Ccode>whatsapp_business_app_onboarding\u003C\/code> to launch the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/embedded-signup\/onboarding-business-app-users\">Whatsapp Business App onboarding\u003C\/a> flow.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Measurement partners currently cannot use version 3.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/embedded-signup\/pre-filled-data\">Pre-filled data\u003C\/a> will no longer bypass any screens, to provide business customers the opportunity to review and change data.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"24805874209077747","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1747983600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"MM for \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/guides\/tracking-click-events\">tracking click events\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>We are offering a limited roll-out of webhook access to click events on marketing messages sent using MM Lite. \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/guides\/tracking-click-events\">Read the \u201cTracking click
