Lite API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Early access to Automated Creative Optimizations\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We are piloting a new optimization capability exclusive to MM Lite API (not available on Cloud API), which automatically enhances the visual appeal and engagement of marketing messages. Similarly to Advantage+ creative, this capability tests minor variations of your existing image header with different crop orientations or color filters, and automatically selects the variant which is getting the highest click-through rate over time with no input needed from you.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"A small group of businesses will be getting early access to this feature starting May 5, with the ability to opt Templates out via the message template API. For more details, see \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/whatsapp\\\/marketing-messages-lite-api\\\/sending-messages#automatic-creative-optimizations\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Automated Creative Optimizations\"]},\".\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Please reach out to your partner, if you would like to be included in early access to this feature.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"April 11, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Marketing Messages\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-04-11\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Piloting Automated Creative Optimizations for MM Lite API to automatically enhance the visual appeal of marketing messages.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/april_11_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>MM Lite API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Early access to Automated Creative Optimizations\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>We are piloting a new optimization capability exclusive to MM Lite API (not available on Cloud API), which automatically enhances the visual appeal and engagement of marketing messages. Similarly to Advantage+ creative, this capability tests minor variations of your existing image header with different crop orientations or color filters, and automatically selects the variant which is getting the highest click-through rate over time with no input needed from you.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>A small group of businesses will be getting early access to this feature starting May 5, with the ability to opt Templates out via the message template API. For more details, see \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/sending-messages#automatic-creative-optimizations\">Automated Creative Optimizations\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Please reach out to your partner, if you would like to be included in early access to this feature.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"24891815003813092","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1251763483575878","display_name_fbt":"Marketing Messages","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1744182000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Template Categorization\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We no longer support the \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"allow_category_change\"]},\" property during template creation. Previously, if set to true in a template creation request, this allowed us to update a template\\u2019s category to marketing, if we determined marketing to be its category per its content and our guidelines. This is now the default behavior.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"April 9, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-04-09\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Removed support for allow_category_change property during template creation, making automatic category updates the default behavior.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/april_9_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Template Categorization\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>We no longer support the \u003Ccode>allow_category_change\u003C\/code> property during template creation. Previously, if set to true in a template creation request, this allowed us to update a template\u2019s category to marketing, if we determined marketing to be its category per its content and our guidelines. This is now the default behavior.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"24824037873904385","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1744095600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true},{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCuiNote\",\"props\":{\"color\":\"warning\",\"type\":\"note\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Starting \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"April 8th, 2025\"]},\" Flow versions 2.1, 3.0, 3.1, and 4.0 are now \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/flows\\\/guides\\\/versioning#states\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"frozen\"]},\". Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"April 8, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"gk\" value=\"wa_flows_apr_25_release\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-04-08\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Froze Flow JSON versions 2.1 through 4.0 and added support for Flows with other buttons in message templates.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/april_8_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cgk project=\"wa_extensions_beta_doc\">\n  \u003Coc-devui-note color=\"warning\">\n    \u003Cp>Starting \u003Cstrong>April 8th, 2025\u003C\/strong> Flow versions 2.1, 3.0, 3.1, and 4.0 are now \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/versioning#states\">frozen\u003C\/a> and versions 100 and 110 are \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/versioning#states\">expired\u003C\/a>. Please upgrade Flows on these versions to the recommended version to avoid any disruption.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/oc-devui-note>\n\n\u003C\/gk>\n\n\u003Cgk project=\"wa_extensions_beta_doc\" exclude=\"true\">\n  \u003Coc-devui-note color=\"warning\">\n    \u003Cp>Starting \u003Cstrong>April 8th, 2025\u003C\/strong> Flow versions 2.1, 3.0, 3.1, and 4.0 are now \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/versioning#states\">frozen\u003C\/a>. Please upgrade Flows on these versions to the recommended version, to avoid any disruption.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/oc-devui-note>\n\n\u003C\/gk>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"message-template-updates\">Message template updates\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Flows can now be sent with other buttons in message templates\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nYou can now send message templates with a Flow and \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/templates\/components#buttons\" target=\"_blank\">other types of buttons as part of the same message\u003C\/a>.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nAn icon can now be selected for different types of Flows, and a default icon will be displayed if none is selected. This will not affect templates that have already been sent.\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nYou can create message templates from \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/business.facebook.com\/latest\/whatsapp_manager\/\" target=\"_blank\">WhatsApp Manager\u003C\/a> or directly via \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowsapi\" target=\"_blank\">API\u003C\/a>.\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27190765103896060","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1744095600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/typing-indicators\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"typing indicators\"]},\" so you can let WhatsApp users know that you are preparing a response.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"April 1, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Marketing Messages\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-04-01\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"MM Lite is now in Open Beta with self-signup for all partners and global availability.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/april_1_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>MM Lite API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>MM lite is now in Open Beta\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>With this update, MM lite has:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Cstrong>Self-signup for all partners and businesses\u003C\/strong>. All businesses and solution providers (including Solution Partners, Tech Providers and Tech Partners) can now use self-serve onboarding flows to onboard to MM Lite API. See documentation on \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/onboarding\">Onboarding\u003C\/a> for more details.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Cstrong>Global availability\u003C\/strong>. MM Lite API is now available in all regions where Cloud API is also available. Note that while the API is available, some geographic variation of features may apply, \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/get-started#geographic-availability-of-features\">see details here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"25074472752148251","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1251763483575878","display_name_fbt":"Marketing Messages","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1743490800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Pricing\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Lowered \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/pricing\\\/authentication-international-rates\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"authentication-international pricing rates\"]},\" for Egypt, Nigeria, Pakistan, and South Africa.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"March 27, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Marketing Messages, message_templates\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-03-27\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Updated character and emoji limits in the body component of marketing templates for improved performance.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/march_27_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>MM Lite API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Updates to character and emoji limits in Templates\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>This update applies across all Templates on the Business Messaging API, and is not specific to MM Lite API (also applies on Cloud API).\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>As part of our ongoing efforts to improve the performance and user experience of our messaging platform, we are introducing changes to the body component of marketing templates via Cloud API and MM Lite API. These changes will impact the character limits and emoji usage in the body component, depending on the format and tag of the template.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Key Updates\u003C\/strong>:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Character limits for the body component will vary based on the template format and tag\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>The number of emojis allowed in the body component may also be limited.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>These updates are designed to enhance the performance and user experience of our messaging platform. While these changes may require some adjustments to your template creation process, they can ultimately lead to better performance and engagement with your customers.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"24911513405205603","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1251763483575878","display_name_fbt":"Marketing This feature allows the label to be positioned above the input field, accommodating up to 4 lines of text for improved readability and user experience.\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Update to on-select-action behaviour\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nIn Flow JSON version 6.0, we introduced a breaking change that triggered the on-select-action at the component level when a new screen was rendered. This same functionality is present in Flow JSON versions 6.1, 6.2, and 6.3. \",{\"type\":\"GalaxyHtmlBr\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nReversion of this Change: We are reverting this change in Flow JSON version 7.0. From this version onwards, if an on-select-action is present on the component level, it will not be triggered when a new screen is rendered. This behavior is identical to that of Flow JSON versions 5.1 and older.\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Form validations introduced for init-values and error-messages\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nWe've introduced type checking for \",{\"type\":\"GalaxySharedI\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"init-values\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"GalaxySharedI\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"error-messages\"]},\" properties in the Form component. This ensures that values match the expected types where they're used.\",{\"type\":\"GalaxyHtmlBr\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},\"\\nFor example, a TextInput with input-type=\\\"number\\\" will only accept numeric init-values. Non-numeric values will trigger an error message.\\n\",{\"type\":\"GalaxyHtmlBr\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxySharedI.react"},"name":"GalaxySharedI"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHtmlBr.react"},"name":"GalaxyHtmlBr"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"March 11, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"gk\" value=\"wa_flows_mar_25_release\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-03-11\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Released Flow JSON version 7.0 with large label variant, on-select-action behavior reversion, and form validation improvements.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/march_11_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>Flow JSON version \u003Cstrong>7.0\u003C\/strong> is now available with component improvements.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"component-updates-flow-json-version-70\">Component updates (Flow JSON Version 7.0)\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">New property \u201clabel-variant\u201d on TextArea and TextInput\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nYou can now utilize the \u003Ci>label-variant: 'large'\u003C\/i> attribute to display a large label on TextArea or TextInput components. This feature allows the label to be positioned above the input field, accommodating up to 4 lines of text for improved readability and user experience.\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Update to on-select-action behaviour\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nIn Flow JSON version 6.0, we introduced a breaking change that triggered the on-select-action at the component level when a new screen was rendered. This same functionality is present in Flow JSON versions 6.1, 6.2, and 6.3. \u003Cbr\/>\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nReversion of this Change: We are reverting this change in Flow JSON version 7.0. From this version onwards, if an on-select-action is present on the component level, it will not be triggered when a new screen is rendered. This behavior is identical to that of Flow JSON versions 5.1 and older.\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Form validations introduced for init-values and error-messages\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nWe've introduced type checking for \u003Ci>init-values\u003C\/i> and \u003Ci>error-messages\u003C\/i> properties in the Form component. This ensures that values match the expected types where they're used.\u003Cbr\/>\nFor example, a TextInput with input-type=\"number\" will only accept numeric init-values. Non-numeric values will trigger an error message.\n\u003Cbr\/>\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26951935957751429","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1740643200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"App Only \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"text\"]},\",  and flow identifier \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"flow_id\\\/flow_name\\\/flow_json\"]},\" need to be provided for Flow \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"button\"]},\". The rest of the parameters are now optional.\\n\\n\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHtmlBr.react"},"name":"GalaxyHtmlBr"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"January 14, 2025\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2025-01-14\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Released Flow JSON version 6.3 with Chips Selector component, RichText footer support, and simplified Flow APIs.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/january_14_2025.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>This release includes the latest Flow JSON version, \u003Cstrong>6.3\u003C\/strong>, with a new component and tooling improvements.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"component-updates-flow-json-version-63\">Component updates (Flow JSON version 6.3)\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#chips_selector\" target=\"_blank\">Chips selector component\u003C\/a>\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nThe Chips Selector component simplifies tasks, such as selecting preferences or time slots, by presenting options in a compact and interactive format.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Footer supported with RichText component\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nThe RichText component can now be used in conjunction with the Footer component on the same screen, allowing the Flow to navigate from or end at a screen that includes RichText.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cgk project=\"wa_flows_api_improvements\">\n  \u003Ch4 id=\"developer-tooling-improvements\">Developer tooling improvements\u003C\/h4>\n  \u003Cp>Some Flow APIs have been simplified, making them easier to create and send:\u003C\/p>\n\n  \u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Published Flow can be created in a single API call\u003C\/h4>\n  \u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nTwo new optional parameters (\u003Ccode>flow_json\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>publish\u003C\/code>) are now available in the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowsapi#create\" target=\"_blank\">Create Flow API\u003C\/a> call, which allow you to provide the Flow JSON and publish the new Flow immediately. Previously, at least three API calls were required (Create Flow, Update Flow JSON, and Publish Flow).\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\n  \u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n  \u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Simplified send Flow API call\u003C\/h4>\n  \u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nThe \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/sendingaflow#userinitiated\" target=\"_blank\">number of required parameters for sending a Flow has decreased\u003C\/a>. You now only need to specify \u003Ccode>flow_message_version\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>flow_cta\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>flow_id\/flow_name\u003C\/code>. The rest of the parameters are now optional.\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\n  \u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n  \u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Simplified creation of message template with a Flow\u003C\/h4>\n  \u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nSimilarly, the number of required parameters has decreased for \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/sendingaflow#create-a-message-template-with-a-flow\" target=\"_blank\">creation of message template with a Flow\u003C\/a>. Only \u003Ccode>text\u003C\/code>,  and flow identifier \u003Ccode>flow_id\/flow_name\/flow_json\u003C\/code> need to be provided for Flow \u003Ccode>button\u003C\/code>. The rest of the parameters are now optional.\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003C\/gk>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"35650393614607800","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1736236800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Multi-Partner Solutions\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added ability to migrate business customers off of Multi-Partner Solutions \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/solution-providers\\\/support\\\/migrating-customers-off-solutions-via-embedded-signup\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"via Embedded Signup\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/solution-providers\\\/support\\\/migrating-customers-off-solutions-via-meta-business-suite\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"via Meta Business Suite\"]},\". Both methods skip business phone number re-verification.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"app_id\"]},\" parameter to the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/reference\\\/whatsapp-business-account\\\/set-solution-migration-intent-api#Creating\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"POST \\\/\\u003CWHATSAPP_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT>\\\/set_solution_migration_intent\"]},\" endpoint to allow for migration off of Multi-Partner Solutions.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Both methods skip business phone number re-verification.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Added \u003Ccode>app_id\u003C\/code> parameter to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account\/set-solution-migration-intent-api#Creating\">POST \/&lt;WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT&gt;\/set_solution_migration_intent\u003C\/a> endpoint to allow for migration off of Multi-Partner Each list item enables navigation and can display a range of content, including text, images, and tags, making it easy for users to move between different screens in the Flow.\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHtmlBr\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false}]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Regular expressions supported in TextInput component\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nIntroduced a new pattern property to enable regular expression validation for \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/flows\\\/guides\\\/components#textinput\",\"isMuted\":false,\"target\":\"_blank\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"text inputs\"]},\" with input-type as text, password, passcode and number.\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHtmlBr\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false}]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"developer-tooling-improvements\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Developer tooling improvements\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"This release also adds some features to the API, and makes some of those available on the Builder:\"]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Published Flows can be edited from the Builder\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nAll new Flows could be edited from the API since November, and now they can also be edited from the Flows Builder on WhatsApp Manager. here.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHtmlBr\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false}]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Flow previews can be shared from the Builder\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nA new share button will generate the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/flows\\\/guides\\\/flowsapi#preview\",\"isMuted\":false,\"target\":\"_blank\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"preview URL\"]},\" without the need to use the existing API, so it can be shared with other users and embedded as an iframe into other applications.\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHtmlBr\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false}]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"New Flow JSON deprecation webhooks\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nIntroducing \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/flows\\\/guides\\\/flowswebhooks#versionwarning\",\"isMuted\":false,\"target\":\"_blank\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"new or expired\"]},\". These warnings will also be visible on the Builder.\\n\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHtmlBr.react"},"name":"GalaxyHtmlBr"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"December 10, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-12-10\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Released Flow JSON version 6.2 with NavigationList component, regex validation for TextInput, and Flow migration API.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/december_10_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\u003Cp>This release introduces a new Flow JSON version with a new component and several tooling improvements.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"component-updates-flow-json-version-62\">Component updates (Flow JSON version 6.2)\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#navlist\" target=\"_blank\">NavigationList component\u003C\/a>\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nThe Navigation list offers a user-friendly way to explore multiple options within a Flow. Each list item enables navigation and can display a range of content, including text, images, and tags, making it easy for users to move between different screens in the Flow.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Regular expressions supported in TextInput component\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nIntroduced a new pattern property to enable regular expression validation for \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#textinput\" target=\"_blank\">text inputs\u003C\/a> with input-type as text, password, passcode and number.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"developer-tooling-improvements\">Developer tooling improvements\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cp>This release also adds some features to the API, and makes some of those available on the Builder:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Published Flows can be edited from the Builder\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nAll new Flows could be edited from the API since November, and now they can also be edited from the Flows Builder on WhatsApp Manager. This enables changes to be made directly within the same Flow, allowing messages to be sent with the updated content using the same Flow ID, eliminating the need to recreate the Flow.\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">API to migrate (copy) Flows from one WABA to another\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nFlows can be migrated from one WhatsApp Business account (WABA) to another owned by the same business. Migration doesn't move the source Flows, it creates copies of them with the same names in the destination WABA.  \n\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowsapi#migrate\" target=\"_blank\">migration API documentation\u003C\/a> and included in \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/www.postman.com\/meta\/whatsapp-business-platform\/request\/unjqd6w\/migrate-flows\" target=\"_blank\">the Flows API Postman collection.\u003C\/a>\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Endpoint encryption examples in C# &amp; Go\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nExample code is now available for Flows endpoint \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/github.com\/WhatsApp\/WhatsApp-Flows-Tools\/tree\/main\/examples\/endpoint\/csharp\/FlowsEndpoint\" target=\"_blank\">in C# here\u003C\/a> and\n\u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/github.com\/WhatsApp\/WhatsApp-Flows-Tools\/tree\/main\/examples\/endpoint\/go\/flows-endpoint\" target=\"_blank\">in Go here.\u003C\/a>\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Flow previews can be shared from the Builder\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nA new share button will generate the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowsapi#preview\" target=\"_blank\">preview URL\u003C\/a> without the need to use the existing API, so it can be shared with other users and embedded as an iframe into other applications.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">New Flow JSON deprecation webhooks\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nIntroducing \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowswebhooks#versionwarning\" target=\"_blank\">new webhooks\u003C\/a> when the Flow version is about to be \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/versioning#version-support-and-lifecycle\" target=\"_blank\">frozen or expired\u003C\/a>. These warnings will also be visible on the Builder.\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26983701917923585","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1733817600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Embedded Signup\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/embedded-signup\\\/overview#sandbox-accounts\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Sandbox accounts\"]},\" for easier testing of the Embedded Signup flow.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"November 18, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Marketing Messages\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-11-18\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Reduced sync and async delivery latency for MM Lite API from 12 seconds to 9 seconds at p99.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/november_18_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>MM Lite API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Reduced sync and async latency\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>MM Lite team has quickly responded to feedback on \u201casync\u201d or \u201cdelivery\u201d latency. This is defined as the time between an API call being received by MM Lite API, and MM Lite API dispatching a \u201cdelivered\u201d webhook, assuming a user is online when the message is sent.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>MM Lite previously had a p99 \u201casync\u201d delivery time of 12s, vs. p99 of 5s on Cloud API. This time has now been reduced to 9s. No action is required on a business or partner\u2019s part.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"32426584330273420","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1251763483575878","display_name_fbt":"Marketing messages, new webhook field, and error code 131050 for non-delivery due to user preferences.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" Lite API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"New easier onboarding flow, will also alternatively be able to initiate the following flow:\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonOl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Call an \\u2018Intent API\\u2019 endpoint to indicate a BMID the partner wishes to assist in migrating to MM Lite. (If a BMID contains any OBO WABAs, these must be migrated to \\u2018shared\\u2019 prior to this event).\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Admins of that BMID will receive a notification that they have been invited to start sending marketing messages with optimizations via MM Lite.  This notification is in Business Manager and via email.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Once accepted, and MM Lite setup and Ad account syncing is complete, a webhook will be triggered to the partner and all subscribers indicating that MM Lite onboarding is complete, and including the linked Ad IDs.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"The partner may now call the \\u201csend\\u201d endpoint of MM Lite on this business\\u2019 behalf, and call an API to fetch an updated token with permission to access the business\\u2019 Ad account metrics.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"See API docs for details on this new onboarding flow.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonOl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonOl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"November 15, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Marketing Messages\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-11-15\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"New easier onboarding flow for partner-managed businesses using Intent API as an alternative to Embedded Signup.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/november_15_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>MM Lite API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>New easier onboarding flow, for partner-managed businesses\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>MM Lite is rolling out a new way for partners to guide a business through signing the MM Lite Terms of Service and moving to MM Lite.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>In parallel with the Embedded Signup flow already available, a partner will also alternatively be able to initiate the following flow:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Col>\n  \u003Cli>Call an \u2018Intent API\u2019 endpoint to indicate a BMID the partner wishes to assist in migrating to MM Lite. (If a BMID contains any OBO WABAs, these must be migrated to \u2018shared\u2019 prior to this event).\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Admins of that BMID will receive a notification that they have been invited to start sending marketing messages with optimizations via MM Lite.  This notification is in Business Manager and via email.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Once accepted, and MM Lite setup and Ad account syncing is complete, a webhook will be triggered to the partner and all subscribers indicating that MM Lite onboarding is complete, and including the linked Ad IDs.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>The partner may now call the \u201csend\u201d endpoint of MM Lite on this business\u2019 behalf, and call an API to fetch an updated token with permission to access the business\u2019 Ad account metrics.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ol>\n\n\u003Cp>See API docs for details on this new onboarding flow.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"24905266492446836","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1251763483575878","display_name_fbt":"Marketing These external links will open in the device's default browser.\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHtmlBr\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false}]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{\"id\":\"developer-tooling-improvements\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Developer tooling improvements\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We are introducing a new page within the Builder, and improvements to the API and onboarding through the UI:\"]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Business insights\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nStatistics on how consumers interact with your Flows can now be found on the builder on published Flows. These metrics help track Flow performance and reveal usage trends, including the count of user interactions with Flows.\\n\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHtmlBr\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false}]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperDMCDocsH4\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/flows\\\/guides\\\/lifecycle\",\"isMuted\":false,\"target\":\"_blank\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Published Flows can now be edited\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\nAll new Flows can be edited by updating their metadata or Flow JSON via API, even after they have been published. To send and publish a Flow, business verification and high message quality are still \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/flows\\\/gettingstarted#prerequisites\",\"isMuted\":false,\"target\":\"_blank\"},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"required\"]},\".\\n\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHtmlBr.react"},"name":"GalaxyHtmlBr"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonDiv.react"},"name":"DMCCommonDiv"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"November 12, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-11-12\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Released Flow JSON versions 6.0 and 6.1 with CalendarPicker component, nested expressions, update_data action, and published Flow editing.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/november_12_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\u003Cp>We are releasing 2 new Flow JSON versions, alongside some exciting tooling improvements:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"component-updates-flow-json-version-61\">Component updates (Flow JSON Version 6.1)\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#calendarpicker\" target=\"_blank\">CalendarPicker component\u003C\/a>\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nNew component that allows users to select a single date or a range of dates from a more user-friendly full calendar view making it easier to navigate dates and visualize date availability.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"flow-json-version-60\">Flow JSON Version 6.0\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cdiv>\nVersion 6.0 introduces three backwards incompatible changes:\n\u003C\/div>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px\">\nString values in component properties can't be empty. Previously values such as \u201c\u201d, \u201c \u201c, \u201c\\n\u201d, \u201c\\t\u201d, \u201c\\n\u201d were accepted; from version 6.0 these are no longer valid.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px\">\nMaximum image size for list components (Checkbox Group, Radio Buttons Group, Dropdown) is reduced from 300KB to 100KB.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px\">\nIf on-select-action is present on the component level, it will be triggered when the new screen is rendered, whether via cache or back-and-forth navigation.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>This new version is fully available now, and introduces the following new features:\u003C\/p>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowjson#nested_expressions\" target=\"_blank\">Nested Expressions and string concatenation in component properties\u003C\/a>\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nBoolean expressions and string concatenation can now be used in component properties. Expressions can combine static and dynamic data.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowjson#update-data-action\" target=\"_blank\">New update_data action\u003C\/a>\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nA new action has been added to support dynamic updates of the current screen based on user interactions. This action can be used to update elements on the same screen in response to user inputs, handle dynamic data relationships, promote reusable templates, and more.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">New on-unselect-action property\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nA new property has been added to several \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components\" target=\"_blank\">components\u003C\/a> that works similarly to the existing on-select-action but will allow  changes made by the update_data operation in the on-select-action to be reverted.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">OptIn and EmbeddedLink can now open external links\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nA new action \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowjson#open-url-action\" target=\"_blank\">open_url\u003C\/a> can be used in on-click-action to open external links in Flows from EmbeddedLink and OptIn components. These external links will open in the device's default browser.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"developer-tooling-improvements\">Developer tooling improvements\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cp>We are introducing a new page within the Builder, and improvements to the API and onboarding through the UI:\u003C\/p>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Business insights\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nStatistics on how consumers interact with your Flows can now be found on the builder on published Flows. These metrics help track Flow performance and reveal usage trends, including the count of user interactions with Flows.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/lifecycle\" target=\"_blank\">Published Flows can now be edited\u003C\/a>\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nAll new Flows can be edited by updating their metadata or Flow JSON via API, even after they have been published. This enables changes to be made directly within the same Flow, allowing messages to be sent with the updated content using the same Flow ID, eliminating the need to recreate the Flow.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Simplified Flows onboarding\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nAll businesses can now start creating and building Flows. To send and publish a Flow, business verification and high message quality are still \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/gettingstarted#prerequisites\" target=\"_blank\">required\u003C\/a>.\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"35938847005728908","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1731398400,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added  \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/reference\\\/whatsapp-business-account\\\/set-solution-migration-intent-api#Creating\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"POST business customers\"]},\" from one Solution Partner and Multi-Partner Solution to another Solution Partner and Multi-Partner recommend you integrate with the Marketing API \\u201cInsights API\\u201d for MM Lite Metrics, and encourage end businesses to log into Ads Manager UI to see their metrics, instead of using the Ads Mgr UI and Insights API show conversion metrics that are not available on WhatsApp surfaces, and will continue to support new metrics and features as the primary surface for MM Lite API reporting as the API grows.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"API docs for partners have been updated to reflect how to fetch MM Lite metrics via API.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"API docs have been updated to reflect how to fetch MM Lite metrics via API, see \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/whatsapp\\\/marketing-messages-lite-api\\\/viewing-metrics\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Viewing metrics\"]},\".\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonOl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonOl"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DEVHorizonImg.react"},"name":"DEVHorizonImg"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonDiv.react"},"name":"DMCCommonDiv"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"November 1, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Marketing Messages\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-11-01\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"MM Lite API metrics are now available in Ads Manager, WhatsApp Manager, and via API including Marketing API and Business Management API.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/november_1_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>MM Lite API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Metrics in WhatsApp Manager\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>To represent this new conversation type, MM Lite API conversations are available in every surface where reporting is offered:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Col>\n  \u003Cli>Ads Manager UI [recommended]\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Marketing API \u201cInsights API\u201d [recommended]\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>WhatsApp Manager UI \u201cWABA Insights\u201d page and \u201cTemplate Insights\u201d page\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Business Management API\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Pricing webhooks\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ol>\n\n\u003Cp>For full details on how to see MM Lite API metrics via API and in pricing webhooks, consult  the MM Lite API docs.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>In the Marketing API \u201cInsights API\u201d response, MM Lite events can be return using fields named \u003Ccode>marketing_messages_[event]\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>In the Business Management API \u201cTemplate Analytics\u201d endpoint, MM Lite events can be returned using the query parameter \u003Ccode>MARKETING_MESSAGES_LITE_API\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>In the Business Management API \u201cConversation Analytics\u201d endpoints, MM Lite events can be returned using the \u003Ccode>product_type\u003C\/code> query parameter `MARKETING_LITE\u2019\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>In message status webhooks, the \u003Ccode>conversation:origin:type\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>pricing:category\u003C\/code> fields will show as \u003Ccode>marketing_lite\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>Businesses can now see MM Lite metrics as \u201cMarketing - lite\u201d in the WhatsApp Manager UI:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cdiv style=\"display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center;\">\n\u003Cimg handle=\"GDC5Xhzw0VNCBosDABa_GFzRiWhhbj0JAAAD\" width=\"800\"\/>\n\u003C\/div>\n\n\u003Cp>We recommend you integrate with the Marketing API \u201cInsights API\u201d for MM Lite Metrics, and encourage end businesses to log into Ads Manager UI to see their metrics, instead of using the WhatsApp business surface.  Ads Mgr UI and Insights API show conversion metrics that are not available on WhatsApp surfaces, and will continue to support new metrics and features as the primary surface for MM Lite API reporting as the API grows.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>API docs for partners have been updated to reflect how to fetch MM Lite metrics via API.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>API docs have been updated to reflect how to fetch MM Lite metrics via API, see \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages-lite-api\/viewing-metrics\">Viewing metrics\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"25392613663697818","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1251763483575878","display_name_fbt":"Marketing Messages","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1730271600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"MM Lite API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Exclusive feature: TTLs for Marketing messages\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We continue to invest to improve consumer experiences and business outcomes. We are introducing customizable message validity periods (time-to-live or TTL) for marketing messages on MM Lite API, to ensure marketing messages are always timely and relevant for users thus performant for businesses. We are also updating our customizable range for TTL for utility and authentication templates, to provide businesses more control and flexibility.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Marketing: From 12 hours to 30 days, for businesses on MM Lite API\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Utility: From 30 seconds to 12 hours, for businesses on Cloud API\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Authentication: From 30 seconds to 15 minutes, for businesses on Cloud API or On-Premises API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Businesses can customize the TTL of marketing, utility and authentication templates during template creation via WhatsApp Manager (via pre-set increments) and via API (in 1-second increments). This is reflected in our \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/templates\\\/overview#time-to-live--customization-and-defaults\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"dev docs\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"https:\\\/\\\/www.facebook.com\\\/business\\\/help\\\/1305007343713790\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Business Help Center\"]},\".\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 30, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Marketing Messages, message_templates\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-10-30\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Introducing customizable message validity periods (TTL) for marketing, utility, and authentication messages.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/marketing-messages\/october_30_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>MM Lite API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Exclusive feature: TTLs for Marketing messages\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>We continue to invest to improve consumer experiences and business outcomes. We are introducing customizable message validity periods (time-to-live or TTL) for marketing messages on MM Lite API, to ensure marketing messages are always timely and relevant for users thus performant for businesses. We are also updating our customizable range for TTL for utility and authentication templates, to provide businesses more control and flexibility.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Marketing: From 12 hours to 30 days, for businesses on MM Lite API\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Utility: From 30 seconds to 12 hours, for businesses on Cloud API\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Authentication: From 30 seconds to 15 minutes, for businesses on Cloud API or On-Premises API\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>Businesses can customize the TTL of marketing, utility and authentication templates during template creation via WhatsApp Manager (via pre-set increments) and via API (in 1-second increments). This is reflected in our \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/templates\/overview#time-to-live--customization-and-defaults\">dev docs\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/www.facebook.com\/business\/help\/1305007343713790\">Business Help Center\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"31852872477690246","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1251763483575878","display_name_fbt":"Marketing Messages","is_active":true},{"id":"1237234275252086","display_name_fbt":"Message Templates","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1728975600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"MM Lite API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"New rate cards and pricing category for MM Lite\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Marketing message conversations initiated via MM Lite API are counted and billed separately from Marketing message conversations initiated via Cloud API.  This includes updates to pricing webhooks. name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-10-08\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Added Flow name referencing in API, Flow JSON support in Message Templates API, and dedicated endpoint setup in Builder.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/october_8_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\u003Cp>We are adding some tooling improvements to both the API and Flows Builder.\u003C\/p>\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/sendingaflow#sending-a-flow\" target=\"_blank\">Flows can be referenced by name using the API\u003C\/a>\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nFlow messages can be sent using the Flow's name instead of its ID, which is useful when you have clones of the same Flow in multiple WhatsApp Business Accounts with different Flow IDs.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nYou can also create a message template with a Flow using the Flow's name.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Flow JSON can be used when creating Message Templates through the API\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px\">\nIt is now possible to provide Flow JSON as part of the request payload when \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flows-templates\" target=\"_blank\">creating Message Templates with a Flow attached\u003C\/a>, so you don't need to create and publish a Flow as a previous step.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Endpoint setup on Flows builder has a dedicated section\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;\">\nFlows with endpoint can be configured on a dedicated tab at the bottom of the Flows builder. Other endpoint-related features can also be found there, such as snippets and links to the documentation.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27324701043804836","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1727852400,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud
