Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 2, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"message_templates, Phone Number Registration\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-10-02\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Updated authentication template requirements for v21.0 and changed local storage configuration to use settings endpoint.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/october_2_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Starting with version 21.0 the \u003Ccode>package_name\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>signature_hash\u003C\/code> parameters must be defined within the \u003Ccode>supported_apps\u003C\/code> array when creating \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/templates\/authentication-templates\/autofill-button-authentication-templates#post-body\">one-tap autofill\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/templates\/authentication-templates\/zero-tap-authentication-templates#post-body\">zero-tap\u003C\/a> authentication templates.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Starting with version 21.0, to enable \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/local-storage\">local storage\u003C\/a> on a business phone number, the number must be in an unregistered state, and you must use the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/settings-api#Updating\">\u003Cstrong>POST \/&lt;WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_PHONE_NUMBER&gt;\/settings\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/a> endpoint to enable local storage before registering the number (instead of enabling during registration). To support these changes:\n    \u003Cul>\n      \u003Cli>Added a \u003Ccode>storage_configuration\u003C\/code> parameter to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/settings-api#Updating\">\u003Cstrong>POST \/&lt;WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_PHONE_NUMBER&gt;\/settings\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/a> endpoint, which can be used to enable or disable local storage.\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>Removed the \u003Ccode>data_localization_region\u003C\/code> parameter from the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/register-api#Creating\">\u003Cstrong>POST \/&lt;WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_PHONE_NUMBER&gt;\/register\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/a> endpoint.\u003C\/li>\n    \u003C\/ul>\n  \u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"25484863571121131","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1237234275252086","display_name_fbt":"Message  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"September 16, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-09-16\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Introduced Flow JSON version 5.1 with RichText component, interactive web preview, and increased endpoint payload limit.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/september_16_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\u003Ch4 id=\"new-flow-json-version---51\">New Flow JSON version - 5.1\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cp>We are introducing a new Flow JSON version which contains a new component and several enhancements.\u003C\/p>\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#richtext\" target=\"_blank\">RichText component\u003C\/a>\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nYou can use this component to render text with rich formatting options. The following markdown syntax is supported:\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cdiv style=\"padding-left:90px\">\n- Heading and Subheading\n\u003C\/div>\n\u003Cdiv style=\"padding-left:90px\">\n- Text formatting (italic, bold, strikethrough)\n\u003C\/div>\n\u003Cdiv style=\"padding-left:90px\">\n- Basic lists\n\u003C\/div>\n\u003Cdiv style=\"padding-left:90px\">\n- Links\n\u003C\/div>\n\u003Cdiv style=\"padding-left:90px\">\n- Images\n\u003C\/div>\n\u003Cdiv style=\"padding-left:90px\">\n- Tables\n\u003C\/div>\n\u003C\/p>\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#text\" target=\"_blank\">TextBody and TextCaption\u003C\/a> can use markdown\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nA new property \"markdown\" can be used with both components, which allows to use a subset of the RichText capabilities.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/p>\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Flow termination message has a new look\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nSMBs are now able to view the responses received for Flows completion and download them in CSV format. Consumers will soon also be able to view the information submitted when completing the Flow.\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nIn Flow JSON, \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowjson#additional-information-on-sensitive-fields\" target=\"_blank\">certain fields can now be marked as \"sensitive\"\u003C\/a> so that data for those fields is not visible as part of the response details displayed to the user.\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"developer-tooling-improvements\">Developer tooling improvements\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cp>We are making it easier to preview Flows and integrate into existing websites.\u003C\/p>\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowsapi#preview\" target=\"_blank\">Web preview\u003C\/a> now can be used in interactive mode and inside an iframe\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nThe preview URL can be configured with new parameters to make it interactive and show a debug panel. It works with Flows with and without an endpoint.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;text-indent:30px\">\nIt can also be embedded as an iframe, so it can be integrated into an existing website.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"flows-data-endpoint-improvements\">Flows data endpoint improvements\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:25px\">\nWe have increased the payload limit of the Flows data endpoint to 10MB, allowing for the transmission of multiple images to screens using list (\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#radio\" target=\"_blank\">RadioButtonsGroup\u003C\/a>, \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#checkbox\" target=\"_blank\">CheckboxGroup\u003C\/a>, \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#drop\" target=\"_blank\">Dropdown\u003C\/a>) and \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#richtext\" target=\"_blank\">RichText\u003C\/a> components.\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26358050593877766","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1726038000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"August 13, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-08-13\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Launched Flow JSON version 5.0 with images and colors in pickers, increased media upload limits, and new development guides.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/august_13_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\u003Ch4 id=\"new-flow-json-version---50\">New Flow JSON version - 5.0\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cp>This release introduces a new Flow JSON version which contains several enhancements. This is the recommended version to use if you are creating a new Flow.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Upgrading Flows to version 5.0 from 4.0: Version 5.0 introduces a backwards incompatible change:\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>All \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#dp\">DatePicker\u003C\/a> components now receive and set dates in \u201cYYYY-MM-DD\u201d format, which makes the values unrelated to time zones (\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#datepicker-from-v5\">more details\u003C\/a>).\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>No additional changes are required to port a Flow from version 4.0 to 5.0, which will unlock your access to the following new functionality:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Images and colors are now available in Pickers\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px\">\nAdded support for displaying images and colors in list components (\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#radio\" target=\"_blank\">RadioButtonsGroup\u003C\/a>, \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#checkbox\" target=\"_blank\">CheckboxGroup\u003C\/a>, \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#drop\" target=\"_blank\">Dropdown\u003C\/a>).\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/media_upload\" target=\"_blank\">Media upload components\u003C\/a>: Increased limit for the number of media files sent as part of the response message\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px\">\nIt is now possible to have up to 10 media files sent as part of the response message, with the combined size of all files up to 100MB.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"developer-tooling-improvements\">Developer tooling improvements\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cp>This release introduces a few improvements to help developers onboard and debug Flows with endpoint.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">New health status endpoint for Flow Graph API\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px\">\nIt is now possible to query flow health status using new health_status field and get status of Flow health and other related entities like WABA, Business which are involved in message sending (\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowsapi#details\" target=\"_blank\">more details\u003C\/a>).\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">New templates and development guides\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px\">\nNew refined templates are now available in Flows Builder with dedicated development guides and endpoint templates ready to use.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px\">\nYou can find them under the Flow creation screen on WhatsApp Manager, or following the links below:\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:90px\">\n\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/gettingstarted\/pre-approved-loan\" target=\"_blank\">Pre-Approved Loan\u003C\/a>\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:90px\">\n\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/gettingstarted\/health-insurance\" target=\"_blank\">Health Insurance\u003C\/a>\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:90px\">\n\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/gettingstarted\/personalised-offer\" target=\"_blank\">Personalised offer\u003C\/a>\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:90px\">\n\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/gettingstarted\/purchase-intent\" target=\"_blank\">Purchased Intent\u003C\/a>\n\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/p>\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"padding-left:30px\">Improved error details for Flows with endpoint\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px\">\nMore detailed errors when using an endpoint are displayed on draft mode on mobile, and on the Builder in WhatsApp Manager to help with debugging.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27510958641842359","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1722495600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud debugger\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>You can now check the status of the endpoint of your Flow with this new health check validator, which allows easy troubleshooting of any issues with encryption or health check requests.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>You can find it on the endpoint setup modal within the Flows Builder in WhatsApp Manager.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"actions-debugger\">Actions debugger\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>A new panel is added to the existing Flows Builder in WhatsApp Manager, which allows viewing the data exchanged between the This means that Flow messages sent to users on such devices will not be delivered, and you  will receive a \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/webhooks\\\/overview#fields\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"webhook\"]},\" containing a \\u201cMessage Undeliverable\\u201d error. For more details on this error, please refer to the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/support\\\/error-codes#error-codes\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"error codes documentation.\"]}]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHtmlBr.react"},"name":"GalaxyHtmlBr"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"June 11, 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-06-11\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Launched Flow JSON version 4.0 with media upload, conditional rendering, global data access, and developer tooling improvements.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/june_11_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"new-flow-json-version---40\">New Flow JSON version - 4.0\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cp>We are introducing a new Flow JSON version which contains several enhancements (described in detail below). You can now create new Flows with this version to leverage the new functionality.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Upgrading Flows to version 4.0 from 3.1:\u003C\/em> Version 4.0 introduces two minor backwards incompatible changes, which means you may need to make some tweaks after cloning an existing version 3.1 Flow. Specifically:\u003C\/p>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;\">\nAll \u003Ccode>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#checkbox\">CheckboxGroup\u003C\/a>\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#radio\">RadioButtonsGroup\u003C\/a>\u003C\/code> components now require a \u003Ccode>label\u003C\/code> property (previously optional)\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:30px;\">\nThe \u003Ccode>name\u003C\/code> property for all \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components\">input and selection components\u003C\/a>  cannot be empty. Previously values such as \u201c\u201d, \u201c \u201c, \u201c\\n\u201d, \u201c\\t\u201d, \u201c\\n\u201d  were accepted; with version 4.0 these are no longer valid.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cp>\u003Cbr\/>\nNo additional changes are required to port your version 3.1 Flow to version 4.0, which will unlock your access to the following new functionality:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"text-indent:30px;\">[Component] Image and Document upload\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;\">\nNew \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/media_upload\">\u003Ccode>PhotoPicker\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>DocumentPicker\u003C\/code> components\u003C\/a>. These components allow users to share images and documents, respectively, within a Flow, leveraging the existing and familiar WhatsApp UX.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cbr\/>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"text-indent:30px;\">[Component] Group components \u003Ccode>label\u003C\/code> improvements\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;\">\nThe \u003Ccode>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#checkbox\">CheckboxGroup\u003C\/a>\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#radio\">RadioButtonsGroup\u003C\/a>\u003C\/code> components now support a higher character limit for the \u003Ccode>label\u003C\/code> property, and additionally support a new \u003Ccode>description\u003C\/code> property, which can be used to provide more information to users about the selection options.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cbr\/>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"text-indent:30px;\">[Comoponents] Conditional Component Rendering\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;\">\nYou can now show\/hide components, based on user input or Business data, without the need to trigger a \u003Ccode>data_exchange\u003C\/code> to your Flows Endpoint, by leveraging the \u003Ccode>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#if\">If\u003C\/a>\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#switch\">Switch\u003C\/a>\u003C\/code> Components within the Flow JSON.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cbr\/>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"text-indent:30px;\">[Flow JSON Capabilities] Global Dynamic Data Access\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;\">\nYou can now reference \u003Ccode>Form\u003C\/code> and dynamic data from any screen in the Flow JSON using \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowjson#global-data\">global accessor syntax\u003C\/a>. This means you no longer need to explicitly propagate data from screen-to-screen.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cbr\/>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"text-indent:30px;\">[Flow JSON Capabilities] Optional Form\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;\">\nThe use of the \u003Ccode>Form\u003C\/code> component is now \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowjson#forms-and-form-properties\">optional\u003C\/a>. This means that you can access user-entered data without the need to wrap your components inside a \u003Ccode>Form\u003C\/code> component.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/p>\n\u003C\/p>\n\u003Ch4 id=\"developer-tooling-improvements\">Developer Tooling Improvements\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cp>We are introducing several improvements to help developers onboard and use Flows.\u003C\/p>\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"text-indent:30px;\">[Developer Tools] Improved Flows Preview in the WhatsApp Manager Builder, and in Developer Docs\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;\">\nBetter\/snappier preview loading and saving performance.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;\">\nAbility to simulate iOS and dark theme modes.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;\">\nMobile-like bottom sheet experience within the Flows Builder editor, which displays Flow JSON error(s).\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003Cbr\/>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"text-indent:30px;\">[Developer Tools] Update Application linked to a Flow through the Flows API\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;\">\nAdded an optional application ID parameter to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowsapi#update\">Update Flow API request\u003C\/a>.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003Cbr\/>\n\n\u003Ch4 style=\"text-indent:30px;\">[Developer Tools] Send-Time validation of the screen name in \"navigate\" action\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;\">\nAdded validation of the \u003Ccode>screen\u003C\/code> parameter in the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/sendingaflow\">message payload at Flow message send time\u003C\/a> if the action is \u003Ccode>navigate\u003C\/code>: invalid screens (i.e. screens that are no defined in the Flow JSON, or screens which cannot act as a first screen) will be rejected, and an API error will be returned.\n\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/p>\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"improved-flows-experience-for-users\">Improved Flows experience for users\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cp>We are releasing several improvements to the UX of Flows. These changes are not tied to a Flow JSON version; that is, they will apply to any Flows being actively sent.\u003C\/p>\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"text-indent:30px;\">Progress Indicator\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px;\">\nWe have introduced a new feature to visually inform users about how much progress is left to complete the Flow. This is applicable for any Flows with more than one screen.\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003Cbr\/>\n\u003Ch4 style=\"text-indent:30px;\">Text Truncation improvements\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cli style=\"padding-left:60px; \">\nOptimized the character limit strategy for \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components\">components\u003C\/a> to maximize the amount of content displayed based on device resolution.\n\u003C\/li>\n\n\u003C\/p>\n\u003C\/p>\n\u003Ch4 id=\"stopping-whatsapp-flows-support-on-android-os-5xx\">Stopping WhatsApp Flows Support on Android OS 5.x.x\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cp>\n\u003Cp>\nAs announced in \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/changelogs#may-2024-release\">May\u003C\/a>, we have now stopped support for Flows on Android devices running OS 5.x.x and older. This means that Flow messages sent to users on such devices will not be delivered, and you  will receive a \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/webhooks\/overview#fields\">webhook\u003C\/a> containing a \u201cMessage Undeliverable\u201d error. For more details on this error, please refer to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/support\/error-codes#error-codes\">error codes documentation.\u003C\/a>\n\u003C\/p>\n\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27027214313539811","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1717225200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added ability to set a templates.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Business Management API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added automatic category updates to correct templates that are miscategorized according to our guidelines.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n For more details on error, please refer to the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/support\\\/error-codes#error-codes\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"error codes\"]},\".\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Additionally, starting from July 9th, 2024, users on Android OS 5.x.x devices will no longer be able to interact with any existing Flow messages.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"May 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-05-01\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Deprecated data_channel_uri field in favor of endpoint_uri and announced end of Android OS 5.x.x support for Flows.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/may_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"deprecating-data_channel_uri\">Deprecating \u003Ccode>data_channel_uri\u003C\/code>\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>v18.0 \/ Forward: New field \u003Ccode>endpoint_uri\u003C\/code> will be returned.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>v17.0 \/ Backwards: Old field \u003Ccode>data_channel_uri\u003C\/code> will be returned.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"stopping-whatsapp-flows-support--on-android-os-5xx\">Stopping WhatsApp Flows Support  on Android OS 5.x.x\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Starting June 11th, 2024, WhatsApp Flows will only be supported on Android OS 6.0 and newer versions. This means that businesses will no longer be able to send Flow messages to users with Android OS 5.x.x devices and will receive a \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/webhooks\/overview#fields\">webhook\u003C\/a> containing a \u201cMessage Undeliverable\u201d error when trying to do so. For more details on error, please refer to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/support\/error-codes#error-codes\">error codes\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Additionally, starting from July 9th, 2024, users on Android OS 5.x.x devices will no longer be able to interact with any existing Flow messages.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"35531282096519004","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1712732400,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud business phone numbers.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"April 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-04-01\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Extended opt-in component support in Flows UI builder with Read More screen functionality.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/april_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"support-the-opt-in-component-in-the-flows-ui-builder\">Support the Opt-in component in the Flows UI builder\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Extend the support of the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/gettingstarted\">opt-in component\u003C\/a> in the Message Templates in Flows UI editor to allow users to add and modify an additional \u201cRead More\u201d screen.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>This feature enables you to display additional information (for example, terms and conditions) on a separate screen instead of cluttering the main Flow screen. The users can now interact with the template before using it for creating a flow.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"exposing-updatedat-field\">Exposing \u201cUpdatedAt\u201d field\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>New field \u201cUpdatedAt\u201d exposed for the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowsapi\">GraphAPI\u003C\/a> endpoints.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>The field is updated for every flow when name, status, flow json, etc. changes.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>The field is returned with the GraphAPI endpoint and used on the WA Manager -&gt; Flows page.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"bugfix--form_name-will-be-removed-from-business-paylaod\">BugFix- \u201cform_name\u201d will be removed from business paylaod\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Bug fix for Android implementation where \u2018form_name\u2019 was unintentionally included in payload. If businesses are using this, then they may need to modify server implementations for a more sustainable setup.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"36803522432571810","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1707811200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Changed business phone number \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/business-phone-numbers\\\/registration\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"registration\\\/deregistration\"]},\" attempt limits to 10 requests per business number in a 72 hour moving window (was a one-week moving window).\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! The \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/flows\\\/gettingstarted\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"flow template can be found here\"]},\".\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Add an endpoint example in NodeJS that works with the \\u201cBook an Appointment\\u201d flow JSON end to end. The endpoint code is available on \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"https:\\\/\\\/github.com\\\/WhatsApp\\\/WhatsApp-Flows-Tools\\\/tree\\\/main\\\/examples\\\/endpoint\\\/nodejs\\\/book-appointment\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"GitHub\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"https:\\\/\\\/glitch.com\\\/edit\\\/#!\\\/whatsapp-flows-appointment\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Glitch\"]},\".\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Enhance the endpoint example on \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"https:\\\/\\\/github.com\\\/WhatsApp\\\/WhatsApp-Flows-Tools\\\/tree\\\/main\\\/examples\\\/endpoint\\\/nodejs\\\/basic\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"GitHub\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"https:\\\/\\\/glitch.com\\\/edit\\\/#!\\\/whatsapp-flows-endpoint\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Glitch\"]},\" to include app secret validation, endpoint error codes, script to create public\\\/private keys, and other improvements.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4.react"},"name":"DeveloperDMCDocsH4"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"February 2024\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2024-02-01\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Added endpoint performance details page, Monitoring API, send Flow via WhatsApp Manager, and appointment booking template.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/february_2024.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"details-page\">Details page\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Introduce a new details page that provides a clear overview of Flow endpoint performance, with data on availability, latency, requests, and errors.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>This page is available for published Flows with endpoint from the Flows Builder in WhatsApp Manager.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"monitoring-api\">Monitoring API\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Introduce a new \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/metrics_api\">Graph API\u003C\/a> field in WA Flow object named \u201cmetric\u201d which allows businesses to retrieve a set of endpoint related metrics.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"send-flow-via-whatsapp-manager\">Send flow via WhatsApp Manager\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Introduce a new feature in the Flows Builder that allows Flows to be sent directly via WhatsApp Manager. The functionality works only with phone numbers registered to Cloud API.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"new-flow-template-appointment-booking-template\">New flow template: appointment booking template\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Add a new flow JSON template \u201cBook an Appointment\u201d which can be used when creating a flow in Builder. The \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/gettingstarted\">flow template can be found here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Add an endpoint example in NodeJS that works with the \u201cBook an Appointment\u201d flow JSON end to end. The endpoint code is available on \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/github.com\/WhatsApp\/WhatsApp-Flows-Tools\/tree\/main\/examples\/endpoint\/nodejs\/book-appointment\">GitHub\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/glitch.com\/edit\/#!\/whatsapp-flows-appointment\">Glitch\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Enhance the endpoint example on \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/github.com\/WhatsApp\/WhatsApp-Flows-Tools\/tree\/main\/examples\/endpoint\/nodejs\/basic\">GitHub\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/glitch.com\/edit\/#!\/whatsapp-flows-endpoint\">Glitch\u003C\/a> to include app secret validation, endpoint error codes, script to create public\/private keys, and other improvements.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26795240203462832","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1706256000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Changed Cloud API template message delivery retry time-to-live from 24 hours to 30 days. API.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\"  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"introduces-support-for-flow-json-version-31\">Introduces support for Flow JSON version 3.1\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>Adds optional property \u003Ccode>success\u003C\/code> for \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowjson#screens\">terminal screens\u003C\/a> to indicate whether terminating on that screen results in a successful flow completion.\u003C\/p>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>Use the new \u003Ccode>endpoint_uri\u003C\/code> field instead of the deprecated \u003Ccode>data_channel_uri\u003C\/code>.\u003C\/p>\n The source code is also available on \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/github.com\/WhatsApp\/WhatsApp-Flows-Tools\/tree\/main\/examples\/endpoint\/nodejs\/basic\">GitHub\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"introduces-support-for-flow-json-version-30\">Introduces support for Flow JSON version 3.0\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Removes the \u003Ccode>data_channel_uri\u003C\/code> property from Flow JSON\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Introduces ability to specify Flow endpoint via \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowsapi#update\">API\u003C\/a> or WhatsApp Manager.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"whatsapp-manager-changes\">WhatsApp Manager changes\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Adds additional filtering options (by ID and status) on the listing page of Flows\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Adds support for \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/gettingstarted#flows-builder\">deleting\u003C\/a> and deprecating Flows\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Adds the ability to clone Flows\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"flows-in-message-templates\">Flows in message templates\u003C\/h4>\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Adds support for attaching images when creating and attaching Forms in Message Templates\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Adds new custom form starter template when creating and attaching Forms in Message Templates\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Ch4 id=\"api-changes\">API changes\u003C\/h4>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Introduces new \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowswebhooks#statuschange\">webhook sent at the flow creation\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Deprecates the \u003Ccode>data_channel_uri\u003C\/code> field in the Get Flow API request and \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowsapi#details\">replaces it with the \u003Ccode>endpoint_uri\u003C\/code> field\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27686081844328349","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1700467200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Business  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 2023\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2023-10-01\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Initial release of WhatsApp Flows with Flow JSON version 2.1 and Data API version 3.0.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/october_2023.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>Initial release of the WhatsApp Flows.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Introduces support for Flow JSON version 2.1\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cgk project=\"wa_extensions_beta_doc\">\n  \u003Cul>\n    \u003Cli>Flows without endpoints.\u003C\/li>\n    \u003Cli>Screen property \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowjson#additional-information-on-refresh-on-back\">refresh_on_back\u003C\/a> is false by default\u003C\/li>\n    \u003Cli>Footer is mandatory on terminal screen.\u003C\/li>\n    \u003Cli>on-click-action on terminal screen\u2019s footer must be either complete(data_channel_less flow) or data_exchange(data_channel or hybrid flow)\u003C\/li>\n    \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/flowjson#routing-rules\">Routing model\u003C\/a> updates\n      \u003Cul>\n        \u003Cli>An entry screen must exist in the routing model. Entry screen is a screen without any inbound edge.\u003C\/li>\n        \u003Cli>Routing model doesnt allow setting back route. For example, if business has  set A-&gt;B then they are not allowed to set B-&gt;A\u003C\/li>\n        \u003Cli>Non terminal screens can also set empty route in the routing model destination(A-&gt; [], where A is a non terminal screen)\u003C\/li>\n      \u003C\/ul>\n    \u003C\/li>\n    \u003Cli>SUCCESS is a reserved keyword and cannot be used as a screen id.\u003C\/li>\n    \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/components#dp\">DatePicker\u003C\/a> component API changed. Attributes and payload are now timestamps in milliseconds (Previously attributes were timestamp in seconds and payload was YYYY-MM-DD).\u003C\/li>\n    \u003Cli>Component appearance changed for TextInput, TextArea, Dropdown and CheckboxGroup (rows will be disabled when max number of options is selected)\u003C\/li>\n  \u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/gk>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Introduces support for Data Api version 3.0\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\u003Cgk project=\"wa_extensions_beta_doc\">\n  \u003Cul>\n    \u003Cli>Endpoint needs to be able to respond to \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/whatsapp-business-encryption#set-business-public-key\">Health check\u003C\/a> request before a flow could be published\u003C\/li>\n    \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/implementingyourflowendpoint#error_notification_request\">Error Notification Request\u003C\/a>\u003C\/li>\n    \u003Cli>Version parameter in the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/flows\/guides\/implementingyourflowendpoint#data_exchange_request\">data exchange request\u003C\/a> is semvar string from version 3.0 onwards.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/gk>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"27233915942872918","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1695798000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"WhatsApp Business Account, Phone Numbers, Phone Number Management\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2023-09-12\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Major update with authentication template improvements, WABA access levels, template migration, carousel templates, and throughput fields.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/september_12_2023.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Business Management API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>GET request responses on \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/templates\/authentication-templates\/authentication-templates\">authentication templates\u003C\/a> now include \u003Ccode>add_security_recommendation\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>code_expiration_minutes\u003C\/code> template components in \u003Ccode>component\u003C\/code> value.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Added new \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/get-started#whatsapp-business-account-control\">WhatsApp Business Account Access\u003C\/a> levels for more granular control.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>GET requests on \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account\/phone-number-management-api\">WhatsApp Business Account &gt; Phone Numbers\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account\/template-api\">WhatsApp Business Account &gt; Message Templates\u003C\/a> now return error code \u003Ccode>200\u003C\/code> if the user identified by token has not been granted appropriate \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/get-started#whatsapp-business-account-control\">WhatsApp Business Account Access\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Added \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/templates\/template-migration\">Template Migration\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Added \u003Ccode>throughput\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>platform_type\u003C\/code> fields to \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/whatsapp-business-account-phone-number-api\">WhatsApp Business Phone Numbers\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Added \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/business-management-api\/message-templates\/carousel-templates\">Carousel Templates\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>, \u003Cem>On-Premises API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/support\/migrating-from-onprem-to-cloud\">Migrating business phone numbers\u003C\/a> that have multiconnect running 2 or more shards from On-Premises API to Cloud API automatically upgrades the numbers to higher Cloud API throughput.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"25814057668181124","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1433251420972612","display_name_fbt":"Phone href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/embedded-signup\/overview\">Embedded Signup\u003C\/a> users:\n    \u003Cul>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ca Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"April 4, 2023\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"message_templates\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2023-04-04\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Template category migration completed with new validation rules, API response updates, and changes to free tier conversation eligibility.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/april_4_2023.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Business Management AI\u003C\/em>, \u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>, \u003Cem>On-Premises API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>The first template category migration is complete.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Category validation is now part of the template review process for \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/templates\/overview#create-message-templates\">newly created templates\u003C\/a>. Applies to version v16.0+.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>API responses to \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/templates\/overview\">template creation or editing\u003C\/a> requests now include template status and template category. Applies to all API versions.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Added \u003Ccode>allow_category_change\u003C\/code> parameter to \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account\/template-api#post-version-waba-id-message-templates\">POST WhatsApp Business Account &gt; Message Templates\u003C\/a> endpoint.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Added \u003Ccode>INCORRECT_CATEGORY\u003C\/code> as a new rejection \u003Ccode>reason\u003C\/code> value for \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/webhooks\/overview\">template status webhooks\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Templates that rely on variables now require sample values upon \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/templates\/overview\">creation or editing\u003C\/a>. Applies to all versions.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Added \u003Ccode>previous_category\u003C\/code> field to \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account\/template-api\">WhatsApp Message Templates\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Business-initiated conversations are no longer eligible for free tier conversations. If your WhatsApp Business Account relies on the services of a Solution Partner or a Meta partner, you are exempt from these changes until June 1, 2023.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"24872288625758223","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1237234275252086","display_name_fbt":"Message Templates","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1679036400,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Business Management API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Added a new \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"template_category_update\"]},\"\\u00a0\",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/webhooks\\\/overview#available-subscription-fields\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"webhook subscription field\"]},\". See \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/catalogs\/set-commerce-settings\">Set Commerce Settings\u003C\/a> for Cloud API and \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/guides\/commerce-guides\">Set Commerce Settings\u003C\/a> for On-Premises API for usage instructions and to learn how these settings can help you sell products and services.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"24839581432360410","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1675324800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Business Management API\"]},\", \",{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Graph API version 16 is now available. Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"February 2, 2023\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"message_templates, Webhook Subscriptions\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2023-02-02\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Graph API version 16 released with changes to template categories, simplified API error responses, and updated webhooks error structure.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/february_2_2023.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Business Management API\u003C\/em>, \u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Graph API version 16 is now available. Changes to message template categories, API error responses, and webhooks have been introduced as part of this version.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\n    \u003Cp>Templates \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/templates\/overview\">created or edited\u003C\/a> using v16.0 must now be categorized using one of the following categories; all other categories are no longer supported. Applies to Cloud API v16.0+. Will apply to all versions May 1, 2023. This change has been introduced to support our June 1, 2023 switch to a new conversation-based pricing model.\u003C\/p>\n\n    \u003Cul>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>AUTHENTICATION\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>MARKETING\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>UTILITY\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n    \u003C\/ul>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Error subcodes, which are rarely used and should not be relied upon, will no longer be included in v16.0+ error responses. Use \u003Ccode>code\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>details\u003C\/code> instead.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Error code 100 (\u003Ccode>\"code\":100\u003C\/code>) had multiple unique titles which indicated the nature of a given 100 error. All code 100 errors will now use \u003Ccode>Invalid parameter\u003C\/code> as their title. Old titles that described the nature of a given code 100 error have been moved to the \u003Ccode>details\u003C\/code> property. This change is also now reflected in webhooks payloads that describe a code 100 error response.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API Webhooks\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>The \u003Ccode>errors\u003C\/code> object in webhooks triggered by v16.0+ request errors now include \u003Ccode>message\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>error_data.details\u003C\/code> properties, and \u003Ccode>title\u003C\/code> values have changed for multiple error codes. Now, \u003Ccode>errors\u003C\/code> objects have the following structure and data:\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cpre>\u003Ccode class=\"language-json\">[\n  {\n    \"code\": &lt;CODE&gt;,\n    \"title\" : \"&lt;TITLE&gt;\",\n    \"message\": \"&lt;MESSAGE&gt;\",\n    \"error_data\": {\n      \"details\": \"&lt;DETAILS&gt;\"\n    }\n  },\n  ...\n]\n\u003C\/code>\u003C\/pre>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>The \u003Ccode>title\u003C\/code> property value has been updated for the following error codes. Their old values now appear in \u003Ccode>error_data.details\u003C\/code>.\n    \u003Cul>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>130470\u003C\/code> new title is now \u003Ccode>Re-engagement message\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>130429\u003C\/code> new title is now \u003Ccode>Rate limit hit\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>131045\u003C\/code> new title is now \u003Ccode>Incorrect certificate\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>131031\u003C\/code> new title is now \u003Ccode>Business Account locked\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>131053\u003C\/code> new title is now \u003Ccode>Media upload error\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>131027\u003C\/code> new title is now \u003Ccode>Something went wrong\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>131042\u003C\/code> new title is now \u003Ccode>Business eligibility payment issue\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>131026\u003C\/code> new title is now \u003Ccode>Message Undeliverable\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>131000\u003C\/code> new title is now \u003Ccode>Something went wrong\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n    \u003C\/ul>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>The \u003Ccode>message\u003C\/code> property value is the same as the \u003Ccode>title\u003C\/code> property value, which indicates the error code\u2019s title.\nThis property maps to the \u003Ccode>message\u003C\/code> property in \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/support\/error-codes\">API error response payloads\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>The \u003Ccode>error_data.details\u003C\/code> property now includes error code titles from the error codes listed above and describes the underlying cause of the error. This value maps to the \u003Ccode>details\u003C\/code> property in API error response payloads.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>These changes are reflected in the following \u003Ccode>errors\u003C\/code> properties in error-related webhooks:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>entry.changes.value.errors\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>entry.changes.value.messages.errors\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>entry.changes.value.statuses.errors\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"24910540095299035","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1846180586099481","display_name_fbt":"Webhook Subscriptions","is_active":true},{"id":"1237234275252086","display_name_fbt":"Message Templates","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1675065600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Unverified businesses can now initiate up to 250 conversations in a rolling 24-hour period.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! embedded signup UI\"]},\".\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n newer.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"November 22, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"WhatsApp Business Account, Phone Numbers, Webhook Subscriptions\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-11-22\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Added new webhook fields for account alerts and updates, new WABA endpoint fields, business portfolio filters, and phone number node fields.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/november_22_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API, Business Management API, Webhooks\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Webhooks\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>New \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/graph-api\/webhooks\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account#account_alerts\">\u003Ccode>account_alerts\u003C\/code>\u003C\/a> field:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Added a new \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/graph-api\/webhooks\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account#account_alerts\">\u003Ccode>account_alerts\u003C\/code>\u003C\/a> field. Notifies you of Business, WhatsApp Business Account, and business phone number alerts.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>New \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/graph-api\/webhooks\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account#account_update\">\u003Ccode>account_update\u003C\/code>\u003C\/a> field values:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Added a new \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/graph-api\/webhooks\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account#account_update\">\u003Ccode>account_update.events\u003C\/code>\u003C\/a> value: \u003Ccode>ACCOUNT_DELETED\u003C\/code>. Indicates that a phone number has been de-registered or deleted from a WhatsApp Business Account.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Added a new \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/graph-api\/webhooks\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account#message_template_status_update\">\u003Ccode>message_template_status_update.events\u003C\/code>\u003C\/a> value: \u003Ccode>PENDING_DELETION\u003C\/code>. Indicates a message template has been marked for deletion.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>Sample Webhooks notifications that are sent when these new events are triggered:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>ACCOUNT_DELETED\u003C\/code> : \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/webhooks\/overview#WABA-deleted\">WhatsApp Business Account Deleted\u003C\/a>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>PENDING_DELETION\u003C\/code> : \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/webhooks\/overview#template-msg-pending-delete\">Template Message Pending Deletion\u003C\/a>\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>New WhatsApp Business Account endpoint fields\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Added the following \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account\/whatsapp-business-account-api\">WhatsApp Business Account\u003C\/a> node fields:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>country\u003C\/code> (applies to \u003Ccode>v15.0+\u003C\/code>)\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>ownership_type\u003C\/code> (applies to \u003Ccode>v15.0+\u003C\/code>)\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>business_verification_status\u003C\/code> (applies to all versions)\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>New Business portfolio endpoint filters\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Added the following filter options to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/ads-commerce\/marketing-api\/reference\/business\/client_whatsapp_business_accounts\">Business Client Whatsapp Business Accounts\u003C\/a> endpoint:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Filter by WhatsApp Business Account \u003Ccode>creation_time\u003C\/code> field using \u003Ccode>GREATER_THAN\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>LESS_THAN\u003C\/code>, or \u003Ccode>IN_RANGE\u003C\/code> operators.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Filter by WhatsApp Business Account \u003Ccode>ownership_type\u003C\/code> using \u003Ccode>EQUAL\u003C\/code> or \u003Ccode>IN\u003C\/code> operators.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>Added the following filter options to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/ads-commerce\/marketing-api\/reference\/business\/owned_whatsapp_business_accounts\">Business Owned WhatsApp Business Accounts\u003C\/a> endpoint:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Filter by WhatsApp Business Account \u003Ccode>creation_time\u003C\/code> using \u003Ccode>GREATER_THAN\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>LESS_THAN\u003C\/code>, or \u003Ccode>IN_RANGE\u003C\/code> operators.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Filter by WhatsApp Business Account \u003Ccode>ownership_type\u003C\/code> using \u003Ccode>EQUAL\u003C\/code> or \u003Ccode>IN\u003C\/code> operators.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Filter by WhatsApp Business Account \u003Ccode>country\u003C\/code> using \u003Ccode>EQUAL\u003C\/code> or \u003Ccode>IN\u003C\/code> operators.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>Applies to v15.0 and newer.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>New business phone number node fields\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Added the following \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/whatsapp-business-account-phone-number-api\">WhatsApp Business Phone Number\u003C\/a> node fields:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>is_official_business_account\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>messaging_limit_tier\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>In addition, you can filter \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-account\/phone-number-management-api\">WhatsApp Business Account Phone Numbers\u003C\/a> endpoint by \u003Ccode>is_official_business_account\u003C\/code>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Applies to v15.0 and newer.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"25298662966438615","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1846180586099481","display_name_fbt":"Webhook Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"November 3, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Messages\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-11-03\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Increased message throughput to 500 mps, added media HTTP caching beta, and enabled document captions.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/november_3_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Messages Per Second\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Cloud API now supports up to 500 (up from 350) messages per second (mps) of combined text and media messages, by request. See \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/throughput\">Throughput\u003C\/a> for details.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>If you already have 350 mps it will be increased to 500 mps automatically. If you already requested 350 mps but the process has not been completed, you will receive 500 mps upon completion.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Media HTTP Caching\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>We are now beta testing Cloud API media HTTP caching. If you are a Solution Partner, see \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/messages\/send-messages#media-http-caching\">Media HTTP Caching\u003C\/a> to learn how to use headers in your server responses that instruct us to cache your media assets for reuse with future messages.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Document Captions\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Cloud API now supports captions on documents sent to and received from customers. See \u003Cstrong>Media Object\u003C\/strong> in the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/message-api\">Media\u003C\/a> reference.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"24939502825710857","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1933366110634393","display_name_fbt":"Messages","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1666681200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Business businesses with approved display names.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/october_25_2022.md\"\/>\n\n Template Limit Increased\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>WhatsApp Business Accounts can now have up to 6,000 message templates if their parent business has been \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/www.facebook.com\/business\/help\/1095661473946872\">verified\u003C\/a> and at least one of the parent business\u2019s WhatsApp Business Accounts has a business phone number with an approved \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/www.facebook.com\/business\/help\/338047025165344\">display name\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>As part of this change, translated versions of a message template now count against a WhatsApp Business Account\u2019s template See \u003Ca
