Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 11, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-10-11\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"On-Premises API v2.43 changes to contacts endpoint behavior and v2.45 deprecation notices for cert, sent_status, and recipient_id fields.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/october_11_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>On-Premises API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>v2.43\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Starting in \u003Ccode>v2.43\u003C\/code>, there will be changes to the behavior of the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/reference\/contacts\">\u003Ccode>contacts\u003C\/code> endpoint\u003C\/a>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/reference\/contacts#returned-fields\">Responses for \u003Ccode>status\u003C\/code> will change\u003C\/a>. Regardless of whether a user has WhatsApp, it will always return \u003Ccode>valid\u003C\/code> for \u003Ccode>status\u003C\/code> in the response and a \u003Ccode>wa_id\u003C\/code>. There is no guarantee that the returned wa_id will be valid. These changes are applicable for both direct responses, as well as webhook responses for non-blocking calls\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Ensure your code avoids relying on \u003Ccode>status\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>wa_id\u003C\/code> returned in the \u003Ccode>contacts\u003C\/code> node. In addition, \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/reference\/messages\">sending a message\u003C\/a> on \u003Ccode>v2.39.1\u003C\/code> or higher can be completed without calling the \u003Ccode>contacts\u003C\/code> node\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Ensure your code handles a potential \u003Ccode>1013\u003C\/code>\u00a0\u003Cstrong>User is not valid\u003C\/strong> error when trying to send a template message, which will be returned if you attempt to send the template message to a phone number without a WhatsApp account\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>For non template messages, sending a message to a phone number without a WhatsApp account will return a \u003Ccode>470\u003C\/code> error\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>v2.45, January 10, 2023\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Starting in \u003Ccode>v2.45\u003C\/code>, the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/multiconnect_mc#parameters\">optional \u003Ccode>cert\u003C\/code> parameter\u003C\/a> in the \u003Ccode>shards\u003C\/code> node will become mandatory for all requests. Please update your integration to always include a valid \u003Ccode>cert\u003C\/code> when calling the \u003Ccode>shards\u003C\/code> node\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Starting in \u003Ccode>v2.41.2\u003C\/code>, businesses can use the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/reference\/settings\/app\">\u003Ccode>application\u003C\/code> node\u003C\/a> to filter out sent message statuses they are not interested in through the \u003Ccode>message\u003C\/code> object within the \u003Ccode>webhooks\u003C\/code> object. In \u003Ccode>v2.45\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>sent_status\u003C\/code> will be deprecated, so update your integration to use the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/reference\/settings\/app#webhooks\">\u003Ccode>webhooks\u003C\/code> object in the \u003Ccode>application\u003C\/code> node\u003C\/a> for all webhook controls\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>As of \u003Ccode>v2.39.1\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>recipient_id\u003C\/code> is available in both the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/webhooks\/outbound#status--message-sent\">\u003Ccode>statuses\u003C\/code> object\u003C\/a> and in the \u003Ccode>message\u003C\/code> object. In \u003Ccode>v2.45\u003C\/code>, \u003Ccode>recipient_id\u003C\/code> will be removed in the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/webhooks\/outbound#status--message-sent\">\u003Ccode>statuses\u003C\/code> object\u003C\/a>, so update your integration to use \u003Ccode>recipient_id\u003C\/code> under the \u003Ccode>message\u003C\/code> object\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"31999755913004772","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1665039600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"You can now use different callback URLs for each of your WhatsApp Business Accounts without having to create a unique app for each WhatsApp Business Account. See \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/solution-providers\\\/manage-webhooks#overriding-the-callback-url\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Overriding the Callback URL\"]},\" for details.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"All Cloud API endpoints now support version 15 calls.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Text parameters (\",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"components.parameters.text\"]},\") for message templates that only use a body component (\",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"components.type:body\"]},\") can now total up to 32,768 characters. See \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/reference\\\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\\\/message-api\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Parameters object\"]},\".\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API now supports up to 350 (up from 250) messages per second (mps) of combined text and media messages, by request. See \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/throughput\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Throughput\"]},\" for details. If you already have 250 mps it will be increased to 350 mps automatically. If you already requested 250 mps but the process has not been completed, you will receive 350 mps upon completion.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Embedded Signup\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/embedded-signup\\\/overview\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Embedded Signup\"]},\" now supports mobile web browsers. The user interface will automatically optimize for a mobile experience when it detects that the viewer is using a mobile web browser.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 6, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Webhook Subscriptions, message_templates\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-10-06\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Added per-WABA callback URL overrides, v15 support, increased template character limits, 350 mps throughput, and mobile web support for Embedded Signup.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/october_6_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>You can now use different callback URLs for each of your WhatsApp Business Accounts without having to create a unique app for each WhatsApp Business Account. See \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/solution-providers\/manage-webhooks#overriding-the-callback-url\">Overriding the Callback URL\u003C\/a> for details.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>All Cloud API endpoints now support version 15 calls.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Text parameters (\u003Ccode>components.parameters.text\u003C\/code>) for message templates that only use a body component (\u003Ccode>components.type:body\u003C\/code>) can now total up to 32,768 characters. See \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/message-api\">Parameters object\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Cloud API now supports up to 350 (up from 250) messages per second (mps) of combined text and media messages, by request. See \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/throughput\">Throughput\u003C\/a> for details. If you already have 250 mps it will be increased to 350 mps automatically. If you already requested 250 mps but the process has not been completed, you will receive 350 mps upon completion.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Embedded Signup\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/embedded-signup\/overview\">Embedded Signup\u003C\/a> now supports mobile web browsers. The user interface will automatically optimize for a mobile experience when it detects that the viewer is using a mobile web browser.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"25157666057183153","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1846180586099481","display_name_fbt":"Webhook \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/embedded-signup\\\/overview\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Embedded Signup\"]},\" or \\u201cOn Behalf Of\\u201d process can now initiate up to 250 conversations with unique customers in a rolling 24-hour period, Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"September 30, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-09-30\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Businesses onboarded via Embedded Signup can now initiate up to 250 conversations with unique customers in 24 hours immediately.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/september_30_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Embedded Signup\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Businesses that have been onboarded by a Solution Partner through the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/embedded-signup\/overview\">Embedded Signup\u003C\/a> or \u201cOn Behalf Of\u201d process can now initiate up to 250 conversations with unique customers in a rolling 24-hour period, Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"August 25, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Messages\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-08-25\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Added support for animated stickers in outbound messages and product\/service inclusion for in-chat shopping.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/august_25_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>You can now include animated stickers in outbound, business-initiated messages and receive \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/webhooks\/reference\/messages\">message webhooks\u003C\/a> describing those messages the same way you would if you were sending a non-animated sticker. Refer to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/message-api\">Message\u003C\/a> object\u2019s \u003Ccode>sticker\u003C\/code> property and for animated sticker asset requirements.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>You can now include products and services in messages sent to customers, and customers can add them to shopping carts without having to leave the chat thread. Refer to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/catalogs\/share-products\">Share Products\u003C\/a> guide to learn how to send Single and Multi-Product messages to customers.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"24568701676159810","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1933366110634393","display_name_fbt":"Messages","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1658386800,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Businesses can now reply to any message in a conversation thread. If you are an enterprise partner you can open a \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"https:\\\/\\\/business.facebook.com\\\/direct-support\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Direct Support\"]},\" ticket to request 250 MPS throughput by selecting Question Topic: \\u201cCloud API Issues\\u201d, Request Type: \\u201cRequest to migrate to 250 MPS throughput\\u201d and filling out the required information.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"July 21, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Messages\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-07-21\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Added support for message replies with contextual bubbles and increased throughput to 250 MPS for enterprise partners.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/july_21_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Businesses can now reply to any message in a conversation thread. Replies will include a contextual bubble referencing the replied-to message. Refer to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/messages\/send-messages#replies\">Send Messages\u003C\/a> guide to learn how to reply to a message.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Cloud API now supports up to 250 messages per second of combined sending and receiving (inclusive of text and media messages), by request. If you are an enterprise partner you can open a \u003Ca href=\"https:\/\/business.facebook.com\/direct-support\">Direct Support\u003C\/a> ticket to request 250 MPS throughput by selecting Question Topic: \u201cCloud API Issues\u201d, Request Type: \u201cRequest to migrate to 250 MPS throughput\u201d and filling out the required information.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"32108042695509341","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1933366110634393","display_name_fbt":"Messages","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1656313200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"On-Premises API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Best practices for a seamless upgrade to v2.41.2\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"In v2.41.2, we are introducing DB schema changes to improve the performance of the system. As a result, upgrades from v2.37.2 and v2.39.x for set ups with large databases which have millions of message and contact entries will take longer than usual.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Generally, perform upgrades during off-peak hours and upgrade lower-throughput setups first.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"For large databases, follow these steps:\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Run garbage collection via the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/whatsapp\\\/on-premises\\\/reference\\\/services\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\\/services\\\/message\\\/gc\"]},\" endpoint before your upgrade, and ensure it completes successfully\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Please use the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/whatsapp\\\/on-premises\\\/get-started\\\/installation\\\/dev-multiconnect#for-mysql-database-users-upgrading-to-v2-23-x-and-above\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"dbupgrade tool\"]},\" to upgrade the DB schemas prior to the version upgrade.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Once done, you will be able to upgrade API versions with minimal down time. It is strongly recommended to bring the API client down before using the dbupgrade tool.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Ensure the dbupgrade tool completes successfully (exit code 0), and avoid or limit API requests while the upgrade is taking place.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We recommend increasing the query timeout on your database servers to one hour, until the upgrade completes successfully.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v2.41.2 features and updates\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Improvements to the latency of the bulk \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/whatsapp\\\/on-premises\\\/reference\\\/contacts\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\\/contacts\"]},\" endpoint requests and resolution of deadlock issues.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Improvements to the performance and reliability of the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/whatsapp\\\/on-premises\\\/reference\\\/services\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"garbage collection process\"]},\".\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Businesses now have the ability to enable\\\/disable \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"delivered\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"read\"]},\" webhook notifications which gives them greater control over webhook notifications for messages. This can be achieved through the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/whatsapp\\\/on-premises\\\/reference\\\/settings\\\/app\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"settings\\\/applications\"]},\" endpoint.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"namespace\"]},\" field is optional for the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/whatsapp\\\/on-premises\\\/reference\\\/messages#template-object\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"template object\"]},\".\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"More robust handling of media download errors so businesses should experience less issues downloading media sent by customers.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Additional reliability and bug fixes within the send message and registration workflows.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"June 27, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Webhook Subscriptions, message_templates\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-06-27\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Released On-Premises API v2.41.2 with database schema improvements, webhook notification controls, and media download reliability fixes.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/june_27_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>On-Premises API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Best practices for a seamless upgrade to v2.41.2\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>In v2.41.2, we are introducing DB schema changes to improve the performance of the system. As a result, upgrades from v2.37.2 and v2.39.x for set ups with large databases which have millions of message and contact entries will take longer than usual.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Generally, perform upgrades during off-peak hours and upgrade lower-throughput setups first.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>For large databases, follow these steps:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Run garbage collection via the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/reference\/services\">\/services\/message\/gc\u003C\/a> endpoint before your upgrade, and ensure it completes successfully\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Please use the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/get-started\/installation\/dev-multiconnect#for-mysql-database-users-upgrading-to-v2-23-x-and-above\">dbupgrade tool\u003C\/a> to upgrade the DB schemas prior to the version upgrade.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>Once done, you will be able to upgrade API versions with minimal down time. It is strongly recommended to bring the API client down before using the dbupgrade tool.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Ensure the dbupgrade tool completes successfully (exit code 0), and avoid or limit API requests while the upgrade is taking place.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>We recommend increasing the query timeout on your database servers to one hour, until the upgrade completes successfully.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>v2.41.2 features and updates\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Improvements to the latency of the bulk \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/reference\/contacts\">\/contacts\u003C\/a> endpoint requests and resolution of deadlock issues.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Improvements to the performance and reliability of the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/reference\/services\">garbage collection process\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Businesses now have the ability to enable\/disable \u003Ccode>delivered\u003C\/code> and \u003Ccode>read\u003C\/code> webhook notifications which gives them greater control over webhook notifications for messages. This can be achieved through the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/reference\/settings\/app\">settings\/applications\u003C\/a> endpoint.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>namespace\u003C\/code> field is optional for the \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/on-premises\/reference\/messages#template-object\">template object\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>More robust handling of media download errors so businesses should experience less issues downloading media sent by customers.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Additional reliability and bug fixes within the send message and registration workflows.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"32198376886474727","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1846180586099481","display_name_fbt":"Webhook Subscriptions","is_active":true},{"id":"1237234275252086","display_name_fbt":"Message Templates","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1652943600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Starting today, the WhatsApp Business Cloud API is open to all developers building products or services for themselves or their organizations. added:\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"TRANSACTIONAL\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"MARKETING\"]}]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"OCDevCenterGridCell.react"},"name":"OCDevCenterGridCell"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"OCDevCenterGrid.react"},"name":"OCDevCenterGrid"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"May 19, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"message_templates\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-05-19\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"WhatsApp Business Cloud API opened to all developers with deprecated template category values and new TRANSACTIONAL and MARKETING categories.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/may_19_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Starting today, the WhatsApp Business Cloud API is open to all developers building products or services for themselves or their organizations. To get started, \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/get-started\">see our guide\u003C\/a>. If you are interested in offering API access to your customers, please \u003Ca href=\"http:\/\/business.whatsapp.com\/learn-more\">join our waitlist\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Business Management API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>The following values for the \u003Ccode>category\u003C\/code> parameter for the \u003Ccode>\/WHATSAPP-BUSINESS-ACCOUNT-ID\/message_template\u003C\/code> endpoint have been deprecated for \u003Ccode>v14.0\u003C\/code> and later:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cgrid columns=\"3\">\n\u003Cgrid-cell>\n    \u003Cul>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>ACCOUNT_UPDATE\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>ALERT_UPDATE \u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>APPOINTMENT_UPDATE\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>AUTO_REPLY\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n    \u003C\/ul>\n  \u003C\/grid-cell>\n\u003Cgrid-cell>\n    \u003Cul>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>ISSUE_RESOLUTION\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>PAYMENT_UPDATE\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>PERSONAL_FINANCE_UPDATE\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>RESERVATION_UPDATE\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n    \u003C\/ul>\n  \u003C\/grid-cell>\n\u003Cgrid-cell>\n    \u003Cul>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>SHIPPING_UPDATE\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>TICKET_UPDATE \u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>TRANSPORTATION_UPDATE\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n    \u003C\/ul>\n  \u003C\/grid-cell>\n\u003C\/grid>\n\n\u003Cp>The following values have been added:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>TRANSACTIONAL\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>MARKETING\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"32190278250619503","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1237234275252086","display_name_fbt":"Message Templates","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1652166000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"On-Premises API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v2.39.4\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"This client version contains all features and fixes shipped with \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v2.39.1\"]},\". Additionally, this release:\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Fixes a bug that prevented video messages from being sent under certain circumstances. \",{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"This fix was also included in \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v2.39.2\"]},\".\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Fixes a bug that prevented businesses from sending messages to a customer, if the customer was the first to initiate an interaction between the two parties on WhatsApp, and that initiation happened more than 7 days ago. This fix was also included in \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v2.39.3\"]},\".\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Fixes a bug that prevented businesses from receiving disappearing messages from customers. After \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v2.39.4\"]},\" is installed, businesses will get notified they received a disappearing message by a webhooks notification with type set to \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"\\\"ephemeral\\\"\"]},\". Businesses will not be able to see the message\\u2019s content.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"When we launched \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v2.39.3\"]},\", the disappearing messages issue was handled by WhatsApp automatically disabling these messages in the chat thread with the client. For \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v2.39.4\"]},\", we will not do that. With this version, businesses that receive disappearing messages must ask the customer to disable disappearing messages and resend their latest message.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"May 10, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-05-10\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Released On-Premises API v2.39.4 with fixes for video message sending, customer interaction issues, and disappearing messages handling.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/may_10_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>On-Premises API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>v2.39.4\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>This client version contains all features and fixes shipped with \u003Ccode>v2.39.1\u003C\/code>. Additionally, this release:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Fixes a bug that prevented video messages from being sent under certain circumstances. \u003Cem>This fix was also included in \u003Ccode>v2.39.2\u003C\/code>.\u003C\/em>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Fixes a bug that prevented businesses from sending messages to a customer, if the customer was the first to initiate an interaction between the two parties on WhatsApp, and that initiation happened more than 7 days ago. This fix was also included in \u003Ccode>v2.39.3\u003C\/code>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Fixes a bug that prevented businesses from receiving disappearing messages from customers. After \u003Ccode>v2.39.4\u003C\/code> is installed, businesses will get notified they received a disappearing message by a webhooks notification with type set to \u003Ccode>\"ephemeral\"\u003C\/code>. Businesses will not be able to see the message\u2019s content.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>When we launched \u003Ccode>v2.39.3\u003C\/code>, the disappearing messages issue was handled by WhatsApp automatically disabling these messages in the chat thread with the client. For \u003Ccode>v2.39.4\u003C\/code>, we will not do that. With this version, businesses that receive disappearing messages must ask the customer to disable disappearing messages and resend their latest message.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"24564594893217971","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1651647600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"On-Premises API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v2.3.8\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"AWS Service Templates and Template Signup\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We\\u2019re making it easier for businesses and partners to scale on the WhatsApp Business Platform with an improved onboarding experience. Starting May 2, 2022, businesses will be able to message customers immediately after signup and only need to complete Business Verification when they\\u2019re ready to scale business-initiated conversations or request to become an Official Business Account.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"The changes mean that onboarded businesses will be able to:\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Respond to unlimited customer-initiated conversations.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Send business-initiated conversations to 50 unique customers in a rolling 24-hour period.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"These are the changes being implemented on May 2, 2022:\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"WhatsApp Account checks and display name review will no longer be a requirement to get started on the platform. After signup, a compliance check with the WhatsApp Platform Policy Checks will be auto-triggered and will be performed in the background.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Display name review will be initiated after Business Verification is completed. Businesses should still follow the display name best practice guidelines when adding a new phone number. For more information, see Display Names.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Business Verification only needs to be completed when businesses are ready to scale business-initiated conversations or request to become an Official Business Account (OBA). For more information, see how to increase limits.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Since businesses get access to sending messages after sign up, the Unverified Trial Experience will be deprecated.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Businesses will be able to see the messaging limits in the Overview Dashboard in WhatsApp Manager -after completing the signup process.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"The changes listed above have no impact on pricing. See pricing for more details.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"April 14, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-04-14\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Announced improved onboarding experience allowing businesses to message customers immediately after signup without requiring Business Verification.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/april_14_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Embedded Signup\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>We\u2019re making it easier for businesses and partners to scale on the WhatsApp Business Platform with an improved onboarding experience. Starting May 2, 2022, businesses will be able to message customers immediately after signup and only need to complete Business Verification when they\u2019re ready to scale business-initiated conversations or request to become an Official Business Account.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>The changes mean that onboarded businesses will be able to:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Respond to unlimited customer-initiated conversations.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Send business-initiated conversations to 50 unique customers in a rolling 24-hour period.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>These are the changes being implemented on May 2, 2022:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>WhatsApp Account checks and display name review will no longer be a requirement to get started on the platform. After signup, a compliance check with the WhatsApp Platform Policy Checks will be auto-triggered and will be performed in the background.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Display name review will be initiated after Business Verification is completed. Businesses should still follow the display name best practice guidelines when adding a new phone number. For more information, see Display Names.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Business Verification only needs to be completed when businesses are ready to scale business-initiated conversations or request to become an Official Business Account (OBA). For more information, see how to increase limits.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Since businesses get access to sending messages after sign up, the Unverified Trial Experience will be deprecated.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Businesses will be able to see the messaging limits in the Overview Dashboard in WhatsApp Manager -after completing the signup process.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>The changes listed above have no impact on pricing. See pricing for more details.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"25519429074308840","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1649142000,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Starting today, the Cloud API is generally available to all existing Solution Partners and direct clients. We support inbound both and outbound stickers. For outbound, we only support static third-party stickers. For inbound, we support all types of stickers.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Deregister Phone Number API\"]},\": Make \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"POST\"]},\" calls to \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"PHONE_NUMBER_ID\\\/deregister\"]},\" in order to remove a phone number from the WhatsApp Business API. See \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/business-phone-numbers\\\/registration#deregister-phone\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Registration\"]},\" for information.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"New Phone Verification Option\"]},\": Verify your business phone number via Graph API calls. See \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/business-phone-numbers\\\/phone-numbers#verify\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Phone Numbers\"]},\" for information.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"New Referral Webhooks\"]},\": Receive Webhooks notifications when a user clicks on an ad that clicks to WhatsApp and sends a message to the business. See \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/webhooks\\\/overview#received-message-triggered-by-click-to-whatsapp-ads\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Webhooks\"]},\" for information. Be aware that the Cloud API\\u2019s webhooks \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"referral\"]},\" object is different from the On-Premises API\\u2019s \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"referral\"]},\" object.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Additionally, we are announcing that App Review is no longer required for first-party developers using the Cloud API. All developers are subject to the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/messaging-limits#messaging\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"WhatsApp Business Platform messaging limits\"]},\".\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"April 5, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Messages, Phone Number Registration, Phone Number Verification, Webhook Subscriptions\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-04-05\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Cloud API became generally available with sticker messaging, phone deregister API, new verification options, and referral webhooks.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/april_5_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Starting today, the Cloud API is generally available to all existing Solution Partners and direct clients. Additionally, we\u2019re releasing the following features for Cloud API developers:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Cstrong>Messages with Stickers\u003C\/strong>: Send media messages containing third-party static stickers. See the following documentation for more details: \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/message-api\">Reference, Messages\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/business-phone-numbers\/media\">Reference, Media\u003C\/a>. We support inbound both and outbound stickers. For outbound, we only support static third-party stickers. For inbound, we support all types of stickers.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Cstrong>Deregister Phone Number API\u003C\/strong>: Make \u003Ccode>POST\u003C\/code> calls to \u003Ccode>PHONE_NUMBER_ID\/deregister\u003C\/code> in order to remove a phone number from the WhatsApp Business API. See \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/business-phone-numbers\/registration#deregister-phone\">Registration\u003C\/a> for information.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Cstrong>New Phone Verification Option\u003C\/strong>: Verify your business phone number via Graph API calls. See \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/business-phone-numbers\/phone-numbers#verify\">Phone Numbers\u003C\/a> for information.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Cstrong>New Referral Webhooks\u003C\/strong>: Receive Webhooks notifications when a user clicks on an ad that clicks to WhatsApp and sends a message to the business. See \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/webhooks\/overview#received-message-triggered-by-click-to-whatsapp-ads\">Webhooks\u003C\/a> for information. Be aware that the Cloud API\u2019s webhooks \u003Ccode>referral\u003C\/code> object is different from the On-Premises API\u2019s \u003Ccode>referral\u003C\/code> object.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>Additionally, we are announcing that App Review is no longer required for first-party developers using the Cloud API. All developers are subject to the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/messaging-limits#messaging\">WhatsApp Business Platform messaging limits\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"32377123841903426","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"2847031035642465","display_name_fbt":"Phone developers may see \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"CrashLoopBackOff\"]},\" for their webapp container and their container may fail to start. To fix that, add following line in the Kubernetes deployment \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"YML\"]},\" file under webapp configuration:\"]},{\"type\":\"DeveloperPre\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"command: [\\\"\\\/opt\\\/whatsapp\\\/bin\\\/wait_on_mysql.sh\\\", \\\"\\\/opt\\\/whatsapp\\\/bin\\\/launch_within_docker.sh\\\"]\\n\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperPre.react"},"name":"DeveloperPre"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"March 26, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-03-26\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"On-Premises API v2.37.2 released with updated expiration date and Kubernetes deployment fix.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/march_26_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>On-Premises API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>v2.37.2\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>This version contains the same features as   \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/changelog\/archive#wa237\">\u003Ccode>v2.37.1\u003C\/code>\u003C\/a>, but there\u2019s a different expiration date. \u003Ccode>v2.37.2\u003C\/code> expires on Sep 22, 2022.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Known Issues:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Some Kubernetes developers may see \u003Ccode>CrashLoopBackOff\u003C\/code> for their webapp container and their container may fail to start. To fix that, add following line in the Kubernetes deployment \u003Ccode>YML\u003C\/code> file under webapp configuration:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cpre>\u003Ccode>command: [\"\/opt\/whatsapp\/bin\/wait_on_mysql.sh\", \"\/opt\/whatsapp\/bin\/launch_within_docker.sh\"]\n\u003C\/code>\u003C\/pre>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"32123377363974919","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1648191600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"On-Premises API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v2.39.3\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"The \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v2.39.3\"]},\" version of our Business API client is available for developers today. The new client includes two fixes and additional logs to support debugging. The two fixes are:\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Fixed a bug that prevented businesses from sending messages to a customer, if the customer was the first to initiate an interaction between the two parties on WhatsApp, and that initiation happened more than 7 days ago.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Fixed a bug that prevented businesses from receiving disappearing messages from customers. After v2.39.3 is installed, businesses will get notified they received a disappearing message by a webhooks notification. On their end, customers will see a warning saying that the disappearing messages mode has been turned off.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"March 25, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Webhook Subscriptions\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-03-25\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"On-Premises API v2.39.3 released with fixes for messaging initiation issues and disappearing messages support.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/march_25_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>On-Premises API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>v2.39.3\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>The \u003Ccode>v2.39.3\u003C\/code> version of our Business API client is available for developers today. The new client includes two fixes and additional logs to support debugging. The two fixes are:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Fixed a bug that prevented businesses from sending messages to a customer, if the customer was the first to initiate an interaction between the two parties on WhatsApp, and that initiation happened more than 7 days ago.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Fixed a bug that prevented businesses from receiving disappearing messages from customers. After v2.39.3 is installed, businesses will get notified they received a disappearing message by a webhooks notification. On their end, customers will see a warning saying that the disappearing messages mode has been turned off.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"32189563763992945","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1846180586099481","display_name_fbt":"Webhook Subscriptions","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1647327600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"List Messages and Reply Buttons\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Starting today, Cloud API beta users can start sending and list and reply button messages. This version fixes a bug that prevented video messages from being sent under certain circumstances.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Known Issues:\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"A bug exists that prevents businesses from sending messages to a customer, if the customer was the first to initiate an interaction between the two parties on WhatsApp, and that initiation happened more than 7 days ago.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"A bug exists that prevents businesses from receiving disappearing messages from customers.\"]}]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! This version fixes a bug that prevented video messages from being sent under certain circumstances.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Known Issues:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>A bug exists that prevents businesses from sending messages to a customer, if the customer was the first to initiate an interaction between the two parties on WhatsApp, and that initiation happened more than 7 days ago.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>A bug exists that prevents businesses from receiving disappearing messages from customers.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"25263591609911063","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1646121600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API beta users can start sending and receiving video messages.
