You will get this error if your account has been locked and can\\u2019t send any messages due to an integrity policy violation. See \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/docs\\\/whatsapp\\\/api\\\/errors#error\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Error and Status Messages\"]},\" and \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/policy-enforcement\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Policy Enforcement\"]},\" for information.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Deprecations\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonUl\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Messages API\"]},\": The \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"hsm\"]},\" type has been deprecated with \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"v2.39\"]},\". You should use the \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"template\"]},\" type instead.\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonLi\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Application Setting\"]},\": The application setting \",{\"type\":\"DeveloperCode\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"webhook_payload_conversation_pricingmodel_disabled\"]},\" has been deprecated.\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Known Issues\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Some video messages fail to send under certain circumstances.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"February 1, 2022\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Messages\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2022-02-01\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Switched to conversation-based pricing model, added location and contact messages support, increased throughput to 80 messages per second, and released On-Premises API v2.39.1.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/february_1_2022.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Starting today, WhatsApp has switched from a notification-based pricing model to a conversation-based pricing model. Businesses are charged per conversation, which includes all messages delivered in a 24 hour session. See \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/pricing\">Conversation-Based Pricing\u003C\/a> for information.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Starting today, Cloud API beta users can start sending and receiving location and contact messages. See the documentation below for more information:\n    \u003Cul>\n      \u003Cli>Reference, Messages: \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/message-api\">Location\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/message-api\">Contacts\u003C\/a>\u003C\/li>\n      \u003Cli>Webhooks, Examples: \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/webhooks\/overview#examples--received-messages\">Received Messages\u003C\/a>\u003C\/li>\n    \u003C\/ul>\n  \u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>We now support 80 messages per second peak throughput per phone number. This includes incoming and outgoing messages, as well as text, template and media messages.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>On-Premises API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>v2.39.1\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>The \u003Ccode>2.39.1\u003C\/code> version of our Business API client is available for developers starting today. The new client includes:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>New field for the Set Shards API.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>New hostname added to network requirements.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>New error code \u003Ccode>1031\u003C\/code>.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Deprecations of the \u003Ccode>hsm\u003C\/code> type and the \u003Ccode>webhook_payload_conversation_pricingmodel_disabled\u003C\/code> application setting.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Set Shards API\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Starting with the new API client version, you may provide your phone\u2019s certificate when you are setting up multiconnect. That means that, when calling the \/v1\/account\/shards endpoint, you can add the Base64-encoded certificate in the cert field. See \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/multiconnect_mc\">Scale Your API Client With Multiconnect\u003C\/a> for information.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>New Hostname\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>We have added \u003Ccode>graph.whatsapp.com\u003C\/code> to the list of WhatsApp server hostnames that the Business API client requires connectivity to. See \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/guides\/network-requirements\">Set Up and Debug Your Network, Hostnames\u003C\/a> for information.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Error Code Updates\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>With \u003Ccode>v2.39\u003C\/code>, we have added error code \u003Ccode>1031\u003C\/code>. You will get this error if your account has been locked and can\u2019t send any messages due to an integrity policy violation. See \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/api\/errors#error\">Error and Status Messages\u003C\/a> and \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/policy-enforcement\">Policy Enforcement\u003C\/a> for information.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Deprecations\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Cstrong>Messages API\u003C\/strong>: The \u003Ccode>hsm\u003C\/code> type has been deprecated with \u003Ccode>v2.39\u003C\/code>. You should use the \u003Ccode>template\u003C\/code> type instead.\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Cstrong>Application Setting\u003C\/strong>: The application setting \u003Ccode>webhook_payload_conversation_pricingmodel_disabled\u003C\/code> has been deprecated.\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Known Issues\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Some video messages fail to send under certain circumstances.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26107207265545793","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1933366110634393","display_name_fbt":"Messages","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1636963200,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Audio Messages\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Starting today, Cloud API beta users can start sending \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/reference\\\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\\\/message-api\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"audio messages\"]},\" to their customers. For supported audio types, see our \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/business-phone-numbers\\\/media#supported-media-types\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"media documentation\"]},\".\"]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Webhooks\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We have updated our \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/webhooks\\\/overview\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"webhooks documentation\"]},\" to clarify the following: \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"if you receive a message type that is not yet supported by Cloud API, you will be notified via an \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/webhooks\\\/overview#received-unknown-messages\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"unknown message webhook\"]}]},\". This means that, for the current API beta release, you will get an unknown message webhook if you receive any of the following message types: Media Messages (Video), Contact Messages, Location Messages, Stickers, Stickerpacks.\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"November 15, 2021\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"tags\" value=\"Messages, Webhook Subscriptions\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2021-11-15\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Cloud API beta now supports audio messages and clarified unknown message webhook handling.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/november_15_2021.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Audio Messages\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Starting today, Cloud API beta users can start sending \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/reference\/whatsapp-business-phone-number\/message-api\">audio messages\u003C\/a> to their customers. For supported audio types, see our \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/business-phone-numbers\/media#supported-media-types\">media documentation\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Webhooks\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>We have updated our \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/webhooks\/overview\">webhooks documentation\u003C\/a> to clarify the following: \u003Cstrong>if you receive a message type that is not yet supported by Cloud API, you will be notified via an \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/webhooks\/overview#received-unknown-messages\">unknown message webhook\u003C\/a>\u003C\/strong>. This means that, for the current API beta release, you will get an unknown message webhook if you receive any of the following message types: Media Messages (Video), Contact Messages, Location Messages, Stickers, Stickerpacks.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"26099087109678909","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[{"id":"1933366110634393","display_name_fbt":"Messages","is_active":true},{"id":"1846180586099481","display_name_fbt":"Webhook Subscriptions","is_active":true}]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"},{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","change_date":1634799600,"is_draft":false,"galaxy_cms_react_content":{"__typename":"XFBGalaxyCMSReactContent","cms_content":{"json_cms_content":"{\"type\":\"Fragment\",\"props\":null,\"isEagerLoaded\":true,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonH1\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"GalaxyHTMLEm\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Cloud API\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[{\"type\":\"DMCCommonStrong\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"Feature Availability\"]}]},{\"type\":\"DMCCommonP\",\"props\":{},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"We have updated the \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/about-the-platform\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"list of features that will be available for the Cloud API Beta release\"]},\". See more information \",{\"type\":\"DMCCommonA\",\"props\":{\"decoration\":\"always-underline\",\"hideExternalIcon\":false,\"href\":\"\\\/documentation\\\/business-messaging\\\/whatsapp\\\/about-the-platform#migration\",\"isMuted\":false},\"isEagerLoaded\":false,\"children\":[\"here\"]},\".\"]}]}","js_dependencies":[{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonH1.react"},"name":"DMCCommonH1"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"GalaxyHTMLEm.react"},"name":"GalaxyHTMLEm"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonP.react"},"name":"DMCCommonP"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonStrong.react"},"name":"DMCCommonStrong"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonA.react"},"name":"DMCCommonA"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonLi.react"},"name":"DMCCommonLi"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DMCCommonUl.react"},"name":"DMCCommonUl"},{"dependency":{"__dr":"DeveloperCode.react"},"name":"DeveloperCode"}]}},"raw_markdown":"\u003Cdeveloper-dmc-docs>\n  \u003C!--\n  WARNING, CMS USER:\n\n  DO NOT EDIT THIS HERE! Your changes will be overridden.\n\n  Click the \"Edit this page\" button in the preview to edit the markdown source.\n\n  When you are done, assign the diff to 'oculus-documentation' if this is a Horizon doc or 'devsite_content_team' if this is an FoA or monetization doc.\n  -->\n\u003Cmeta name=\"title\" value=\"October 21, 2021\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"description\" value=\"\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"change_date\" value=\"2021-10-21\"\/>\n\u003Cmeta name=\"summary\" value=\"Updated Cloud API beta feature availability list, endpoint restrictions, staged onboarding instructions, and migration documentation.\"\/>\n\n  \u003Cmeta name=\"edit-url\" value=\"https:\/\/www.internalfb.com\/code\/fbsource\/[master][edit]\/www\/flib\/intern\/public-developer-docs\/social\/mdsourcedc\/change-log\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/october_21_2021.md\"\/>\n\n  \u003Ch1\/>\n\n  \u003C!--\nThis file was generated by SplitChangelogAndCreateEntryEntsScript\n-->\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cem>Cloud API\u003C\/em>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>\u003Cstrong>Feature Availability\u003C\/strong>\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>We have updated the \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/about-the-platform\">list of features that will be available for the Cloud API Beta release\u003C\/a>. This is an updated snapshot of the features and their availability:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Available for beta:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Text Messages\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Text-Based Message Templates\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Media Messages (Images and Documents)\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Media-Based Message Templates (Images and Documents)\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Interactive Message Templates\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>Not available for beta:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Media Messages (Audio and Video)\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Media-Based Message Templates (Audio and Video)\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Contact Messages\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Location Messages\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Stickers and Stickerpacks\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>List Messages\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Dynamic Reply Buttons\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>Multi-Product Messages\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>Endpoint Availability:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>The following endpoints will not be available for the Cloud API Beta release:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>\/PHONE_NUMBER_ID\/deregister\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n  \u003Cli>\u003Ccode>\/PHONE_NUMBER_ID\/application_settings\u003C\/code>\u003C\/li>\n\u003C\/ul>\n\n\u003Cp>Staged Onboarding:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>We\u2019ve added specific instructions for each stage of the beta implementation. See more information \u003Ca href=\"\/docs\/whatsapp\/cloud-api\/alpha-and-beta-program#staged-onboarding\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>Migrating Between On-Premises and Cloud API:\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003Cp>We\u2019ve added instructions to migrate from the Cloud API back to On-Premises, if needed. See more information \u003Ca href=\"\/documentation\/business-messaging\/whatsapp\/about-the-platform#migration\">here\u003C\/a>.\u003C\/p>\n\n\u003C\/developer-dmc-docs>","id":"24899081696410213","__isXFBWithDevDocTags":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry","dev_doc_tags":{"__typename":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntryDevDocTagsConnection","nodes":[]},"__isNode":"XFBDevDocChangelogEntry"}],"xfb_developer_documentation_changelog_rss_enabled":true,"xfb_developer_doc_navigations":{"changelog_label":null}},"extensions":{"is_final":true}},"sequence_number":0}}]],["Bootloader","markComponentsAsImmediate",[],[["DMCImageModal.react"]]],["RequireDeferredReference","unblock",[],[["DMCCommonH1.react","GalaxyHTMLEm.react","DMCCommonP.react","DMCCommonA.react","DeveloperCode.react","DMCCommonLi.react","DMCCommonUl.react","DMCCommonOl.react","DMCCommonStrong.react","OCDevCenterGridCell.react","OCDevCenterGrid.react","DeveloperPre.react","DeveloperDMCDocsH4.react","GalaxyHtmlBr.react","DEVHorizonImg.react","DMCCommonDiv.react","DMCuiNote.react","GalaxySharedI.react","GalaxySharedB.react"],"sd"]],["RequireDeferredReference","unblock",[],[["DMCCommonH1.react","GalaxyHTMLEm.react","DMCCommonP.react","DMCCommonA.react","DeveloperCode.react","DMCCommonLi.react","DMCCommonUl.react","DMCCommonOl.react","DMCCommonStrong.react","OCDevCenterGridCell.react","OCDevCenterGrid.react","DeveloperPre.react","DeveloperDMCDocsH4.react","GalaxyHtmlBr.react","DEVHorizonImg.react","DMCCommonDiv.react","DMCuiNote.react","GalaxySharedI.react","GalaxySharedB.react"],"css"]],["CometResourceScheduler","registerHighPriHashes",null,[["1DFRiCY","jCiJ1dZ","7LdZSeh","3wi238S","KPiE0Y4","d4RxYed","O9\/tABa","HBnwI4g","CEI\/lK3","CKBGmNE","BbwIYdC","eLhnODB"]]]]}},{"__bbox":null},{"__bbox":null},["0+8NDOO"]]]]}</script>

href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/embedded-signup/version-4-public-preview" role="link" tabindex="0">Phone Number First flow</a> to a subset of business customers in the default Embedded Signup flow. This flow has been available in the v2, v3, and v4 public preview versions for the past month; it is now beginning to roll out in the default flow. In this variant, business customers enter and verify their phone number near the start of signup, before they create or select business assets, surfacing phone number eligibility and verification issues earlier.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 button</a> is available starting early July 2026 (previously listed as early May 2026).</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 xnxqytt">REQUEST_CONTACT_INFO</code> button is optional and the button label cannot be customized, and removed the hardcoded text field from the template creation example.</li></span></ul><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/calling/sip#sip-call-webhooks" role="link" tabindex="0">SIP call webhooks</a> support for SIP-enabled business phone numbers. When SIP is enabled, you can now optionally enable webhook delivery to receive call lifecycle events (<code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">call_created</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">terminate</code>) for SIP calls. This includes a new <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">webhook_delivery</code> field in the SIP settings configuration. The call_created webhook includes WhatsApp Call ID (WACID) which can be correlated with SIP Call-ID headers.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/calling/call-settings#voicemail" role="link" tabindex="0">Voicemail</a> for WhatsApp Cloud API Calling is now generally available. You can configure announcement media, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">REJECT</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">TIMEOUT</code> triggers, and receive recorded voicemails through the existing <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">messages</code> webhook field as inbound audio messages.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Added <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">messaging_account_id</code> as the preferred request parameter for specifying the Messaging Account on WhatsApp Business Cloud API messaging and calling endpoints. The previous <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">paid_messaging_account_id</code> parameter is now a deprecated, backward-compatible alias; migrate to <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">messaging_account_id</code> by December 31, 2026, after which <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">paid_messaging_account_id</code> is planned for removal in a future Graph API version. If you supply both parameters, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">messaging_account_id</code> takes precedence and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">paid_messaging_account_id</code> is ignored. See <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp open beta. The Direct Send API lets you send business-initiated utility and authentication messages without pre-creating templates — Meta auto-generates and matches templates behind the scenes. New pages cover <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">transfer_action</code> request parameter (<code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">none</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">force_transfer</code>) on the set-username endpoint, used to transfer a username from another business phone number within the same business portfolio to this phone number, along with the new <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">147005</code> “Username transfer required” error code returned when a transfer is required but <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">transfer_action</code> was not set to <code xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Cloud API</em>, <em>Message Templates</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Updated the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/templates/template-archival" role="link" tabindex="0">Message Templates API</a> to return detailed response objects when archiving or unarchiving templates, instead of <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">{&quot;success&quot;: true}</code>. Archiving now returns <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">archived_templates</code> (successfully archived IDs) and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">failed_templates</code> (per-template error messages). Unarchiving returns <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">unarchived_templates</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">failed_templates</code> in the same format. This enables callers to handle partial failures when archiving or unarchiving templates in bulk.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 triggers, and receive recorded voicemails through the existing <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">messages</code> webhook field as inbound audio messages.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr User IDs</a> page. Renamed the contact request interactive message type from <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">contact_request</code> to <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">request_contact_info</code>. Fixed the parent BSUID endpoint URL to use <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">api.facebook.com</code> instead of <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">graph.facebook.com</code>.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Cloud API</em>, <em>Webhooks</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Updated the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/calling/reference#calling-api-webhooks" role="link" tabindex="0">Calling API reference</a> page. Added BSUID and username fields to calling webhooks: <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">to_user_id</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">to_parent_user_id</code>, and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">contacts</code> with <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">username</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">user_id</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">parent_user_id</code> for Call Connect and Call Terminate webhooks, and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">recipient_user_id</code> for Call Status webhooks.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div coexistence partners. When a coexistence client re-registers their WhatsApp Business app (device switch, reinstall, or re-registration), they see a pre-checked opt-in to reconnect all previously connected Cloud API products. Reonboarding completes automatically in the background within a few minutes.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp Businesses can now mark group messages as read using the same <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/reference/whatsapp-business-phone-number/message-api" role="link" tabindex="0">Messages API</a> endpoint. x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/templates/authentication-templates/keyboard-suggestions" role="link" tabindex="0">Keyboard suggestions</a> will be enabled by default for all authentication templates. On iOS 26 and later, WhatsApp users will see a native one-tap autofill prompt in the keyboard when they receive an authentication code. No integration changes are required. To opt out before this date, use the <strong>Allow autofill on iOS</strong> toggle in WhatsApp Manager.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">USER_RE_REGISTERED</code> (your client re-registered on a new device). class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr The API returns this error when a WhatsApp Business account has exceeded its messaging limit due to template classification violations. This applies to both template messages and direct send messages. The restriction is automatically lifted after the enforcement period.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/webhooks/reference/account_update" role="link" tabindex="0">account_update</a> webhook’s <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">PARTNER_REMOVED</code> event now includes a <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">disconnection_info</code> object when your client was using both the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/embedded-signup/onboarding-business-app-users" role="link" tabindex="0">WhatsApp Business app and Cloud API</a> and the disconnection was due to a business downgrade or device inactivity. The object contains a <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">reason</code> field (<code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">BUSINESS_DOWNGRADE</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">PRIMARY_INACTIVITY</code>, or <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">COMPANION_INACTIVITY</code>) and an <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">initiated_by</code> field (<code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">USER</code> or <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">SYSTEM</code>). This feature is part of a gradual rollout and may not be available to you immediately.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Beginning in early <strong>December 2025</strong>, we will begin supporting Flows on WhatsApp Web. Users will be able to open, complete, and view Flow responses on WhatsApp Web companions. No action is required, this feature will be enabled automatically.</div></span></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We are launching Data API version 4.0, which features improvements to the security of the Flows endpoints.</div><div id="documentheading-4-whatsapp-flows-endpoints-security-enhancements-data-api-version-40"><div id="whatsapp-flows-endpoints-security-enhancements-data-api-version-40" style="scroll-margin-top:80px"><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x6s0dn4 x78zum5 x1r0jzty x17zd0t2 xyamay9"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 class="x1i10hfl x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x1n2onr6 x16tdsg8 1.405-5.059.012-1.416-1.39-1.416-3.509 0-4.899L8.23 11.91z"></path></svg></div></div></div></div><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
To further protect user interactions and ensure requests are genuinely from the intended recipients, we have strengthened the security of WA Flows endpoints. Previously, the system relied on flow tokens as identifiers. While effective, we have added some  improvements to the verification process.
</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
We have introduced a robust two-signature authentication mechanism:

</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
1. <b>Platform-side Signature Verification</b>: Our platform now verifies the authorization of requests for specific flow messages. This process is handled entirely by our system and does not require any changes or action from your business.

</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
2. <b>Flow Token Signature</b>: Businesses now have the option to use an extra layer of authentication. This signature  is generated by our system and added to the data channel request payload.  This signature can be optionally used by businesses to verify that requests originate from users who received the corresponding flow message, helping ensure authenticity and security of data channel endpoints.

</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">What Does This Mean for Businesses?</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
No action required for the platform-side verification; it is managed by us.

</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Optional enhancement: Businesses can choose to use the flow token signature authentication for added security (<a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/implementingyourflowendpoint#data_exchange_request" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">More details</a>).

</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
To enable the improvements, set the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">data_api_version</code> to <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">4.0</code> in the Flow JSON.

</li></span><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div implementation of Embedded Signup that is hosted by Meta. You can get a link to Hosted ES in the App Dashboard and add it to your website or customer portal. x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/webhooks/reference/messages/video" role="link" tabindex="0">video messages</a>, etc.) now include the incoming media asset’s media URL, which is assigned to the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">url</code> property.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">You can now designate an <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/messages/audio-messages" role="link" tabindex="0">audio message</a> as a <strong>voice message</strong>. Delivered voice messages appear in the WhatsApp client with a play icon, waveform graphic, profile image, and a microphone icon. If the recipient has enabled <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/messaging-limits" role="link" tabindex="0">Messaging limits</a> are now business portfolio-based instead of business phone number-based, and the initial increase via scaling path is now 2,000 instead of 1,000. To support this change, for version 24.0 and newer requests, a new <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">whatsapp_business_manager_messaging_limit</code> field has been added, which returns the owning business portfolio’s messaging limit. This field is available on the following endpoints:
    <ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5 x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp /&lt;BUSINESS_PHONE_NUMBER_ID&gt;</a> endpoint now returns the owning business portfolio’s messaging limit.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">For version 24.0 and newer requests, added error code x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>

These updates don&#x27;t change how things work, but they make it easier to spot <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/reference/error-codes#action-errors" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">errors</a> in the Flow JSON.

x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">On September 8th, 2025, we’re launching a new <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/marketing-messages-lite-api/onboarding#receive-mm-lite-terms-of-service-signed-webhook--preferred-" role="link" tabindex="0">“MM Lite ToS signed” webhook</a>, which will be sent whenever a business signs the MM Lite ToS via any method (e.g. Embedded Signup, or in WhatsApp Manager). The webhook will have a more descriptive name than the existing <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">AD_ACCOUNT_LINKED</code> webhook. The older webhook will be deprecated by Jan 1, 2026.</div></li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/marketing-messages-lite-api/viewing-metrics" role="link" tabindex="0">Conversion metrics</a> will now also be available in WhatsApp Manager UI and via the WhatsApp Business Management API. This means that we’re removing the ability to view MM Lite metrics for read-only Ad Accounts in Ads Manager.</div></li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa xnxqytt">/marketing_messages</code> endpoint will <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Added <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/marketing-messages-lite-api/onboarding#checking-eligibility-status" role="link" tabindex="0"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk">marketing_messages_onboarding_status</code> field</a> which provides more granular eligibility status data. The field will be a replacement for <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/marketing-messages-lite-api/onboarding#checking-eligibility-status--alternative-" role="link" tabindex="0"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk">marketing_messages_api_status</code> field</a> which will be deprecated in version 24.0.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Fixed the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">marketing_messages_lite_api_status</code> field to correct a bug which was erroneously returning <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ELIGIBLE</code> when it should have returned <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ONBOARDED</code>. This field will be deprecated in version 24.0, so we recommend using the new <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">marketing_onboarding_status</code> field instead.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Changed the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">marketing_messages_api_status</code> field to no longer require one or more registered phone numbers, or one or more MM Lite API-ready templates, in order for <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">ONBOARDED</code> to be returned.</li></span></ul><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 This doesn’t add any functional change, but makes it easier to spot <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/reference/error-codes#action-errors" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">errors</a> on Flow JSON.

xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>MM Lite API</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Permissions</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">The <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/permissions#a" role="link" tabindex="0">ads_read</a> permission is now optional for partners. This change impacts the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/marketing-messages-lite-api/for-solution-providers#-recommended--onboard-a-business-to-mm-lite-api-using-the-intent-api" role="link" tabindex="0">Intent API</a> and the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/marketing-messages-lite-api/for-solution-providers#onboard-a-business-to-mm-lite-api-using-embedded-signup" role="link" tabindex="0">Embedded Signup</a> onboarding flows. Prior to this change, partners had to apply for App Review to get advanced access for this new permission, regardless of whether or not their app intended to call the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/ads-commerce/marketing-api/insights" role="link" tabindex="0">Insights API</a> for conversion metrics. Now, partners only need to request advanced access for this permission via App Review if their app intends to use the Insights API.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Automatic Creative Optimizations</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Added <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/marketing-messages-lite-api/sending-messages#text-overlays" role="link" tabindex="0">text overlays</a> and <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/marketing-messages-lite-api/sending-messages#image-animation" role="link" tabindex="0">image animation</a> Automatic Creative Optimizations. Like other optimizations, these are enabled by default on all templates, but can be disabled upon template creation, or when editing a template.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" Note that these businesses will not have access to some advanced features, but can still take advantage of all other benefits, such as exclusive <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/marketing-messages-lite-api" role="link" tabindex="0">marketing features</a>. x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Update to the ChipsSelector component</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
We are updating the ChipsSelector component to align its behaviour with other list selection components (i.e. CheckboxGroup, RadioButtonsGroup and Dropdown). The ChipsSelector component can now:
<span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Be used inside If/Switch components
</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Have “on-select-action” and “on-unselect-action” properties defined at its root.
</li></span></li></span><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#image_carousel" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">Image Carousel component</a></h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
The Image Carousel component allows users to slide through multiple images.

</li></span><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div parameters when attempting to send a template message. Applies to version 23.0 and newer versions.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Embedded Signup</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/embedded-signup/version-3" role="link" tabindex="0">Version 3</a> is now available. As part of this release, we have introduced versioning that will align with Graph API’s release cadence. The following changes apply to version 3:</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">only_waba_sharing</code> is no longer a valid <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">extras.featureType</code> value, since <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/embedded-signup/bypass-phone-addition" role="link" tabindex="0">bypassing the phone number screen</a> is obsolete now that business customers are able to complete the flow with a verified business phone number, unverified number, or no number at all.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Added <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">extras.version</code> which must be set to <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">3</code> to enable version 3.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Added <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">extras.features</code> for enabling <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/marketing-messages-lite-api" role="link" tabindex="0">Marketing Messages Lite API</a> and <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/embedded-signup/app-only-install" role="link" tabindex="0">App-Only Install</a> onboarding.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Added <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">extras.features.api_access_only</code> for enabling App-Only Install onboarding.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Enabling Marketing Messages Lite API onboarding must now be done through the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">extras.features</code> instead of <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">extras.featureType</code>.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/embedded-signup/implementation#session-logging-message-event-listener" role="link" tabindex="0">Session info</a> will be automatically enabled for all users. Partners will still have to add an event listener on the same window to process incoming information.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">coexistence</code> is no longer a valid <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">extras.featureType</code> value, you must use <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">whatsapp_business_app_onboarding</code> to launch the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/embedded-signup/onboarding-business-app-users" role="link" tabindex="0">Whatsapp Business App onboarding</a> flow.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Measurement partners currently cannot use version 3.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>MM Lite API</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Early access to Automated Creative Optimizations</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We are piloting a new optimization capability exclusive to MM Lite API (not available on Cloud API), which automatically enhances the visual appeal and engagement of marketing messages. Similarly to Advantage+ creative, this capability tests minor variations of your existing image header with different crop orientations or color filters, and automatically selects the variant which is getting the highest click-through rate over time with no input needed from you.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">A small group of businesses will be getting early access to this feature starting May 5, with the ability to opt Templates out via the message template API. For more details, see <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/marketing-messages-lite-api/sending-messages#automatic-creative-optimizations" role="link" tabindex="0">Automated Creative Optimizations</a>.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Please reach out to your partner, if you would like to be included in early access to this feature.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp 12a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H5a1 1 0 1 1 0-2h14a1 1 0 0 1 1 1z"></path></svg></div></div><div aria-labelledby="_R_mar9kldcpfilipam_" class="x1s73dr8 x5uqrmk xua3uq3 xwji4o3" id="_R_mar9kldcpfilipamH1_" xn57rk6 xml9wff xcgl0sk x1hhp1i x1i6xp69 xkifxcc x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xz9dl7a xsag5q8"></h1><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Template Categorization</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We no longer support the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">allow_category_change</code> property during template creation. Previously, if set to true in a template creation request, this allowed us to update a template’s category to marketing, if we determined marketing to be its category per its content and our guidelines. This is now the default behavior.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Flows can now be sent with other buttons in message templates</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
You can now send message templates with a Flow and <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/templates/components#buttons" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">other types of buttons as part of the same message</a>.
</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
An icon can now be selected for different types of Flows, and a default icon will be displayed if none is selected. This will not affect templates that have already been sent.

</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
You can create message templates from <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="https://business.facebook.com/latest/whatsapp_manager/" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">WhatsApp Manager<span class="xuxw1ft">⁠<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="1em" height="1em" class="x1rg5ohu x1heor9g xlzyvqe x15vhz18 xdwrcjd xxymvpz" role="img" aria-label="This link opens in a new tab or window"><path d="M6 19h12a1 1 0 0 0 1-1v-5h2v5a3 3 0 0 1-3 3H6a3 3 0 0 1-3-3V6a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h5v2H6a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v12a1 1 0 0 0 1 1z"></path><path d="M11.293 11.293 17.586 5H14a1 1 0 1 1 0-2h6a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v6a1 1 0 1 1-2 0V6.414l-6.293 6.293a1 1 0 0 1-1.414-1.414z"></path></svg></span></a> or directly via <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/flowsapi" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">API</a>.

x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">With this update, MM lite has:</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><strong>Self-signup for all partners and businesses</strong>. All businesses and solution providers (including Solution Partners, Tech Providers and Tech Partners) can now use self-serve onboarding flows to onboard to MM Lite API. See documentation on <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/marketing-messages-lite-api/onboarding" role="link" tabindex="0">Onboarding</a> for more details.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><strong>Global availability</strong>. MM Lite API is now available in all regions where Cloud API is also available. Note that while the API is available, some geographic variation of features may apply, <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>MM Lite API</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Updates to character and emoji limits in Templates</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">This update applies across all Templates on the Business Messaging API, and is not specific to MM Lite API (also applies on Cloud API).</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">As part of our ongoing efforts to improve the performance and user experience of our messaging platform, we are introducing changes to the body component of marketing templates via Cloud API and MM Lite API. These changes will impact the character limits and emoji usage in the body component, depending on the format and tag of the template.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>Key Updates</strong>:</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Character limits for the body component will vary based on the template format and tag</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">The number of emojis allowed in the body component may also be limited.</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">These updates are designed to enhance the performance and user experience of our messaging platform. While these changes may require some adjustments to your template creation process, they can ultimately lead to better performance and engagement with your customers.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/solution-providers/obo-model-deprecation" role="link" tabindex="0">being deprecated</a>. Starting September 30, 2025, WABAs can no longer be onboarded to the OBO model.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp
