with component improvements.</div><div id="documentheading-4-component-updates-flow-json-version-70"><div id="component-updates-flow-json-version-70" style="scroll-margin-top:80px"><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x6s0dn4 x78zum5 x1r0jzty x17zd0t2 xyamay9"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms">Component updates (Flow JSON Version 7.0)</h4><div class="x1i10hfl x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x1n2onr6 x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1hl2dhg x1lku1pv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek x197sbye x78zum5 xl56j7k x6s0dn4 x4nc2kg x155eyjv xrpzz58 x102p2p6 xus0ocu x1c9tyrk xeusxvb x1pahc9y x1ertn4p x1td3qas x10w6t97 x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd" role="button" tabindex="0"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="1em" height="1em" aria-hidden="true" class="x1lliihq x1d43ie2 xlup9mm x1kky2od" role="img"><path d="M12.924 5.14c1.42-1.52 3.565-1.52 4.986 0 1.438 1.54 1.438 3.997 0 5.536l-2.007 2.138c-1.42 1.521-3.565 1.521-4.986 0a1 1 0 1 0-1.461 1.366c2.211 2.367 5.697 2.367 7.908 0l2.006-2.137c2.149-2.297 2.148-5.97.001-8.268-2.208-2.364-5.688-2.367-7.9-.01L8.582 6.71a1 1 0 0 0 1.426 1.401c.972-.989 1.97-1.957 2.917-2.97z"></path><path d="M8.23 11.91c1.427-1.4 3.618-1.399 5.045.001a1 1 0 0 0 1.4-1.427 5.556 5.556 0 0 0-7.847 0L4.66 12.623c-2.215 2.174-2.215 5.579 0 7.752a5.556 5.556 0 0 0 7.84.01l2.157-2.014a1 1 0 1 0-1.365-1.462l-2.172 2.027c-1.418 1.368-3.639 1.405-5.059.012-1.416-1.39-1.416-3.509 0-4.899L8.23 11.91z"></path></svg></div></div></div></div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">New property “label-variant” on TextArea and TextInput</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
You can now utilize the <i>label-variant: &#x27;large&#x27;</i> attribute to display a large label on TextArea or TextInput components. This feature allows the label to be positioned above the input field, accommodating up to 4 lines of text for improved readability and user experience.
</li></span><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Update to on-select-action behaviour</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
In Flow JSON version 6.0, we introduced a breaking change that triggered the on-select-action at the component level when a new screen was rendered. This same functionality is present in Flow JSON versions 6.1, 6.2, and 6.3. <br/></li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Reversion of this Change: We are reverting this change in Flow JSON version 7.0. From this version onwards, if an on-select-action is present on the component level, it will not be triggered when a new screen is rendered. This behavior is identical to that of Flow JSON versions 5.1 and older.
</li></span><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Form validations introduced for init-values and error-messages</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
We&#x27;ve introduced type checking for <i>init-values</i> and <i>error-messages</i> properties in the Form component. This ensures that values match the expected types where they&#x27;re used.<br/>
For example, a TextInput with input-type=&quot;number&quot; will only accept numeric init-values. Non-numeric values will trigger an error message.
<br/></li></span><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#chips_selector" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">Chips selector component</a></h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
The Chips Selector component simplifies tasks, such as selecting preferences or time slots, by presenting options in a compact and interactive format.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Footer supported with RichText component</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
The RichText component can now be used in conjunction with the Footer component on the same screen, allowing the Flow to navigate from or end at a screen that includes RichText.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><div id="documentheading-4-developer-tooling-improvements"><div id="developer-tooling-improvements" style="scroll-margin-top:80px"><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x6s0dn4 x78zum5 x1r0jzty x17zd0t2 xyamay9"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms">Developer tooling improvements</h4><div class="x1i10hfl x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x1n2onr6 x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1hl2dhg x1lku1pv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek x197sbye x78zum5 xl56j7k x6s0dn4 x4nc2kg x155eyjv xrpzz58 x102p2p6 xus0ocu x1c9tyrk xeusxvb x1pahc9y x1ertn4p x1td3qas x10w6t97 x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd" role="button" tabindex="0"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="1em" height="1em" aria-hidden="true" class="x1lliihq x1d43ie2 xlup9mm x1kky2od" role="img"><path d="M12.924 5.14c1.42-1.52 3.565-1.52 4.986 0 1.438 1.54 1.438 3.997 0 5.536l-2.007 2.138c-1.42 1.97-1.957 2.917-2.97z"></path><path d="M8.23 11.91c1.427-1.4 3.618-1.399 5.045.001a1 1 0 0 0 1.4-1.427 5.556 5.556 0 0 0-7.847 0L4.66 12.623c-2.215 2.174-2.215 5.579 0 7.752a5.556 5.556 0 0 0 7.84.01l2.157-2.014a1 1 0 1 0-1.365-1.462l-2.172 2.027c-1.418 1.368-3.639 1.405-5.059.012-1.416-1.39-1.416-3.509 0-4.899L8.23 11.91z"></path></svg></div></div></div></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Some Flow APIs have been simplified, making them easier to create and send:</div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Published Flow can be created in a single API call</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Two new optional parameters (<code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">flow_json</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">publish</code>) are now available in the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/flowsapi#create" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">Create Flow API</a> call, which allow you to provide the Flow JSON and publish the new Flow immediately. Previously, at least three API calls were required (Create Flow, Update Flow JSON, and Publish Flow).

</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Simplified send Flow API call</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
The <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/sendingaflow#userinitiated" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">number of required parameters for sending a Flow has decreased</a>. You now only need to specify <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">flow_message_version</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">flow_cta</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">flow_id/flow_name</code>. The rest of the parameters are now optional.

</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Simplified creation of message template with a Flow</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Similarly, the number of required parameters has decreased for <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/sendingaflow#create-a-message-template-with-a-flow" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">creation of message template with a Flow</a>. Only <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">text</code>,  and flow identifier <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">flow_id/flow_name/flow_json</code> need to be provided for Flow <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">button</code>. The rest of the parameters are now optional.

</li></span><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#navlist" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">NavigationList component</a></h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
The Navigation list offers a user-friendly way to explore multiple options within a Flow. Each list item enables navigation and can display a range of content, including text, images, and tags, making it easy for users to move between different screens in the Flow.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Regular expressions supported in TextInput component</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Introduced a new pattern property to enable regular expression validation for <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#textinput" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">text inputs</a> with input-type as text, password, passcode and number.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl 7.84.01l2.157-2.014a1 1 0 1 0-1.365-1.462l-2.172 2.027c-1.418 1.368-3.639 1.405-5.059.012-1.416-1.39-1.416-3.509 0-4.899L8.23 11.91z"></path></svg></div></div></div></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">This release also adds some features to the API, and makes some of those available on the Builder:</div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Published Flows can be edited from the Builder</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
All new Flows could be edited from the API since November, and now they can also be edited from the Flows Builder on WhatsApp Manager. This enables changes to be made directly within the same Flow, allowing messages to be sent with the updated content using the same Flow ID, eliminating the need to recreate the Flow.

</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">API to migrate (copy) Flows from one WABA to another</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Flows can be migrated from one WhatsApp Business account (WABA) to another owned by the same business. Migration doesn&#x27;t move the source Flows, it creates copies of them with the same names in the destination WABA.  
<a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp A new share button will generate the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/flowsapi#preview" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">preview URL</a> without the need to use the existing API, so it can be shared with other users and embedded as an iframe into other applications.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">New Flow JSON deprecation webhooks</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>

xkifxcc x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xz9dl7a xsag5q8"></h1><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>MM Lite API</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Reduced sync and async latency</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">MM Lite team has quickly responded to feedback on “async” or “delivery” latency. This is defined as the time between an API call being received by MM Lite API, and MM Lite API dispatching a “delivered” webhook, assuming a user is online when the message is sent.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">MM Lite previously had a p99 “async” delivery time of 12s, vs. p99 of 5s on Cloud API. This time has now been reduced to 9s. No action is required on a business or partner’s part.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak xq9mrsl xvngds4">Marketing Messages</span></div></div><!--$--><h1 class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x1r28tcg x1yxlzaz xsp84uj x1tbo4zr x1366vqa xme0v8z xakorsv xcxolhg xn57rk6 xml9wff xcgl0sk x1hhp1i x1i6xp69 xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>MM Lite API</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>New easier onboarding flow, for partner-managed businesses</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">MM Lite is rolling out a new way for partners to guide a business through signing the MM Lite Terms of Service and moving to MM Lite.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">In parallel with the Embedded Signup flow already available, a partner will also alternatively be able to initiate the following flow:</div><ol class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 x3yw8vx"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Call an ‘Intent API’ endpoint to indicate a BMID the partner wishes to assist in migrating to MM Lite. (If a BMID contains any OBO WABAs, these must be migrated to ‘shared’ prior to this event).</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Admins of that BMID will receive a notification that they have been invited to start sending marketing messages with optimizations via MM Lite.  This notification is in Business Manager and via email.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Once accepted, and MM Lite setup and Ad account syncing is complete, a webhook will be triggered to the partner and all subscribers indicating that MM Lite onboarding is complete, and including the linked Ad IDs.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">The partner may now call the “send” endpoint of MM Lite on this business’ behalf, and call an API to fetch an updated token with permission to access the business’ Ad account metrics.</li></span></ol><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">See API docs for details on this new onboarding flow.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div improvements:</div><div id="documentheading-4-component-updates-flow-json-version-61"><div id="component-updates-flow-json-version-61" style="scroll-margin-top:80px"><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#calendarpicker" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">CalendarPicker component</a></h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
New component that allows users to select a single date or a range of dates from a more user-friendly full calendar view making it easier to navigate dates and visualize date availability.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><div id="documentheading-4-flow-json-version-60"><div id="flow-json-version-60" style="scroll-margin-top:80px"><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x6s0dn4 x78zum5 x1r0jzty x17zd0t2 xyamay9"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms">Flow JSON Version 6.0</h4><div class="x1i10hfl x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x1n2onr6 x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1hl2dhg x1lku1pv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek x197sbye x78zum5 xl56j7k x6s0dn4 x4nc2kg x155eyjv xrpzz58 x102p2p6 xus0ocu x1c9tyrk xeusxvb x1pahc9y x1ertn4p x1td3qas x10w6t97 x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd" role="button" tabindex="0"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="1em" height="1em" aria-hidden="true" class="x1lliihq x1d43ie2 xlup9mm x1kky2od" role="img"><path d="M12.924 5.14c1.42-1.52 3.565-1.52 4.986 0 1.438 1.54 1.438 3.997 0 5.536l-2.007 2.138c-1.42 1.521-3.565 1.521-4.986 0a1 1 0 1 0-1.461 1.366c2.211 2.367 5.697 2.367 7.908 0l2.006-2.137c2.149-2.297 2.148-5.97.001-8.268-2.208-2.364-5.688-2.367-7.9-.01L8.582 6.71a1 1 0 0 0 1.426 1.401c.972-.989 1.97-1.957 2.917-2.97z"></path><path d="M8.23 11.91c1.427-1.4 3.618-1.399 5.045.001a1 1 0 0 0 1.4-1.427 5.556 5.556 0 0 0-7.847 0L4.66 12.623c-2.215 2.174-2.215 5.579 0 7.752a5.556 5.556 0 0 0 7.84.01l2.157-2.014a1 1 0 1 0-1.365-1.462l-2.172 2.027c-1.418 1.368-3.639 1.405-5.059.012-1.416-1.39-1.416-3.509 0-4.899L8.23 11.91z"></path></svg></div></div></div></div><div>
Version 6.0 introduces three backwards incompatible changes:
</div><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
String values in component properties can&#x27;t be empty. Previously values such as “”, “ “, “\n”, “\t”, “\n” were accepted; from version 6.0 these are no longer valid.
</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Maximum image size for list components (Checkbox Group, Radio Buttons Group, Dropdown) is reduced from 300KB to 100KB.
</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
If on-select-action is present on the component level, it will be triggered when the new screen is rendered, whether via cache or back-and-forth navigation.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">This new version is fully available now, and introduces the following new features:</div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/flowjson#nested_expressions" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">Nested Expressions and string concatenation in component properties</a></h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Boolean expressions and string concatenation can now be used in component properties. Expressions can combine static and dynamic data.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/flowjson#update-data-action" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">New update_data action</a></h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
A new action has been added to support dynamic updates of the current screen based on user interactions. This action can be used to update elements on the same screen in response to user inputs, handle dynamic data relationships, promote reusable templates, and more.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">New on-unselect-action property</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
A new property has been added to several <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">components</a> that works similarly to the existing on-select-action but will allow  changes made by the update_data operation in the on-select-action to be reverted.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">OptIn and EmbeddedLink can now open external links</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
A new action <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/flowjson#open-url-action" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">open_url</a> can be used in on-click-action to open external links in Flows from EmbeddedLink and OptIn components. These external links will open in the device&#x27;s default browser.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We are introducing a new page within the Builder, and improvements to the API and onboarding through the UI:</div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Business insights</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Statistics on how consumers interact with your Flows can now be found on the builder on published Flows. These metrics help track Flow performance and reveal usage trends, including the count of user interactions with Flows.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/lifecycle" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">Published Flows can now be edited</a></h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
All new Flows can be edited by updating their metadata or Flow JSON via API, even after they have been published. This enables changes to be made directly within the same Flow, allowing messages to be sent with the updated content using the same Flow ID, eliminating the need to recreate the Flow.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/></div><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Simplified Flows onboarding</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
All businesses can now start creating and building Flows. To send and publish a Flow, business verification and high message quality are still <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/gettingstarted#prerequisites" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">required</a>.
</li></span><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Pricing webhooks</li></span></ol><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">For full details on how to see MM Lite API metrics via API and in pricing webhooks, consult  the MM Lite API docs.</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">In the Marketing API “Insights API” response, MM Lite events can be return using fields named <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">marketing_messages_[event]</code></li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">In the Business Management API “Template Analytics” endpoint, MM Lite events can be returned using the query parameter <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">MARKETING_MESSAGES_LITE_API</code></li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">In the Business Management API “Conversation Analytics” endpoints, MM Lite events can be returned using the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">product_type</code> query parameter `MARKETING_LITE’</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">In message status webhooks, the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">conversation:origin:type</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">pricing:category</code> fields will show as <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">marketing_lite</code></li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Businesses can now see MM Lite metrics as “Marketing - lite” in the WhatsApp Manager UI:</div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center"><img alt="" class="x193iq5w x1ypdohk" src="https://scontent-atl3-3.xx.fbcdn.net/v/t39.2365-6/475969840_997283928986096_7019011551543213590_n.png?_nc_cat=107&amp;ccb=1-7&amp;_nc_sid=e280be&amp;_nc_ohc=m5kmk65Y2k0Q7kNvwHT9ui1&amp;_nc_oc=AdpTUf1UfABC9Os4M-IlKHcdf7UZEWdacDY6KuGNNLSf_UHS1I10FsMRtSnXymKIT4U&amp;_nc_zt=14&amp;_nc_ht=scontent-atl3-3.xx&amp;_nc_gid=RHEV_6KSkRjmUKf8pRzU9Q&amp;_nc_ss=7f20f&amp;oh=00_AQCrQAC5SViODnlaBaD4n1tckKwr3UPVliN9ER86iiF22Q&amp;oe=6A72E3E3" x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We recommend you integrate with the Marketing API “Insights API” for MM Lite Metrics, and encourage end businesses to log into Ads Manager UI to see their metrics, instead of using the WhatsApp business surface.  Ads Mgr UI and Insights API show conversion metrics that are not available on WhatsApp surfaces, and will continue to support new metrics and features as the primary surface for MM Lite API reporting as the API grows.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Exclusive feature: TTLs for Marketing messages</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We continue to invest to improve consumer experiences and business outcomes. We are introducing customizable message validity periods (time-to-live or TTL) for marketing messages on MM Lite API, to ensure marketing messages are always timely and relevant for users thus performant for businesses. We are also updating our customizable range for TTL for utility and authentication templates, to provide businesses more control and flexibility.</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Marketing: From 12 hours to 30 days, for businesses on MM Lite API</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Utility: From 30 seconds to 12 hours, for businesses on Cloud API</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Authentication: From 30 seconds to 15 minutes, for businesses on Cloud API or On-Premises API</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Businesses can customize the TTL of marketing, utility and authentication templates during template creation via WhatsApp Manager (via pre-set increments) and via API (in 1-second increments). x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We are adding some tooling improvements to both the API and Flows Builder.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/sendingaflow#sending-a-flow" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">Flows can be referenced by name using the API</a></h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Flow messages can be sent using the Flow&#x27;s name instead of its ID, which is useful when you have clones of the same Flow in multiple WhatsApp Business Accounts with different Flow IDs.
</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
You can also create a message template with a Flow using the Flow&#x27;s name.
</li></span></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Flow JSON can be used when creating Message Templates through the API</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
It is now possible to provide Flow JSON as part of the request payload when <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/flows-templates" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">creating Message Templates with a Flow attached</a>, so you don&#x27;t need to create and publish a Flow as a previous step.
</li></span></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Endpoint setup on Flows builder has a dedicated section</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Flows with endpoint can be configured on a dedicated tab at the bottom of the Flows builder. Other endpoint-related features can also be found there, such as snippets and links to the documentation.
</li></span></div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Starting with version 21.0 the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">package_name</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">signature_hash</code> parameters must be defined within the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">supported_apps</code> array when creating <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek tabindex="0">one-tap autofill</a> and <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/templates/authentication-templates/zero-tap-authentication-templates#post-body" role="link" tabindex="0">zero-tap</a> authentication templates.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Starting with version 21.0, to enable <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/local-storage" role="link" tabindex="0">local storage</a> on a business phone number, the number must be in an unregistered state, and you must use the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/reference/whatsapp-business-phone-number/settings-api#Updating" role="link" tabindex="0"><strong>POST /&lt;WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_PHONE_NUMBER&gt;/settings</strong></a> endpoint to enable local storage before registering the number (instead of enabling during registration). To support these changes:
    <ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5 x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Added a <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">storage_configuration</code> parameter to the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/reference/whatsapp-business-phone-number/settings-api#Updating" role="link" tabindex="0"><strong>POST /&lt;WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_PHONE_NUMBER&gt;/settings</strong></a> endpoint, which can be used to enable or disable local storage.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Removed the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">data_localization_region</code> parameter from the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/reference/whatsapp-business-phone-number/register-api#Creating" role="link" tabindex="0"><strong>POST /&lt;WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_PHONE_NUMBER&gt;/register</strong></a> endpoint.</li></span></ul></li></span></ul><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#richtext" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">RichText component</a></h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
You can use this component to render text with rich formatting options. The following markdown syntax is supported:
</li></span><div style="padding-left:90px">
- Heading and Subheading
</div><div style="padding-left:90px">
- Text formatting (italic, bold, strikethrough)
</div><div style="padding-left:90px">
- Basic lists
</div><div style="padding-left:90px">
- Links
</div><div style="padding-left:90px">
- Images
</div><div style="padding-left:90px">
- Tables
</div></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#text" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">TextBody and TextCaption</a> can use markdown</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
A new property &quot;markdown&quot; can be used with both components, which allows to use a subset of the RichText capabilities.
</li></span></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Flow termination message has a new look</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
SMBs are now able to view the responses received for Flows completion and download them in CSV format. Consumers will soon also be able to view the information submitted when completing the Flow.
</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
In Flow JSON, <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/flowjson#additional-information-on-sensitive-fields" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">certain fields can now be marked as &quot;sensitive&quot;</a> so that data for those fields is not visible as part of the response details displayed to the user.
</li></span></div><div id="documentheading-4-developer-tooling-improvements"><div id="developer-tooling-improvements" style="scroll-margin-top:80px"><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x6s0dn4 x78zum5 xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/flowsapi#preview" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">Web preview</a> now can be used in interactive mode and inside an iframe</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
The preview URL can be configured with new parameters to make it interactive and show a debug panel. It works with Flows with and without an endpoint.
</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
It can also be embedded as an iframe, so it can be integrated into an existing website.
</li></span></div><div id="documentheading-4-flows-data-endpoint-improvements"><div id="flows-data-endpoint-improvements" style="scroll-margin-top:80px"><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x6s0dn4 x78zum5 x1r0jzty x17zd0t2 xyamay9"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms">Flows data endpoint improvements</h4><div class="x1i10hfl x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x1n2onr6 x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1hl2dhg x1lku1pv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek x197sbye x78zum5 xl56j7k x6s0dn4 x4nc2kg x155eyjv xrpzz58 x102p2p6 xus0ocu x1c9tyrk xeusxvb x1pahc9y x1ertn4p x1td3qas x10w6t97 x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd" role="button" tabindex="0"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="1em" height="1em" aria-hidden="true" class="x1lliihq x1d43ie2 xlup9mm x1kky2od" role="img"><path d="M12.924 5.14c1.42-1.52 3.565-1.52 4.986 0 1.438 1.54 1.438 3.997 0 5.536l-2.007 2.138c-1.42 1.521-3.565 1.521-4.986 0a1 1 0 1 0-1.461 1.366c2.211 2.367 5.697 2.367 7.908 0l2.006-2.137c2.149-2.297 2.148-5.97.001-8.268-2.208-2.364-5.688-2.367-7.9-.01L8.582 6.71a1 1 0 0 0 1.426 1.401c.972-.989 1.97-1.957 2.917-2.97z"></path><path d="M8.23 11.91c1.427-1.4 3.618-1.399 5.045.001a1 1 0 0 0 1.4-1.427 5.556 5.556 0 0 0-7.847 0L4.66 12.623c-2.215 2.174-2.215 5.579 0 7.752a5.556 5.556 0 0 0 7.84.01l2.157-2.014a1 1 0 1 0-1.365-1.462l-2.172 2.027c-1.418 1.368-3.639 1.405-5.059.012-1.416-1.39-1.416-3.509 0-4.899L8.23 11.91z"></path></svg></div></div></div></div><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>

class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#dp" role="link" tabindex="0">DatePicker</a> components now receive and set dates in “YYYY-MM-DD” format, which makes the values unrelated to time zones (<a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#datepicker-from-v5" role="link" tabindex="0">more details</a>).</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">No additional changes are required to port a Flow from version 4.0 to 5.0, which will unlock your access to the following new functionality:</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Images and colors are now available in Pickers</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Added support for displaying images and colors in list components (<a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#radio" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">RadioButtonsGroup</a>, <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#checkbox" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">CheckboxGroup</a>, <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#drop" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">Dropdown</a>).

It is now possible to have up to 10 media files sent as part of the response message, with the combined size of all files up to 100MB.
</li></span></div><div id="documentheading-4-developer-tooling-improvements"><div id="developer-tooling-improvements" style="scroll-margin-top:80px"><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x6s0dn4 x78zum5 a few improvements to help developers onboard and debug Flows with endpoint.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
It is now possible to query flow health status using new health_status field and get status of Flow health and other related entities like WABA, Business which are involved in message sending (<a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/flowsapi#details" role="link" tabindex="0" target="_blank">more details</a>).
</li></span></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">New templates and development guides</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
New refined templates are now available in Flows Builder with dedicated development guides and endpoint templates ready to use.
</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
You can find them under the Flow creation screen on WhatsApp Manager, or following the links below:
</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww
