x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We are introducing a new Flow JSON version which contains several enhancements (described in detail below). You can now create new Flows with this version to leverage the new functionality.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Upgrading Flows to version 4.0 from 3.1:</em> Version 4.0 introduces two minor backwards incompatible changes, which means you may need to make some tweaks after cloning an existing version 3.1 Flow. Specifically:</div><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
All <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#checkbox" role="link" tabindex="0">CheckboxGroup</a></code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#radio" role="link" tabindex="0">RadioButtonsGroup</a></code> components now require a <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">label</code> property (previously optional)
</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
The <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">name</code> property for all <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components" role="link" tabindex="0">input and selection components</a>  cannot be empty. Previously values such as “”, “ “, “\n”, “\t”, “\n”  were accepted; with version 4.0 these are no longer valid.
</li></span><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><br/>
No additional changes are required to port your version 3.1 Flow to version 4.0, which will unlock your access to the following new functionality:</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">[Component] Image and Document upload</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
New <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/media_upload" role="link" tabindex="0"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk">PhotoPicker</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk">DocumentPicker</code> components</a>. These components allow users to share images and documents, respectively, within a Flow, leveraging the existing and familiar WhatsApp UX.
</li></span><br/><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">[Component] Group components <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">label</code> improvements</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
The <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#checkbox" role="link" tabindex="0">CheckboxGroup</a></code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#radio" role="link" tabindex="0">RadioButtonsGroup</a></code> components now support a higher character limit for the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">label</code> property, and additionally support a new <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">description</code> property, which can be used to provide more information to users about the selection options.
</li></span><br/><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">[Comoponents] Conditional Component Rendering</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
You can now show/hide components, based on user input or Business data, without the need to trigger a <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">data_exchange</code> to your Flows Endpoint, by leveraging the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#if" role="link" tabindex="0">If</a></code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components#switch" role="link" tabindex="0">Switch</a></code> Components within the Flow JSON.
</li></span><br/><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">[Flow JSON Capabilities] Global Dynamic Data Access</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
You can now reference <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">Form</code> and dynamic data from any screen in the Flow JSON using <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/flowjson#global-data" role="link" tabindex="0">global accessor syntax</a>. This means you no longer need to explicitly propagate data from screen-to-screen.
</li></span><br/><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">[Flow JSON Capabilities] Optional Form</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
The use of the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">Form</code> component is now <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/flowjson#forms-and-form-properties" role="link" tabindex="0">optional</a>. This means that you can access user-entered data without the need to wrap your components inside a <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">Form</code> component.
</li></span></div></div><div id="documentheading-4-developer-tooling-improvements"><div id="developer-tooling-improvements" style="scroll-margin-top:80px"><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x6s0dn4 x78zum5 x1r0jzty x17zd0t2 xyamay9"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms">Developer Tooling Improvements</h4><div class="x1i10hfl x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x1n2onr6 x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1hl2dhg x1lku1pv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek x197sbye x78zum5 xl56j7k x6s0dn4 x4nc2kg x155eyjv xrpzz58 x102p2p6 xus0ocu x1c9tyrk xeusxvb x1pahc9y x1ertn4p x1td3qas x10w6t97 x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd" role="button" tabindex="0"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="1em" height="1em" aria-hidden="true" class="x1lliihq x1d43ie2 xlup9mm x1kky2od" role="img"><path d="M12.924 5.14c1.42-1.52 3.565-1.52 4.986 0 1.438 1.54 1.438 3.997 0 5.536l-2.007 2.138c-1.42 1.521-3.565 1.521-4.986 0a1 1 0 1 0-1.461 1.366c2.211 2.367 5.697 2.367 7.908 0l2.006-2.137c2.149-2.297 2.148-5.97.001-8.268-2.208-2.364-5.688-2.367-7.9-.01L8.582 6.71a1 1 0 0 0 1.426 1.401c.972-.989 1.97-1.957 2.917-2.97z"></path><path d="M8.23 11.91c1.427-1.4 3.618-1.399 5.045.001a1 1 0 0 0 1.4-1.427 5.556 5.556 0 0 0-7.847 0L4.66 12.623c-2.215 2.174-2.215 5.579 0 7.752a5.556 5.556 0 0 0 7.84.01l2.157-2.014a1 1 0 1 0-1.365-1.462l-2.172 2.027c-1.418 1.368-3.639 1.405-5.059.012-1.416-1.39-1.416-3.509 0-4.899L8.23 11.91z"></path></svg></div></div></div></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We are introducing several improvements to help developers onboard and use Flows.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">[Developer Tools] Improved Flows Preview in the WhatsApp Manager Builder, and in Developer Docs</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Better/snappier preview loading and saving performance.
</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Ability to simulate iOS and dark theme modes.
</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Mobile-like bottom sheet experience within the Flows Builder editor, which displays Flow JSON error(s).
</li></span><br/><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">[Developer Tools] Update Application linked to a Flow through the Flows API</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Added an optional application ID parameter to the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/flowsapi#update" role="link" tabindex="0">Update Flow API request</a>.
</li></span><br/><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">[Developer Tools] Send-Time validation of the screen name in &quot;navigate&quot; action</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Added validation of the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">screen</code> parameter in the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/sendingaflow" role="link" tabindex="0">message payload at Flow message send time</a> if the action is <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">navigate</code>: invalid screens (i.e. screens that are no defined in the Flow JSON, or screens which cannot act as a first screen) will be rejected, and an API error will be returned.
</li></span></div></div><div id="documentheading-4-improved-flows-experience-for-users"><div id="improved-flows-experience-for-users" style="scroll-margin-top:80px"><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x6s0dn4 class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We are releasing several improvements to the UX of Flows. These changes are not tied to a Flow JSON version; that is, they will apply to any Flows being actively sent.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Progress Indicator</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
We have introduced a new feature to visually inform users about how much progress is left to complete the Flow. This is applicable for any Flows with more than one screen.
</li></span><br/><h4 class="x19a1ety x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xyamay9">Text Truncation improvements</h4><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li>
Optimized the character limit strategy for <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/guides/components" role="link" tabindex="0">components</a> to maximize the amount of content displayed based on device resolution.
</li></span></div></div><div id="documentheading-4-stopping-whatsapp-flows-support-on-android-os-5xx"><div id="stopping-whatsapp-flows-support-on-android-os-5xx" style="scroll-margin-top:80px"><div xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">
As announced in <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/changelogs#may-2024-release" role="link" tabindex="0">May</a>, we have now stopped support for Flows on Android devices running OS 5.x.x and older. This means that Flow messages sent to users on such devices will not be delivered, and you  will receive a <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/webhooks/overview#fields" role="link" tabindex="0">webhook</a> containing a “Message Undeliverable” error. For more details on this error, please refer to the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/support/error-codes#error-codes" role="link" tabindex="0">error codes documentation.</a></div></div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Starting June 11th, 2024, WhatsApp Flows will only be supported on Android OS 6.0 and newer versions. This means that businesses will no longer be able to send Flow messages to users with Android OS 5.x.x devices and will receive a <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/webhooks/overview#fields" role="link" tabindex="0">webhook</a> containing a “Message Undeliverable” error when trying to do so. For more details on error, please refer to the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/support/error-codes#error-codes" role="link" tabindex="0">error codes</a>.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Extend the support of the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/flows/gettingstarted" role="link" tabindex="0">opt-in component</a> in the Message Templates in Flows UI editor to xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">This feature enables you to display additional information (for example, terms and conditions) on a separate screen instead of cluttering the main Flow screen. This improves the user experience and simplifies the Flow creation process.</li></span></ul><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r delivered template message should display an autofill button or copy code button.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh Message Templates</a> endpoint.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Added <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">INCORRECT_CATEGORY</code> as a new rejection <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">reason</code> value for <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/webhooks/overview" role="link" tabindex="0">template status webhooks</a>.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Templates that rely on variables now require sample values upon <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/templates/overview" role="link" tabindex="0">creation or editing</a>. Applies to all versions.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Added <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">previous_category</code> field to <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/reference/whatsapp-business-account/template-api" role="link" tabindex="0">WhatsApp Message Templates</a>.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Business-initiated conversations are no longer eligible for free tier conversations. If your WhatsApp Business Account relies on the services of a Solution Partner or a Meta partner, you are exempt from these changes until June 1, 2023.</li></span></ul><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr Changes to message template categories, API error responses, and webhooks have been introduced as part of this version.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Cloud API</em></div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Templates <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/templates/overview" role="link" tabindex="0">created or edited</a> using v16.0 must now be categorized using one of the following categories; all other categories are no longer supported. Applies to Cloud API v16.0+. Will apply to all versions May 1, 2023. This change has been introduced to support our June 1, 2023 switch to a new conversation-based pricing model.</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5 x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">AUTHENTICATION</code></li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">MARKETING</code></li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">UTILITY</code></li></span></ul></li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Error subcodes, which are rarely used and should not be relied upon, will no longer be included in v16.0+ error responses. Use <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">code</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">details</code> instead.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Error code 100 (<code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">&quot;code&quot;:100</code>) had multiple unique titles which indicated the nature of a given 100 error. All code 100 errors will now use <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">Invalid parameter</code> as their title. Old titles that described the nature of a given code 100 error have been moved to the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">details</code> property. This change is also now reflected in webhooks payloads that describe a code 100 error response.</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Cloud API Webhooks</em></div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">The <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">errors</code> object in webhooks triggered by v16.0+ request errors now include <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">message</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">error_data.details</code> properties, and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">title</code> values have changed for multiple error codes. Now, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">errors</code> objects have the following structure and data:</li></span></ul><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x78zum5 x1q0g3np x1n2onr6 x1bgx8a2 x6nl9eh x1a5l9x9 x7vuprf x1mg3h75 xod5an3 xyamay9 xv54qhq x1l90r2v xf7dkkf"><pre class="_ar4n xk4td0m xj0a0fe x1lliihq x1t4azzi xh8yej3"><div style="overflow-x:auto"><pre data-lang="json">[
  {
    &quot;code&quot;: &lt;CODE&gt;,
    &quot;title&quot; : &quot;&lt;TITLE&gt;&quot;,
    &quot;message&quot;: &quot;&lt;MESSAGE&gt;&quot;,
    &quot;error_data&quot;: {
      &quot;details&quot;: &quot;&lt;DETAILS&gt;&quot;
    }
  },
  ...
]</pre></div></pre><div class="x1i10hfl x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1hl2dhg x1lku1pv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek x197sbye x78zum5 xl56j7k x6s0dn4 x4nc2kg x178xt8z x1lun4ml xso031l xpilrb4 x155eyjv xrpzz58 x102p2p6 xus0ocu x1c9tyrk xeusxvb x1pahc9y x1ertn4p x1td3qas x10w6t97 x10l6tqk x131sewu x1eu8d0j" role="button" tabindex="0"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="1em" height="1em" aria-hidden="true" class="x1lliihq x1d43ie2 xlup9mm x1kky2od" role="img"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5 14h1v2H5a3 3 0 0 1-3-3V5a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h8a3 3 0 0 1 3 3v1h-2V5a1 1 0 0 0-1-1H5a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v8a1 1 0 0 0 1 1zm14 6h-8a1 1 0 0 1-1-1v-8a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h8a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v8a1 1 0 0 1-1 1zm3-1a3 3 0 0 1-3 3h-8a3 3 0 0 1-3-3v-8a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h8a3 3 0 0 1 3 3v8z"></path></svg></div></div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">The <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">title</code> property value has been updated for the following error codes. This property maps to the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">message</code> property in <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/support/error-codes" role="link" tabindex="0">API error response payloads</a>.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">The <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">error_data.details</code> property now includes error code titles from the error codes listed above and describes the underlying cause of the error. xod5an3"><strong>Messages Per Second</strong></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Cloud API now supports up to 500 (up from 350) messages per second (mps) of combined text and media messages, by request. See <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/throughput" role="link" tabindex="0">Throughput</a> for details.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">If you already have 350 mps it will be increased to 500 mps automatically. If you already requested 350 mps but the process has not been completed, you will receive 500 mps upon completion.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>Media HTTP Caching</strong></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We are now beta testing Cloud API media HTTP caching. If you are a Solution Partner, see <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/messages/send-messages#media-http-caching" role="link" tabindex="0">Media HTTP Caching</a> to learn how to use headers in your server responses that instruct us to cache your media assets for reuse with future messages.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>Document Captions</strong></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Cloud API now supports captions on documents sent to and received from customers. class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Starting in <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.43</code>, there will be changes to the behavior of the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/on-premises/reference/contacts" role="link" tabindex="0"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk">contacts</code> endpoint</a></li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/on-premises/reference/contacts#returned-fields" role="link" tabindex="0">Responses for <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk">status</code> will change</a>. Regardless of whether a user has WhatsApp, it will always return <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">valid</code> for <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">status</code> in the response and a <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">wa_id</code>. There is no guarantee that the returned wa_id will be valid. These changes are applicable for both direct responses, as well as webhook responses for non-blocking calls</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Ensure your code avoids relying on <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">status</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">wa_id</code> returned in the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">contacts</code> node. In addition, <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/on-premises/reference/messages" role="link" tabindex="0">sending a message</a> on <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.39.1</code> or higher can be completed without calling the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">contacts</code> node</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Ensure your code handles a potential <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">1013</code> <strong>User is not valid</strong> error when trying to send a template message, which will be returned if you attempt to send the template message to a phone number without a WhatsApp account</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">For non template messages, sending a message to a phone number without a WhatsApp account will return a <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">470</code> error</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>v2.45, January 10, 2023</strong></div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Starting in <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.45</code>, the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/multiconnect_mc#parameters" role="link" tabindex="0">optional <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk">cert</code> parameter</a> in the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">shards</code> node will become mandatory for all requests. Please update your integration to always include a valid <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">cert</code> when calling the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">shards</code> node</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Starting in <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.41.2</code>, businesses can use the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/on-premises/reference/settings/app" role="link" tabindex="0"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk">application</code> node</a> to filter out sent message statuses they are not interested in through the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">message</code> object within the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">webhooks</code> object. In <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.45</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">sent_status</code> will be deprecated, so update your integration to use the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/on-premises/reference/settings/app#webhooks" role="link" tabindex="0"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk">webhooks</code> object in the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk">application</code> node</a> for all webhook controls</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">As of <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.39.1</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">recipient_id</code> is available in both the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/on-premises/webhooks/outbound#status--message-sent" role="link" tabindex="0"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk">statuses</code> object</a> and in the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">message</code> object. In <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.45</code>, <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">recipient_id</code> will be removed in the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/on-premises/webhooks/outbound#status--message-sent" role="link" tabindex="0"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk">statuses</code> object</a>, so update your integration to use <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">recipient_id</code> under the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">message</code> object</li></span></ul><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div aria-controls="_R_t4r9kldcpfilipamH1_" aria-expanded="true" class="x1i10hfl x1qjc9v5 xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi xic5ynp x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl xvngds4">Webhook Subscriptions</span></div><div class="x6s0dn4 xqdkwz8 x1obq294 x5a5i1n xde0f50 x15x8krk x3nfvp2 xxk0z11 x4p5aij x1120s5i xmzvs34 xf159sx"><span class="x1dg8jwx xa6yr5q xm5vtmc xsp84uj x1ig1luc x1366vqa x11aqsfc x1k03ns3 xcxolhg x13qsfg9 xml9wff x1lvncci xrm2kyc x1i6xp69 xic5ynp x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl xvngds4">Message Templates</span></div></div><!--$--><h1 class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x1r28tcg x1yxlzaz xsp84uj x1tbo4zr x1366vqa xme0v8z xakorsv xcxolhg xn57rk6 xml9wff xcgl0sk x1hhp1i x1i6xp69 xkifxcc x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xz9dl7a xsag5q8"></h1><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Cloud API</em></div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">You can now use different callback URLs for each of your WhatsApp Business Accounts without having to create a unique app for each WhatsApp Business Account. See <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/solution-providers/manage-webhooks#overriding-the-callback-url" role="link" tabindex="0">Overriding the Callback URL</a> for details.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">All Cloud API endpoints now support version 15 calls.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Text parameters (<code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">components.parameters.text</code>) for message templates that only use a body component (<code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">components.type:body</code>) can now total up to 32,768 characters. See <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/reference/whatsapp-business-phone-number/message-api" role="link" tabindex="0">Parameters object</a>.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Cloud API now supports up to 350 (up from 250) messages per second (mps) of combined text and media messages, by request. See <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/throughput" role="link" tabindex="0">Throughput</a> for details. If you already have 250 mps it will be increased to 350 mps automatically. If you already requested 250 mps but the process has not been completed, you will receive 350 mps upon completion.</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Embedded Signup</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/embedded-signup/overview" role="link" tabindex="0">Embedded Signup</a> now supports mobile web browsers. The user interface will automatically optimize for a mobile experience when it detects that the viewer is using a mobile web browser.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Businesses that have been onboarded by a Solution Partner through the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/embedded-signup/overview" role="link" tabindex="0">Embedded Signup</a> or “On Behalf Of” process can now initiate up to 250 conversations with unique class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">You can now include animated stickers in outbound, business-initiated messages and receive <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/webhooks/reference/messages" role="link" tabindex="0">message webhooks</a> describing those messages the same way you would if you were sending a non-animated sticker. Refer to the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/reference/whatsapp-business-phone-number/message-api" role="link" tabindex="0">Message</a> object’s <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">sticker</code> property and for animated sticker asset requirements.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">You can now include products and services in messages sent to customers, and customers can add them to shopping carts without having to leave the chat thread. Refer to the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Businesses can now reply to any message in a conversation thread. Replies will include a contextual bubble referencing the replied-to message. Refer to the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/messages/send-messages#replies" role="link" tabindex="0">Send Messages</a> guide to learn how to reply to a message.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Cloud API now supports up to 250 messages per second of combined sending and receiving (inclusive of text and media messages), by request. If you are an enterprise partner you can open a <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>Best practices for a seamless upgrade to v2.41.2</strong></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">In v2.41.2, we are introducing DB schema changes to improve the performance of the system. As a result, upgrades from v2.37.2 and v2.39.x for set ups with large databases which have millions of message and contact entries will take longer than usual.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Generally, perform upgrades during off-peak hours and upgrade lower-throughput setups first.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">For large databases, follow these steps:</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Run garbage collection via the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/on-premises/reference/services" role="link" tabindex="0">/services/message/gc</a> endpoint before your upgrade, and ensure it completes successfully</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Please use the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/on-premises/get-started/installation/dev-multiconnect#for-mysql-database-users-upgrading-to-v2-23-x-and-above" role="link" tabindex="0">dbupgrade tool</a> to upgrade the DB schemas prior to the version upgrade.</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Once done, you will be able to upgrade API versions with minimal down time. It is strongly recommended to bring the API client down before using the dbupgrade tool.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Ensure the dbupgrade tool completes successfully (exit code 0), and avoid or limit API requests while the upgrade is taking place.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We recommend increasing the query timeout on your database servers to one hour, until the upgrade completes successfully.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>v2.41.2 features and updates</strong></div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Improvements to the latency of the bulk <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/on-premises/reference/contacts" role="link" tabindex="0">/contacts</a> endpoint requests and resolution of deadlock issues.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Improvements to the performance and reliability of the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/on-premises/reference/services" role="link" tabindex="0">garbage collection process</a>.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Businesses now have the ability to enable/disable <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">delivered</code> and <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">read</code> webhook notifications which gives them greater control over webhook notifications for messages. This can be achieved through the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/on-premises/reference/settings/app" role="link" tabindex="0">settings/applications</a> endpoint.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc style="transition-duration:250ms"><div class="xyamay9 x1l90r2v xf7dkkf xv54qhq"><!--$--><h1 class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x1r28tcg x1yxlzaz xsp84uj x1tbo4zr x1366vqa xme0v8z xakorsv xcxolhg xn57rk6 xml9wff xcgl0sk x1hhp1i x1i6xp69 xkifxcc x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xz9dl7a xsag5q8"></h1><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>On-Premises API</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>v2.39.4</strong></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">This client version contains all features and fixes shipped with <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.39.1</code>. Additionally, this release:</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Fixes a bug that prevented video messages from being sent under certain circumstances. <em>This fix was also included in <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.39.2</code>.</em></li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Fixes a bug that prevented businesses from sending messages to a customer, if the customer was the first to initiate an interaction between the two parties on WhatsApp, and that initiation happened more than 7 days ago. This fix was also included in <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.39.3</code>.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Fixes a bug that prevented businesses from receiving disappearing messages from customers. After <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.39.4</code> is installed, businesses will get notified they received a disappearing message by a webhooks notification with type set to <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">&quot;ephemeral&quot;</code>. Businesses will not be able to see the message’s content.</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">When we launched <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.39.3</code>, the disappearing messages issue was handled by WhatsApp automatically disabling these messages in the chat thread with the client. For <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.39.4</code>, we will not do that. With this version, businesses that receive disappearing messages must ask the customer to disable disappearing messages and resend their latest message.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr class="xyamay9 x1l90r2v xf7dkkf xv54qhq"><!--$--><h1 class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x1r28tcg x1yxlzaz xsp84uj x1tbo4zr x1366vqa xme0v8z xakorsv xcxolhg xn57rk6 xml9wff xcgl0sk x1hhp1i x1i6xp69 xkifxcc x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x1a2a7pz x6094ms xz9dl7a xsag5q8"></h1><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Embedded Signup</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We’re making it easier for businesses and partners to scale on the WhatsApp Business Platform with an improved onboarding experience. Starting May 2, 2022, businesses will be able to message customers immediately after signup and only need to complete Business Verification when they’re ready to scale business-initiated conversations or request to become an Official Business Account.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">The changes mean that onboarded businesses will be able to:</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Respond to unlimited customer-initiated conversations.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Send business-initiated conversations to 50 unique customers in a rolling 24-hour period.</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">These are the changes being implemented on May 2, 2022:</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">WhatsApp Account checks and display name review will no longer be a requirement to get started on the platform. After signup, a compliance check with the WhatsApp Platform Policy Checks will be auto-triggered and will be performed in the background.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Display name review will be initiated after Business Verification is completed. Businesses should still follow the display name best practice guidelines when adding a new phone number. For more information, see Display Names.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Business Verification only needs to be completed when businesses are ready to scale business-initiated conversations or request to become an Official Business Account (OBA). For more information, see how to increase limits.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Since businesses get access to sending messages after sign up, the Unverified Trial Experience will be deprecated.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Businesses will be able to see the messaging limits in the Overview Dashboard in WhatsApp Manager -after completing the signup process.</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">The changes listed above have no impact on pricing. See pricing for more details.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Cloud API</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Starting today, the Cloud API is generally available to all existing Solution Partners and direct clients. Additionally, we’re releasing the following features for Cloud API developers:</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><strong>Messages with Stickers</strong>: Send media messages containing third-party static stickers. See the following documentation for more details: <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/reference/whatsapp-business-phone-number/message-api" role="link" tabindex="0">Reference, Messages</a> and <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/business-phone-numbers/media" role="link" tabindex="0">Reference, Media</a>. We support inbound both and outbound stickers. For outbound, we only support static third-party stickers. For inbound, we support all types of stickers.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><strong>Deregister Phone Number API</strong>: Make <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">POST</code> calls to <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">PHONE_NUMBER_ID/deregister</code> in order to remove a phone number from the WhatsApp Business API. See <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/business-phone-numbers/registration#deregister-phone" role="link" tabindex="0">Registration</a> for information.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><strong>New Phone Verification Option</strong>: Verify your business phone number via Graph API calls. See <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/business-phone-numbers/phone-numbers#verify" role="link" tabindex="0">Phone Numbers</a> for information.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><strong>New Referral Webhooks</strong>: Receive Webhooks notifications when a user clicks on an ad that clicks to WhatsApp and sends a message to the business. See <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/webhooks/overview#received-message-triggered-by-click-to-whatsapp-ads" role="link" tabindex="0">Webhooks</a> for information. Be aware that the Cloud API’s webhooks <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">referral</code> object is different from the On-Premises API’s <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">referral</code> object.</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Additionally, we are announcing that App Review is no longer required for first-party developers using the Cloud API. All developers are subject to the <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/messaging-limits#messaging" role="link" tabindex="0">WhatsApp Business Platform messaging limits</a>.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 features as   <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r xnxqytt">v2.37.2</code> expires on Sep 22, 2022.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Known Issues:</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Some Kubernetes developers may see <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">CrashLoopBackOff</code> for their webapp container and their container may fail to start. To fix that, add following line in the Kubernetes deployment <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">YML</code> file under webapp configuration:</div><div class="xeuugli x2lwn1j x78zum5 x1q0g3np x1n2onr6 x1bgx8a2 x6nl9eh x1a5l9x9 x7vuprf x1mg3h75 xod5an3 xyamay9 xv54qhq x1l90r2v xf7dkkf"><pre class="_ar4n prettyprint xk4td0m xj0a0fe x1lliihq x1t4azzi xh8yej3"><code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">command: [&quot;/opt/whatsapp/bin/wait_on_mysql.sh&quot;, &quot;/opt/whatsapp/bin/launch_within_docker.sh&quot;]
</code></pre><div class="x1i10hfl x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl
