x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>v2.39.3</strong></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">The <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.39.3</code> version of our Business API client is available for developers today. The new client includes two fixes and additional logs to support debugging. The two fixes are:</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Fixed a bug that prevented businesses from sending messages to a customer, if the customer was the first to initiate an interaction between the two parties on WhatsApp, and that initiation happened more than 7 days ago.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Fixed a bug that prevented businesses from receiving disappearing messages from customers. After v2.39.3 is installed, businesses will get notified they received a disappearing message by a webhooks notification. On their end, customers will see a warning saying that the disappearing messages mode has been turned off.</li></span></ul><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3 x13zrc24 x1t1ogtf"><div aria-controls="_R_u6r9kldcpfilipamH1_" aria-expanded="true" class="x1i10hfl x1qjc9v5 API <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.39.2</code>. This version fixes a bug that prevented video messages from being sent under certain circumstances.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Known Issues:</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">A bug exists that prevents businesses from sending messages to a customer, if the customer was the first to initiate an interaction between the two parties on WhatsApp, and that initiation happened more than 7 days ago.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">A bug exists that prevents businesses from receiving disappearing messages from customers.</li></span></ul><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>Cloud API</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Starting today, WhatsApp has switched from a notification-based pricing model to a conversation-based pricing model. Businesses are charged per conversation, which includes all messages delivered in a 24 hour session. See <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/pricing" role="link" tabindex="0">Conversation-Based Pricing</a> for information.</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Starting today, Cloud API beta users can start sending and receiving location and contact messages. See the documentation below for more information:

<a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp now support 80 messages per second peak throughput per phone number. This includes incoming and outgoing messages, as well as text, template and media messages.</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><em>On-Premises API</em></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>v2.39.1</strong></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">The <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">2.39.1</code> version of our Business API client is available for developers starting today. The new client includes:</div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">New field for the Set Shards API.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">New hostname added to network requirements.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">New error code <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">1031</code>.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr">Deprecations of the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">hsm</code> type and the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">webhook_payload_conversation_pricingmodel_disabled</code> application setting.</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>Set Shards API</strong></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">Starting with the new API client version, you may provide your phone’s certificate when you are setting up multiconnect. That means that, when calling the /v1/account/shards endpoint, you can add the Base64-encoded certificate in the cert field. See <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/multiconnect_mc" role="link" tabindex="0">Scale Your API Client With Multiconnect</a> for information.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>New Hostname</strong></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We have added <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">graph.whatsapp.com</code> to the list of WhatsApp server hostnames that the Business API client requires connectivity to. See <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/guides/network-requirements" role="link" tabindex="0">Set Up and Debug Your Network, Hostnames</a> for information.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>Error Code Updates</strong></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">With <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.39</code>, we have added error code <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">1031</code>. You will get this error if your account has been locked and can’t send any messages due to an integrity policy violation. See <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/docs/whatsapp/api/errors#error" role="link" tabindex="0">Error and Status Messages</a> and <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/policy-enforcement" role="link" tabindex="0">Policy Enforcement</a> for information.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>Deprecations</strong></div><ul class="x1mfogq2 xrgpmi2 xtaz4m5"><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl"><li class="x1xmf6yo x1e56ztr"><strong>Messages API</strong>: The <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">hsm</code> type has been deprecated with <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">v2.39</code>. You should use the <code class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">template</code> type instead.</li></span><span class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 class="x1ey7xld x1mzt3pk xnxqytt">webhook_payload_conversation_pricingmodel_disabled</code> has been deprecated.</li></span></ul><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/reference/whatsapp-business-phone-number/message-api" role="link" tabindex="0">audio messages</a> to their customers. For supported audio types, see our <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/business-phone-numbers/media#supported-media-types" role="link" tabindex="0">media documentation</a>.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3"><strong>Webhooks</strong></div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">We have updated our <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/webhooks/overview" role="link" tabindex="0">webhooks documentation</a> to clarify the following: <strong>if you receive a message type that is not yet supported by Cloud API, you will be notified via an <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/webhooks/overview#received-unknown-messages" role="link" tabindex="0">unknown message webhook</a></strong>. This means that, for the current API beta release, you will get an unknown message webhook if you receive any of the following message types: Media Messages (Video), Contact Messages, Location Messages, Stickers, Stickerpacks.</div><!--/$--></div></div></div><hr aria-hidden="true" class="xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl xh8yej3 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x6ll4hl"/><div class="xh8yej3
